hibernate-mapping:
SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name,p.Physician_Middle_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name,p.Physician_Suffix from encounter a left join wf_object w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where a.Appointment_Date between ? and ? and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and a.Appointment_Provider_ID in (:PhyList) and a.Cancelation_Reason_Code =''
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, Cast(Block_Date as char(100)), From_Time, To_Time, cast(From_Date_Choosen as char(100)), cast(To_Date_Choosen as char(100)), Reason, Day_Choosen, Block_Type, Created_By, Modified_By, Version,Machine_Technician_Library_ID from block_days b where b.Block_Date between ? and ? and b.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and b.Physician_ID in (:PhyList)
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, Cast(Block_Date as char(100)), From_Time, To_Time, cast(From_Date_Choosen as char(100)), cast(To_Date_Choosen as char(100)), Reason, Day_Choosen, Block_Type, Created_By, Modified_By, Version,Machine_Technician_Library_ID from block_days b where b.Block_Date between ? and ? and b.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and b.Machine_Technician_Library_ID in (:PhyList)
SELECT sha2(?,256);
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, Cast(Block_Date as char(100)), From_Time, To_Time, cast(From_Date_Choosen as char(100)), cast(To_Date_Choosen as char(100)), Reason, Day_Choosen, Block_Type, Created_By, Modified_By, Version,Machine_Technician_Library_ID from block_days b where b.Block_Date=? and b.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and b.Physician_ID in (:PhyList);
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, Cast(Block_Date as char(100)), From_Time, To_Time, cast(From_Date_Choosen as char(100)), cast(To_Date_Choosen as char(100)), Reason, Day_Choosen, Block_Type, Created_By, Modified_By, Version,Machine_Technician_Library_ID from block_days b where b.Block_Date=? and b.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and b.Machine_Technician_Library_ID in (:PhyList);
SELECT All_ICD, Parent_ICD, ICD_Description, ICD_Synonyms, Leaf_Node, Mutually_Exclusive, HCC_Category, Manageable, Version_Year, Created_By, cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), Is_Active, Sort_Order FROM all_icd where all_icd in (:IcdCode)
SELECT a.Encounter_ID as encid,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, w.Current_Process,a.Facility_Name,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')),a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID, (select group_concat(concat(lab_procedure,' - ',lab_procedure_description)) from orders where order_submit_id=a.order_submit_id), (select cast(e1.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Rescheduled_Appointment_Date from encounter e1 where file_reference_number=encid limit 1), a.Reason_for_Cancelation, 'Main' from encounter a,wf_object w,process_master pm,physician_library p where (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') and w.current_process=pm.process_name and a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and a.Human_ID=? and a.appointment_date>? and w.current_process<>'' order by a.Appointment_Date desc limit ?,?
CALL GetParentICD(:ICDS1);
CALL geticd(:ICDS1);
SELECT a.Encounter_ID as encid ,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, w.Current_Process,a.Facility_Name,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')),a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID, (select group_concat(concat(lab_procedure,' - ',lab_procedure_description)) from orders where order_submit_id=a.order_submit_id), (select cast(e1.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Rescheduled_Appointment_Date from encounter e1 where file_reference_number=encid limit 1), a.Reason_for_Cancelation, 'Arc' from encounter_arc a,wf_object_arc w,process_master pm,physician_library p where (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') and w.current_process=pm.process_name and a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and a.Human_ID=? and a.appointment_date>? and w.current_process<>'' order by a.Appointment_Date desc limit ?,?
select r.Scn_ID,r.Status,s.scn_name,r.Role_Name from role_scn_tab r left join scn_tab s on (s.scn_id=r.scn_id) where r.Role_Name=?
SELECT count(*) from encounter a,wf_object w,process_master pm where (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') and w.current_process=pm.process_name and a.Human_ID=? and a.appointment_date>? and w.current_process<>'' order by a.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT count(*) from encounter_arc a,wf_object_arc w,process_master pm where (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') and w.current_process=pm.process_name and a.Human_ID=? and a.appointment_date>? and w.current_process<>'' order by a.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object w where (w.current_Process = ?) and w.Facility_Name=? order by w.Obj_System_Id
select w.facility_name,e.Encounter_Provider_ID from wf_object w,encounter e where w.current_process='BILLING_WAIT' and w.obj_type='ENCOUNTER' and w.Obj_System_Id=e.encounter_id group by w.facility_name,e.Encounter_Provider_ID;
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,B.DOOS,B.Batch_Name, W.Sub_Batch_Range,B.Doc_Type,B.Doc_Sub_Type,B.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id,B.Rend_Prov_ID,B.Scan_File_Path_Name FROM wf_object_billing W, Batch B WHERE W.Obj_Type = 'WORKSET' and W.Obj_System_Id in (:List) and B.Batch_ID = W.Obj_System_Id ORDER BY B.Batch_Name,B.DOOS
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,C.DOOS,C.Batch_Name, C.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id, C.Insurance_Name,C.Page_Number FROM wf_object_billing W, call_log C WHERE W.Obj_Type = 'CALL' and W.Obj_System_Id in (:List) and C.Call_Log_Id = W.Obj_System_Id ORDER BY C.Batch_Name,C.DOOS
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,Q.DOOS,Q.Batch_Name, Q.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing W, qc_error Q WHERE W.Obj_Type = 'QC_ERROR' and W.Obj_System_Id in (:List) and Q.QC_Error_ID = W.Obj_System_Id ORDER BY Q.Batch_Name,Q.DOOS
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,E.DOOS,E.Batch_Name, E.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing W, exception E WHERE W.Obj_Type = 'EXCEPTION' and W.Obj_System_Id in (:List) and E.Exception_ID = W.Obj_System_Id ORDER BY E.Batch_Name,E.DOOS
SELECT P.Human_ID,P.Prefix,P.Last_Name,P.First_Name,P.MI,P.Suffix, cast(p.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,P.SSN,p.Account_Status, p.Medical_Record_Number,P.Patient_Account_External,P.People_In_Collection,ifnull(i.policy_holder_id,''),concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP,P.Patient_Status,P.Human_Type,P.Sex,p.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from Human P left join pat_insured_plan i on (i.Human_ID=P.Human_ID and i.Insurance_Type='Primary') left join physician_library pl on pl.physician_library_id=i.pcp_id where ((P.Last_Name like ? and P.First_Name like ?) OR (P.Last_Name like ? and P.First_Name like ?)) and P.Birth_Date like ? and P.SSN like ? and P.Account_Status like ? and P.Sex like ? and P.Human_ID like ? and (P.Patient_Account_External like ? or P.Patient_Account_External like ?) and i.Policy_Holder_ID like ? and P.Medical_Record_Number like ? and P.Human_Type like ? order by P.Last_Name, P.First_Name,P.Birth_Date, P.Human_ID limit ?,?

OR (P.Last_Name like ? and P.First_Name like ?)) and P.Birth_Date like ? and P.SSN like ? and P.Account_Status like ? and P.Sex like ? and P.Human_ID like ? and (P.Patient_Account_External like ? or P.Patient_Account_External like ?) and i.Policy_Holder_ID like ? and P.Medical_Record_Number like ? and P.Human_Type like ? order by P.Last_Name, P.First_Name,P.Birth_Date, P.Human_ID

SELECT Count(*) from Human P left join pat_insured_plan i on (i.Human_ID=P.Human_ID) where P.Birth_Date like ? and P.SSN like ? and P.Account_Status like ? and P.Sex like ? and P.Human_ID like ? and P.Patient_Account_External like ? and i.Policy_Holder_ID like ? and P.Medical_Record_Number like ? order by P.Last_Name, P.First_Name,P.Birth_Date, P.Human_ID
SELECT P.Human_ID,P.Prefix,P.Last_Name,P.First_Name,P.MI,P.Suffix, cast(p.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,P.SSN,p.Account_Status, p.Medical_Record_Number,P.Patient_Account_External,P.People_In_Collection,ifnull(i.policy_holder_id,''),concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP,P.Patient_Status,P.Human_Type,P.Sex,p.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from Human P left join pat_insured_plan i on (i.Human_ID=P.Human_ID and i.Insurance_Type='Primary') left join physician_library pl on pl.physician_library_id=i.pcp_id where ((soundex(P.Last_Name) = soundex(?) and soundex(P.First_Name) =soundex(?)) OR (soundex(P.Last_Name) =soundex(?) and soundex(P.First_Name) = soundex(?))) and P.Birth_Date like ? and P.SSN like ? and P.Account_Status like ? and P.Sex like ? and P.Human_ID like ? and P.Patient_Account_External like ? and P.Medical_Record_Number like ? and P.Human_Type like ? order by P.Last_Name, P.First_Name,P.Birth_Date, P.Human_ID limit ?,?

select s.SCN_ID,s.SCN_Name,s.Parent_SCN_ID,u.Permission,s.Assigned_Physician_Editable from scn_tab s join user_scn_tab u on s.SCN_ID=u.SCN_ID where u.User_Name=?
SELECT Encounter from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.Encounter as Encounter where Encounter.Appointment_Date < ? and Encounter.Human_ID =? order by Encounter.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT Encounter from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.Encounter as Encounter where Encounter.Date_of_Service like ? and Encounter.Human_ID =? and Encounter.Facility_Name = ? order by Encounter.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT scan_index from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.scan_index as scan_index where scan_index.Human_ID = ? and scan_index.Document_Type =?
SELECT PastMedicalHistory from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.PastMedicalHistory as PastMedicalHistory where PastMedicalHistory.Human_ID=:Human_ID and PastMedicalHistory.Past_Medical_Info <> '' group by PastMedicalHistory.Past_Medical_Info
SELECT Count(*) from Icom where Assigned_To=? and Is_Del='N'and Is_Draft='N'
SELECT ICom_ID,Message_Description,Notes,Assigned_To,Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Cdt,Subject,Version from ICom where Assigned_To=? and Is_Del='N'and Is_Draft='N' order by Cdt Desc limit ?,?
SELECT Count(*) from ICom where Created_By=? and Is_Del='N' and Is_Draft='Y'
SELECT ICom_ID,Message_Description,Notes,Assigned_To,Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Cdt,Subject,Version from ICom where Created_By=? and Is_Del='N' and Is_Draft='Y' order by Cdt Desc limit ?,?
SELECT Count(*) from ICom where Created_By=? and Is_Del='N' and Is_Draft='N'
SELECT ICom_ID,Message_Description,Notes,Assigned_To,Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Cdt,Subject,Version from ICom where Created_By=? and Is_Del='N' and Is_Draft='N' order by Cdt Desc limit ?,?
SELECT Count(*) from ICom where Modified_By=? and Is_Del='Y'
SELECT ICom_ID,Message_Description,Notes,Assigned_To,Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Cdt,Subject,Version from ICom where Modified_By=? and Is_Del='Y' Order by Modified_Date_And_Time Desc limit ?,?
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object w, Process_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = ?) and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList) order by w.Obj_System_Id
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object w, Process_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = ?) and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList) order by w.Obj_System_Id
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing w, Process_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = ?) and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList) order by w.Obj_System_Id
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing w, Process_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = ?) and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList) order by w.Obj_System_Id
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type ,e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"MyQueue",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u.Physician_Library_ID) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type
,ifnull(concat(Physician_Prefix,' ' ,Physician_First_Name ,' ' ,Physician_Middle_Name , ' ' ,Physician_Last_Name , ' ' , Physician_Suffix),'') as orderingphysician,e.Referring_Physician, (select Group_concat(Concat(O.Lab_Procedure , "-" , O.Lab_Procedure_Description),';') from orders O where O.Order_Submit_ID=os.Order_Submit_ID group by O.Order_Submit_ID) as TestDetails
FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join User u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u.Physician_Library_ID)left join orders_submit as os on os.Order_Submit_ID=e.order_submit_id left join physician_library as ph on ph.physician_library_id=os.Physician_ID where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT count(*) as EncounterCount FROM wf_object w where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u1.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type, e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"GeneralQ",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u1 on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u1.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.facility_name= ? and w.current_owner = ? and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u1.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type, e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"GeneralQ",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u1 on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u1.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.current_owner = ? and u.user_name=? and (w.facility_name in (:FacList) and h.Primary_Carrier_ID in (:CarrierList) and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT Count(*) FROM wf_object w
where w.current_process in (select process_name from process_user where user_name=?) and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id, e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type , e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"MyQueue",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u.Physician_Library_ID) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.current_owner = ? and w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type , ifnull(concat(Physician_Prefix,' ' ,Physician_First_Name ,' ' ,Physician_Middle_Name , ' ' ,Physician_Last_Name , ' ' , Physician_Suffix),'') as orderingphysician,e.Referring_Physician, (select Group_concat(Concat(O.Lab_Procedure , "-" , O.Lab_Procedure_Description),';') from orders O where O.Order_Submit_ID=os.Order_Submit_ID group by O.Order_Submit_ID) as TestDetails FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u.Physician_Library_ID) left join orders_submit as os on os.Order_Submit_ID=e.order_submit_id left join physician_library as ph on ph.physician_library_id=os.Physician_ID
where w.current_owner = ? and w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and
(w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u1.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type, e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"GeneralQ",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u1 on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u1.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.facility_name= ? and w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, u1.person_name, e.encounter_id, e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, w.Current_Process,e.is_eandm_submitted ,h.Human_id ,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,w.Obj_Type, e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,""),"GeneralQ",ifnull(c.Carrier_Name,"") FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u1 on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u1.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join insurance_plan i on (i.Insurance_Plan_ID=(select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan p where p.Human_ID = h.Human_id && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' order by Pat_Insured_Plan_ID desc limit 1)) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and u.user_name=? and (w.facility_name in (:FacList) and h.Primary_Carrier_ID in (:CarrierList) and w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT count(*) FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join user u1 on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=u1.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED' order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where n.created_by = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED' order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_process='close_task' and n.created_by = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_process='close_task' and n.Assigned_To = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED'
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) left join scan_index_conversion si on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name=? and w.Obj_Type =?;
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED' order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=N.Assigned_To),N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,n.priority,n.Notes,(select u.person_name from user u where u.user_name=n.Created_By) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and n.created_by =? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED' order by n.Message_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join process_master m on (w.current_process=m.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) and m.process_type='ASSIGNED'
SELECT distinct s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) left join scan_index_conversion si on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where w.current_owner = ? and w.Obj_Type =? and p.process_type='assigned'
SELECT distinct s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) left join scan_index_conversion si on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where w.current_owner = ? and w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and
w.Obj_Type =? and p.process_type='assigned'
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) left join scan_index_conversion si on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name=? and w.Obj_Type =? and p.process_type='assigned'
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(r.Requested_Date as char(100)) as d,s.Facility_Name, r.Requested_By, w.Obj_System_Id from scan s, rescan_request r left join wf_object w on (r.Rescan_Request_ID = w.obj_system_id) where r.Rescan_Request_ID in (:List) and w.Obj_Type ='RESCAN' and r.Scan_ID=s.Scan_ID
SELECT Encounter from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.Encounter as Encounter where Encounter.Appointment_Date like ? and Encounter.Human_ID =? and Encounter.Appointment_Provider_ID=? and Encounter.Cancelation_Reason_Code='' and Encounter.Reschedule_Reason_Code='' order by Encounter.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT Encounter from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.Encounter as Encounter where Encounter.Appointment_Date like ? and Encounter.Appointment_Provider_ID=? and Encounter.Cancelation_Reason_Code='' and Encounter.Reschedule_Reason_Code='' order by Encounter.Appointment_Date desc
SELECT h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.MI,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)) as birthdate,h.sex,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.ssn, e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS, concat(pl.Physician_Prefix,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Suffix), ifnull(e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,''), cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as DOA,h.Suffix,h.Home_Phone_No, u.user_name,h.Is_Sent_To_Rcopia,h.Patient_Status,h.Human_Type,h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient FROM human h left join encounter e on (h.Human_ID = e.Human_ID and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y') left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = u.Physician_Library_ID) where h.human_id= ? group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc;
SELECT In_House_Procedure_ID,Encounter_Id,procedure_code,Procedure_Description,Notes FROM in_house_procedure where encounter_id = ?
SELECT count(*) FROM procedure_code_library where is_other_procedure = 'yes'
SELECT Procedure_Code_Library_ID,Procedure_Code,Procedure_Description FROM procedure_code_library where is_in_house_procedure = ? limit ?,?
SELECT distinct c.Chief_Complaint_Group_ID FROM chief_complaint c where c.Encounter_ID =?;
SELECT e.Purpose_of_Visit FROM encounter e where e.Encounter_ID =?;
SELECT c.HPI_Element, c.HPI_Value, cast(c.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as mdt FROM chief_complaint c where c.Encounter_ID=? order by mdt desc;
Delete FROM chief_complaint where Chief_Complaint_Group_ID=?;
SELECT c.Chief_Complaint_Group_ID FROM chief_complaint c ORDER BY Chief_Complaint_Group_ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT a.Patient_Note FROM appointment a where a.Appointment_ID=?;
SELECT p.Physician_Library_ID FROM physician_library p;
SELECT p.Physician_Library_ID, p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name, p.Physician_Middle_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name, p.Physician_Suffix, p.Physician_Address1, p.Physician_City, p.Physician_State, p.Physician_Zip, p.Physician_Telephone, p.Physician_Fax, p.Physician_EMail, p.Physician_NPI, p.Physician_Other_ID,p.Version FROM physician_library p where p.Physician_Library_ID=?;
SELECT p.Physician_Library_ID, p.Physician_Prefix, p.Physician_First_Name, p.Physician_Middle_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name, p.Physician_Suffix, p.Physician_Address1, p.Physician_City, p.Physician_State, p.Physician_Zip, p.Physician_Telephone, p.Physician_Fax, p.Physician_EMail, p.Physician_NPI, p.Physician_Other_ID,p.Version FROM physician_library p limit ?,?;
SELECT a.Physician_POV_ID, a.Physician_ID, a.Purpose_of_Visit, a.Duration,a.Version FROM physician_pov a where a.Physician_ID =? limit ?,?;
SELECT count(*) FROM master_table_list m, pending_downloads p where m.Bucket_Number =? and p.computer_name=? and m.Table_Name=p.List_of_Tables;
SELECT p.list_of_tables, m.Table_Comment,m.Manager_Object_Name, m.Domain_Object_Name, m.Table_Name,p.computer_name, m.Bucket_Number FROM master_table_list m, pending_downloads p where m.Bucket_Number =? and p.computer_name=? and m.Table_Name=p.List_of_Tables;
delete FROM pending_downloads where List_of_Tables=(SELECT m.Table_Name FROM master_table_list m where m.Manager_Object_Name=?) and Computer_Name=?;
select c.HPI_Element, c.HPI_Value from chief_complaint c where c.Encounter_ID = ?;
select c.HPI_Element, c.HPI_Value,cast(c.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt from chief_complaint c where c.Encounter_ID = ? and c.HPI_Element='Chief Complaints'
union select c.HPI_Element, c.HPI_Value,cast(c.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt from chief_complaint_arc c where c.Encounter_ID = ? and c.HPI_Element='Chief Complaints';
select c.HPI_Element, c.HPI_Value,cast(c.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt from chief_complaint c where c.Encounter_ID = ? and c.HPI_Element='HPI Notes'
select v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, cast(v.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt from patient_results v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Results_Type='Vitals';
select v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, cast(v.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)) as cdt,v.Notes,v.Loinc_Identifier,v.Results_Type,v.Units from patient_results v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Results_Type='Vitals' and v.value<>'';
select v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, cast(v.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)) as cdt,v.Notes,v.Loinc_Identifier,v.Results_Type,v.Units from patient_results v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Results_Type='Vitals' and v.units in('%','Lbs','Fahrenheit') and v.value<>'';
select v.System_Name, v.Symptom_Name, cast(v.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt from review_of_systems v where v.Encounter_ID = ?;
select v.System_Name, v.Symptom_Name, cast(v.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt,v.Status from review_of_systems v where v.Encounter_ID = ?;
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='System';
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='Past Medical History';
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='Social History';
select v.Status,v.comments from advance_directive v where v.Human_ID = ?;
select v.Physician_Name,v.Relationship,v.Phone_No from physician_patient v where v.Human_ID = ?;
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='Non Drug Allergy History';
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='Selected Assessment';
SELECT m.Drug_Name, m.Dosage, m.Frequency, m.Route_Of_Administration, m.Medication_Notes FROM med_history m where m.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT r.Brand_Name,r.Generic_Name,r.Route,r.Form,r.Strength,cast(r.Start_Date as char(100)) as Start_Date,cast(r.Stop_Date as char(100)) as Stop_Date,r.Refills,r.Duration,r.Dose,r.Dose_Unit,r.Dose_Timing FROM rcopia_medication r where r.Human_ID=? and Deleted='N';
(select o.lab_procedure,o.lab_procedure_description,os.specimen_type,os.order_notes,lb.lab_name,l.location_name, a.order_id ,a.icd,a.icd_description,cast(os.test_Date as char(100))as testdate,o.physician_id from orders_submit os left join lab_location l on(os.lab_location_id=l.lab_location_id) left join lab lb on(os.lab_id=lb.lab_id) left join orders o on (os.Order_Submit_ID=o.Order_Submit_ID) left join orders_assessment a on(o.Order_Submit_ID=a.order_submit_id) left join wf_object wf on (o.Order_Submit_ID = wf.Obj_System_Id) where os.order_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' and wf.Current_Process<>'DELETED_ORDER' and wf.obj_type="DIAGNOSTIC ORDER" and o.encounter_id=? group by wf.obj_system_id);
select ih.Procedure_Code,ih.Procedure_Code_description,'','','','','','','',cast(ih.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as CreatedDateTime,ih.Physician_ID from in_house_procedure ih where ih.encounter_id= ? and ih.Procedure_Code<>'99999';
select o.lab_procedure,o.lab_procedure_description,os.specimen_type,os.order_notes,lb.lab_name,l.location_name,a.order_submit_id, a.icd,a.icd_description from orders_submit os left join lab_location l on(os.lab_location_id=l.lab_location_id) left join lab lb on(os.lab_id=lb.lab_id) left join orders o on (os.Order_Submit_ID=o.Order_Submit_ID) left join orders_assessment a on(o.order_submit_id=a.order_submit_id) left join wf_object wf on (o.Order_Submit_ID = wf.Obj_System_Id) where os.order_type='IMAGE ORDER' and wf.Current_Process<>'DELETED_ORDER' and wf.obj_type="IMAGE ORDER" and o.encounter_id=?;
SELECT r.to_physician_name,r.referral_specialty,r.to_facility_name,r.reason_for_referral,r.number_of_visit,r.referral_notes,ifnull(a.icd,""),ifnull(a.assessment_description,"") from referral_order r left join referral_orders_assessment a on(r.referral_order_id=a.referral_order_id) where r.encounter_id=?;
SELECT concat( if(Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time!='0001-01-01 00:00:00', concat('Created on ',cast(Date_Format(Created_Date_And_Time,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p') as char(100))), concat('Created on ',cast(Date_Format(Created_Date_And_Time,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p') as char(100)))), if(Provider_Signed_ID!=0,concat(' by ',(SELECT Person_Name FROM `user` where Physician_Library_ID =Provider_Signed_ID)), ''),if(Provider_Review_Signed_ID!=0,concat(' and reviewed by ',(SELECT Person_Name FROM `user` where Physician_Library_ID =Provider_Review_Signed_ID)),''),':'),replace(Addendum_Notes,'\r\n','\r') FROM addendum_notes a where Encounter_ID=? and (Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time!='0001-01-01 00:00:00' or Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time !='0001-01-01 00:00:00') ORDER BY Created_Date_And_Time DESC;
SELECT m.drug_name,m.dosage,m.frequency,m.medication_notes from med_history m where human_id=?;
SELECT m.NDC_ID,m.Generic_Name,m.strength,m.Dose,m.Route,m.Dose_Other,m.Patient_Notes,'Active', cast(m.Start_Date as char(100)) as cdt1,m.Brand_Name,cast(m.Stop_Date as char(100)) as stopdate,m.Quantity, m.Quantity_unit,m.First_DataBank_Med_ID,m.icd_code,m.ICD_Code_Description,m.refills,m.action,m.dose_unit,m.dose_timing, m.rcopia_id,m.Rxnorm_ID,m.RXnorm_ID_Type FROM rcopia_medication m where m.Human_ID =? and m.Deleted='N' group by m.generic_name;
SELECT e.System_Name, e.Condition_Name, e.Status, e.Examination_Notes FROM examination e where e.Encounter_ID =?;
SELECT e.System_Name, e.Condition_Name, e.Status, e.Examination_Notes,e.Short_Description FROM examination e where e.Encounter_ID =? ;
SELECT a.ICD, a.ICD_Description, a.Assessment_Notes, a.Assessment_Status FROM assessment a where a.Encounter_ID =?;
select * from (SELECT a.ICD, a.ICD_Description, a.Assessment_Notes, a.Assessment_Status,a.Primary_Diagnosis, a.Version_Year,a.Chronic_Problem,assessment_id FROM assessment a where a.Encounter_ID =? and a.Assessment_Type='Selected' and a.Diagnosis_Source not like '%Deleted%' union SELECT a.ICD, a.ICD_Description, a.Assessment_Notes, a.Assessment_Status,a.Primary_Diagnosis, a.Version_Year,a.Chronic_Problem,assessment_id FROM assessment_arc a where a.Encounter_ID =? and a.Assessment_Type='Selected' and a.Diagnosis_Source not like '%Deleted%' ) as a order by Primary_Diagnosis desc,assessment_id asc ;
SELECT i.Procedure_Code, i.Immunization_Description,cast(i.Given_Date as char(100)) as cdt , i.Dose, i.Dose_No , i.Route_of_Administration, i.Notes FROM immunization i where i.Encounter_ID=?;
select o.Lab_Procedure_Description,cast(s.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as cdt ,s.Order_Notes,o.Lab_Procedure from Orders o, orders_submit s where o.Encounter_ID=? and o.Order_Submit_ID=s.Order_Submit_ID;
select o.Procedure_Code, o.Procedure_Code_Description,cast(o.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt,o.Notes from in_house_procedure o where o.Encounter_ID=?;
select o.Problem_Description,cast(o.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt,o.Date_Diagnosed,o.Status, o.ICD,o.Is_Active,a.snomed_code,a.snomed_code_description from problem_list o,all_icd a where o.human_id=? and o.icd=a.all_icd and o.Status ='Active' and o.Is_Active='Y' group by o.icd;
select o.Problem_Description,cast(o.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as cdt,o.Date_Diagnosed,o.Status, o.ICD,o.Is_Active,o.Resolved_Date,a.snomed_code,a.snomed_code_description from problem_list o,all_icd a where o.human_id=? and o.icd=a.all_icd and o.Status in ('Active','resolved') and o.Is_Active='Y' and a.snomed_code_description<>'' group by o.icd;
select o.Care_Name,o.Care_Name_Value,o.Status,o.Care_Plan_Notes,cast(o.Plan_Date as char(100)) as cdt,o.Status_Value from care_plan o where o.Encounter_ID=? and (o.Status <>'' or o.Care_Plan_Notes<>'' or o.Status_Value<>'');
select o.Allergy_Name,o.NDC_ID,o.Reaction,cast(o.OnsetDate as char(100)) as cdt,o.Status,o.First_DataBank_Med_ID, r.code,r.str,o.rcopia_id,o.Rxnorm_ID from rcopia_allergy o,rxnconso r where o.Human_ID=? and r.str=o.allergy_name and sab='rxnorm' and o.Status='Active' and o.Deleted='N' group by o.allergy_name;
select o.Preventive_Service,o.Preventive_Service_Value,o.Status,o.Preventive_Screening_Notes from preventive_screening o where o.Encounter_ID=? and (o.Status <>'' or o.Preventive_Screening_Notes<>'');
select o.Care_Name,o.Care_Name_Value,o.Status,o.Care_Plan_Notes,cast(o.Plan_Date as char(100)) as cdt from care_plan o where o.Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT s.Source_For_Diagnosis, cast(s.Date as char(100)) as cdt , s.Notes FROM assessment_source s where s.Encounter_ID=?
SELECT t.Plan FROM treatment_plan t where t.Encounter_Id = ?;
SELECT t.Plan,t.Plan_For_Plan FROM treatment_plan t where t.encounter_id = ? and t.plan_type!='plan' and Plan_For_Plan<>'' and t.plan not like '%Implantable Devices';
SELECT t.Plan FROM treatment_plan t where t.encounter_id = ? and t.plan_type='plan' union SELECT t.Plan FROM treatment_plan_arc t where t.encounter_id = ? and t.plan_type='plan' ;
select o.problem_description,o.date_diagnosed,o.ICD,a.ICD_ID,o.status,a.snomed_code,a.SNOMED_Code_Description from problem_list o,all_icd a where o.icd=a.all_icd and o.is_health_concern='Y' and o.is_active='Y' and o.Status in ('active','resolved') and o.human_id=? group by o.icd;
SELECT t.Plan,t.Plan_Type,t.Addendum_Plan,cast(t.created_date_and_time as char(100))as createtime,t.Encounter_ID FROM treatment_plan t where t.human_id = ? and plan_type='plan' order by encounter_id desc;
SELECT p.Past_Medical_Info, p.From_Date, p.To_Date, p.AHA_Question_ICD FROM past_medical_history p where p.Human_ID = ? and p.Is_present='Y';
SELECT p.Past_Medical_Info, p.From_Date, p.To_Date, p.AHA_Question_ICD,p.Notes,p.Is_present FROM past_medical_history p where p.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT s.Surgery_Name, s.Description, s.Date_Of_Surgery FROM surgical_history s where s.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT h.Reason_For_Hospitalization, h.Hospitalization_Notes, h.From_Date, h.To_Date FROM hospitalization h where h.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT f.RelationShip, f.Family_History_Notes, f.Family_History_ID, f.Age, f.Status, f.Cause_Of_Death FROM family_history f where f.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT f.RelationShip,f.Family_History_ID, f.Age, f.Status, f.Cause_Of_Death FROM family_history f where f.Human_ID = ?;
select v.Parent_Field,v.Name_Of_The_Field,v.Notes from general_notes v where v.Encounter_ID = ? and v.Parent_Field='Family History';
SELECT s.Social_Info, s.Description, s.Value FROM social_history s where s.Human_ID = ? and s.Is_present='Y';
SELECT s.Social_Info, s.Description, s.Value,s.Is_Present,cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),s.Recodes,s.Encounter_ID FROM social_history s where s.human_id = ? and s.Value!='' and s.Is_Present='Y' order by encounter_id desc;
SELECT r.OBX_Observation_Identifier,r.OBX_Observation_Text,r.OBX_Observation_Value,r.OBX_Abnormal_Flag, r.OBX_Date_And_Time_Of_Observation,r.obx_Units,cast(r.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as capturedate, r.OBX_Loinc_Identifier, r.OBX_Loinc_Observation_Text,m.Result_Review_Comments ,b.OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time,r.OBX_Reference_Range,'',m.result_master_id FROM result_master m , result_obr b,result_obx r where r.result_master_id=m.result_master_id and b.result_master_id=m.result_master_id and m.matching_patient_id=? and r.OBX_Observation_Value<>'SEE REPORT BELOW: ' and r.OBX_Observation_Value not like '%base64%' and r.OBX_Observation_Value <>'' group by r.result_obx_id
SELECT r.Loinc_Num,r.Component,r.Result,r.Units,r.Flag,CAST(e.DateTime_Reported as char(20)) as cdt FROM result_sub_entry r,result_entry e where e.Encounter_ID=? and e.result_entry_id=r.result_entry_id;
SELECT n.Non_Drug_Allergy_History_Info, n.Description FROM non_drug_allergy_history n where n.Human_ID = ? and n.Is_present='Y';
SELECT n.Non_Drug_Allergy_History_Info, n.Description FROM non_drug_allergy_history n where n.Human_ID = ? and n.Is_present='Y';
SELECT g.Parent_Field, g.Notes FROM general_notes g where g.Human_ID = ?;
SELECT f.Family_History_ID, f.Disease FROM family_history_disease f;
SELECT f.Family_History_ID, f.Disease FROM family_history_disease f where f.Family_History_ID=?;
SELECT e.Source_Of_Information, e.If_Source_Of_Information_Others, e.Is_Hospitalization_Denied FROM encounter e where e.Encounter_ID = ?;
select e.Human_ID from encounter e where e.Encounter_ID = ?;
select e.Encounter_Provider_ID from encounter e where e.Encounter_ID = ?;
SELECT Concat('#Name',Last_Name,', ', First_Name,' ', MI) , cast(Concat('#Age',DATE_FORMAT(FROM_DAYS(TO_DAYS(NOW())-TO_DAYS(Birth_Date)), '%Y')+0 ) as char(50)), Concat('#DOB', Date_Format(Birth_Date,'%d-%b-%Y')), Concat('#Sex',Sex), cast(Concat('#Account', Human_ID) as char(50)) , Concat('#MedicalRecord', Medical_Record_Number), Concat('#PrimaryPlan', (select Insurance_Plan_Name from insurance_plan where Insurance_Plan_ID= (select Insurance_Plan_ID from pat_insured_plan where Human_ID = ? && Insurance_Type='PRIMARY'))) FROM `human` where Human_ID=?;
SELECT Concat('#CCCondition',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Condition';
SELECT Concat('#CCOnset',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Onset';
SELECT Concat('#CCLocation',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Location';
SELECT Concat('#CCDuration',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Duration';
SELECT Concat('#CCTiming',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Timing';
SELECT Concat('#CCQuality',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Quality';
SELECT Concat('#CCSeverity',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Severity';
SELECT Concat('#CCAggravatedBy',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Aggravated By';
SELECT Concat('#CCRelievedBy',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Relieved By';
SELECT Concat('#CCContext',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Context';
SELECT Concat('#CCAssociatedSymptoms',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Associated Symptoms';
SELECT Concat('#CCNutrition',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Nutrition';
SELECT Concat('#CCPhysicalStatus',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Physical Status';
SELECT Concat('#CCCognitiveStatus',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Cognitive Status';
SELECT Concat('#CCPainStatus',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Pain Status';
SELECT Concat('#CCADLStatus',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='ADL Status';
SELECT Concat('#CCPsychologicalStatus',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Psychological Status';
SELECT Concat('#CCNotes',HPI_Value) FROM chief_complaint c where Encounter_ID=? and HPI_Element='Notes';
SELECT Concat('Medication', Drug_Name,(select if(Dosage='','', Concat(' : ',Dosage))), (select if(Route_Of_Administration='','', Concat(', ',Route_Of_Administration))), (select if(Frequency='','', Concat(' ',Frequency))),'.') FROM `med_history` where Human_ID=?;
SELECT Concat('ExamContent', Short_Description, ' : ', Status, (select if(Examination_Notes='','', Concat(' - ',Examination_Notes))),'@',System_Name,'@') FROM examination e where e.Encounter_ID =? and e.Status<>'Not Examined';
SELECT Concat('ExamContentTable', System_Name,'@', Short_Description,'@', Status,'@', Examination_Notes) FROM examination e where e.Encounter_ID =? and e.Status<>'Not Examined';
SELECT Concat('ROSContent', (select if(Status='','Not Specified', if(Status='Yes',Symptom_Name,'Negative'))),'@',System_Name,'@') FROM review_of_systems r where r.Encounter_ID =?;
select Concat('VitalContent', Loinc_Observation,': ', Value, (select if(Loinc_Observation='Height',' inches', (select if(Loinc_Observation='Weight',' lbs', (select if(Loinc_Observation='Body Temperature',' F', (select if(Loinc_Observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia',' mm/Hg', (select if(Loinc_Observation='BP-Standing Sys/Dia',' mm/Hg', (select if(Loinc_Observation='BP-Lying Sys/Dia',' mm/Hg', (select if(Loinc_Observation='Respiratory Rate',' Breaths/min', (select if(Loinc_Observation='Heart Rate',' Beats/min', (select if(Loinc_Observation='Pulse Oximetry',' %', (select if(Loinc_Observation='HbA1C',' %', '')))))))))))))))))))), '@',cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),'@')from patient_results where Encounter_ID = ? and Results_Type='Vitals';
SELECT Concat('AssessmentContent', ICD,' - ',ICD_Description,'; ',Assessment_Notes,' - ',Assessment_Status,'.') FROM `assessment` where Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT Concat('AssessmentDiffContent', ICD,' - ',ICD_Description, (select if(Reason_For_Exclusion='','', Concat(' - ',Reason_For_Exclusion))),'.') FROM `assessment_problem_list_difference` where Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT distinct Concat('AssessmentSourceContent', a.ICD_Description,' ( ',a.ICD,' ) ', (select if(s.Source_For_Diagnosis='','', Concat(' is based on findings from ',s.Source_For_Diagnosis))), (select if(cast(Date_Format(s.Date,'%Y-%m-%d') as char(50))<>'0001-01-01',Concat(' dated on ',cast(Date_Format(s.Date,'%d-%b-%Y') as char(50))),'')), (select if(s.Notes='','', Concat(' - ',s.Notes))),'.') FROM assessment a, assessment_source s where s.Encounter_ID=? and s.Assessment_ID=a.Assessment_ID group by s.Assessment_source_ID;
SELECT (select if(Is_Labs='Y','#LabLab','')), (select if(Is_Mammogram='Y','#MammogramMammogram','')), (select if(Is_PAP='Y','#PAPPAP','')), (select if(Is_FOBT='Y','#FOBTFOBT','')), (select if(Is_DRE='Y','#DREDRE','')) , (select if(Is_Colonoscopy='Y','#ColonoscopyColonoscopy','')) FROM `treatment_plan` where Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT (select if(Plan='','',Concat('#PlanNotesContent', Plan))) FROM `treatment_plan` where Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT Concat('CarePlanContent', Care_Name_Value, (select if(e.Status='Yes',' - Administered',concat(' - ',e.Status))), (select if(e.Care_Plan_Notes<>'',concat(' - ',e.Care_Plan_Notes),'')), (select if(e.Plan_Date<>'',concat(' - dated on ',e.Plan_Date),'')) ,'@',e.Care_Name,':@') FROM care_plan e where e.Encounter_ID=? and e.Status<>'No' and e.Status <> '';
SELECT Concat('ScreeningPlanContent', Preventive_Service_Value, (select if(e.Preventive_Screening_Notes<>'',concat(' - ',e.Preventive_Screening_Notes),'')), '@',e.Preventive_Service,':@') FROM preventive_screening e where e.Encounter_ID=? and e.Status='Yes';
SELECT concat( (select if(Referral_Notes='','',concat('#ReferralPhysician', (SELECT Concat(Physician_Prefix,'. ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix,'\n') FROM `physician_library` where Physician_Library_ID=(select Referral_Physician_Id from `treatment_plan` where Encounter_Id=?))))), (select if(Referral_Notes='','',concat('#ReferralNotes',Referral_Notes)))) FROM `treatment_plan` where Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT if(Physician_Attestation ='Y',concat('#providerName',(SELECT Concat(Physician_Prefix,'. ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) FROM `physician_library` where Physician_Library_ID = (SELECT Encounter_Provider_ID FROM `encounter` where Encounter_ID = ?))),''), if(Physician_Attestation ='Y',Concat('#EncounterDate', (select Date_Format(Date_of_Service,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p') FROM `encounter` where Encounter_ID = ?)),'') FROM `treatment_plan` where Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT concat('Digitally signed by ',(SELECT Concat(Physician_Prefix,'. ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) FROM `physician_library` where Physician_Library_ID = (SELECT Encounter_Provider_ID FROM `encounter` where Encounter_ID = ?))), if(Is_Physician_Asst_Process ='Y' && Date_Format(Encounter_Provider_Review_Signed_Date,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p')<>'01-Jan-0001 12:00 AM',Concat(' at ', Date_Format(Encounter_Provider_Review_Signed_Date,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p')), if(Date_Format(Encounter_Provider_Signed_Date,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p')<>'01-Jan-0001 12:00 AM',Concat(' at ', Date_Format(Encounter_Provider_Signed_Date,'%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p')),'')) FROM `encounter` where Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT concat('PMHistoryContent',Past_Medical_Info, (select if(cast(From_Date as char(100))='','',concat(' during the period of ', (SELECT if(LOCATE('--', From_Date)=1,substr(From_Date,3), if(LOCATE('-', From_Date)=1,substr(From_Date,2),From_Date)))))), (select if(cast(To_Date as char(100))='','',concat(' to ', (SELECT if(LOCATE('--', To_Date)=1,substr(To_Date,3), if(LOCATE('-', To_Date)=1,substr(To_Date,2),To_Date)))))),'.') FROM `past_medical_history` where Human_ID=? and Is_Present='Y';
SELECT Concat('#PMHistoryNotes','Notes: ',Notes) FROM general_notes where Parent_Field='Past Medical History' and Human_ID=?;
SELECT concat('SurgicalHistoryContent',Surgery_Name, (select if(cast(Date_Of_Surgery as char(100))='','',concat(' performed on ', (SELECT if(LOCATE('--', Date_Of_Surgery)=1, substr(Date_Of_Surgery, 3), if(LOCATE('-', Date_Of_Surgery)=1, substr(Date_Of_Surgery, 2),Date_Of_Surgery)))))), (select if(Description='','',concat(' - ',Description))),'.') FROM `surgical_history` where Human_ID = ?;
SELECT concat('#HospitalizationVerificationPatient denied hospitalization history.') from encounter where encounter_id = ? and Is_Hospitalization_Denied='Y';
SELECT concat('HospitalizationHistoryContent', (select concat('Hospitalized for ',Reason_For_Hospitalization, (select if(cast(From_Date as char(100))='','',concat(' during the period of ', (SELECT if(LOCATE('--', From_Date)=1,substr(From_Date,3), if(LOCATE('-', From_Date)=1,substr(From_Date,2),From_Date)))))), (select if(cast(To_Date as char(100))='','',concat(' to ', (SELECT if(LOCATE('--', To_Date)=1,substr(To_Date,3), if(LOCATE('-', To_Date)=1,substr(To_Date,2),To_Date)))))), (select if(Hospitalization_Notes='','',concat(' - ',Hospitalization_Notes)))))) FROM `hospitalization` where Human_ID=? and (SELECT Is_Hospitalization_Denied from encounter where encounter_id= ?)<>'Y'
SELECT concat('FamilyHistoryContent','Patients ',RelationShip, (select if(Age = 0,'',concat(' who is ',cast(Age as char(50)), ' Yrs old'))), (select if(Status='Deceased' && Cause_Of_Death <> '',concat(' deceased due to ', Cause_Of_Death),' deceased')), (select if(Family_History_Notes='','',concat(' - ',Family_History_Notes))), '.') FROM `family_history` where Human_ID=?;
SELECT concat('SocialHistoryContent',Social_Info, (select if(Description='','',concat(' - ',Description))), (select if(Value='','',concat(' - ',Value))),'.') FROM `social_history` where Human_ID = ? and Is_Present = 'Y';
SELECT Concat('#SocialHistoryNotes','Notes: ',Notes) FROM general_notes where Parent_Field='Social History' and Human_ID=?;
SELECT concat('NonDrugHistoryContent',Non_Drug_Allergy_History_Info, (select if(Description='','',concat(' - ',Description))),'.') FROM `non_drug_allergy_history` where Human_ID=? and Is_Present='Y';
SELECT Concat('#NonDrugHistoryNotes','Notes: ',Notes) FROM general_notes where Parent_Field='Non Drug Allergy History' and Human_ID=?;
SELECT concat('#PFSHVerification',if(Is_PFSH_Verified='Y', concat('All the above history information has been obtained from ', (select if(Source_Of_Information='Self','Patient', (select if(Source_Of_Information='Other',concat('patient',"'s ",If_Source_Of_Information_Others), concat('patient',"'s ",Source_Of_Information)))))),'')) FROM `encounter` where Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT concat('#LabOrderContent',Lab_Procedure_Description,'.') FROM `orders` where encounter_ID=? and Order_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER';
SELECT concat('#DIProcedureContent',Lab_Procedure_Description,'.') FROM `orders` where encounter_ID=? and Order_Type='Image Order';
SELECT concat('#referalphysician',(SELECT Concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'. ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix))), Concat('#facility',r.To_Facility_Name),Concat('#referaldate',Date_Format(r.Referral_Date,'%d-%b-%Y')), Concat('#referalreason',r.Reason_For_Referral) FROM `referral_order` r, `physician_library` p where r.Encounter_Id=? and p.Physician_Library_ID=r.To_Physician_ID;
SELECT cast(Concat('#Dose', i.Dose) as char(50)), Concat('#Immunization', i.Immunization_Description), Concat('#Routeofadministration', i.Route_of_Administration), Concat('#immunizationdate', Date_Format(i.Given_Date,'%d-%b-%Y')) FROM `immunization` i where i.Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT cast(Concat('#Dose', r.Dose) as char(50)), Concat('#Unit', r.Unit), Concat('#Drug', r.Drug_Name), Concat('#frequency', r.Frequency), Concat('#days', r.Days_supply) FROM `rx_order` r where r.Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT concat('#Procedure', o.Procedure_Code_Description), (select if(o.Notes<>'',Concat('#Notes - ', o.Notes),'')) FROM `in_house_procedure` o where o.Encounter_Id=?;
SELECT Concat('EPrescriptionContent', r.Brand_Name,' ',r.Generic_Name,' ', r.Form,' ', r.Dose,' ', r.Dose_Unit,' ', r.Route,' ', r.Dose_Timing) FROM `rcopia_medication` r where r.Human_ID=?;
SELECT c.Allergy_Record_Group_ID FROM allergy_record c ORDER BY Allergy_Record_Group_ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) FROM immunization where Encounter_Id = ?
SELECT Immunization_Id,Human_ID,Physician_Id,Encounter_Id,Procedure_Code,Immunization_Description,cast(Visit_Date as char(100)) as Visit_Date,CVX_Code,Dose, Dose_No,Given_By,cast(Given_Date as char(100)) as Given_date,Location,Lot_Number,Manufacturer, cast(Date_on_Vis as char(100)) as Date_on_Visit,cast(Vis_Given_Date as char(100)) as Visit_Given_Date, cast(Expiry_Date as char(100)) as Expiry_Date,Route_of_Administration,Notes,Vfc,Immunization_Source, Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , Modified_By,CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) ,Version,Is_VIS_Given,Authorization_Required FROM immunization where Encounter_Id = ? order by Modified_Date_And_Time desc
SELECT count(*) FROM procedure_code_library where Procedure_Type='immunization procedure'
SELECT Procedure_Code, Procedure_Description FROM procedure_code_library where Procedure_Type='immunization procedure' limit ?,?
SELECT immunization_id FROM immunization where Procedure_code = ? and Immunization_Description = ? and Created_Date_And_Time like ?
SELECT lo.Status,lo.Authorization,CAST(lo.Test_Date AS char(100)) AS tDate,lo.Lab_Order_Notes,lo.Specimen_Type,lo.Specimen_Volume, lo.Specimen_Units,lo.Lab_Name,cast(lo.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100))as cDate,lp.Lab_Procedure,lp.Description,ll.Location_Name,a.ICD,a.ICD_Description as assDesc FROM lab_order lo LEFT JOIN lab_procedure lp ON (lo.Lab_Procedure_ID=lp.Lab_Procedure_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location ll ON (lo.Lab_Location_ID= ll.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN assessment a ON (lo.Assessment_ID= a.Assessment_ID) WHERE lo.Encounter_ID=? ORDER BY cDate DESC
SELECT a.Id,a.ICD_Description from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.Assessment as a where a.Encounter_ID=?
SELECT count(*) FROM procedure_code_library where Procedure_Type='other procedure'
SELECT Procedure_Code,Procedure_Description,Version FROM procedure_code_library where Procedure_Type='other procedure' limit ?,?
SELECT count(1) fROM family_history where human_id=? group by relationship
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id) left join task_update u on (t.task_id=u.task_id) where t.Created_By=? or u.Assigned_to=? group by t.task_id order by md desc
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id) left join task_update u on (t.task_id=u.task_id) where t.Human_ID=? and (t.Created_By=? or u.Assigned_to=?) group by t.task_id order by md desc
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id) left join task_update u on (t.Task_ID=u.Task_ID) where t.Created_By=? group by t.task_id order by md desc
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id) left join task_update u on (t.task_id=u.task_id) where t.Human_ID=? and t.Created_By=? group by t.task_id order by md desc
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id) left join task_update u on (t.task_id=u.task_id) where u.Assigned_to=? group by t.task_id order by md desc
Select t.Task_ID,t.Human_ID,t.Task_Message_Description,cast(t.Start_Date_Time as char(100)) as sd, cast(t.End_Date_Time as char(100))as ed,h.Prefix,h.Last_Name,t.Created_By,cast(t.Created_Date_and_Time as char(100)) as ct, t.Modified_By,cast(t.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as md,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as bd, o.Obj_Sub_Type,o.Current_Process,o.Priority,u.Assigned_to,o.Facility_Name from task t left join human h on(t.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object o on (t.Task_ID=o.Obj_System_Id)left join task_update u on (t.task_id=u.task_id) where t.Human_ID=? and u.Assigned_to=? group by t.task_id order by md desc
SELECT distinct(Vitals_Group_ID) FROM patient_results p where p.Human_ID=? and Results_Type='Vitals' ORDER BY Modified_Date_And_Time DESC
SELECT v.Patient_Results_ID, v.Encounter_ID, v.Human_ID, v.Physician_ID, v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, v.Created_By,CAST(v.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , v.Modified_By,CAST(v.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , v.Vitals_Group_ID,v.Version, CAST(v.Captured_date_and_time AS char(100)), PERIOD_DIFF(date_format(v.Captured_date_and_time, '%Y%m'),date_format(h.birth_date, '%Y%m')), round(PERIOD_DIFF(date_format(v.Captured_date_and_time, '%Y%m'),date_format(h.birth_date, '%Y%m'))/12), v.Notes FROM patient_results v, Human h WHERE v.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and v.Human_ID=? AND v.Vitals_Group_ID IN (:GroupIdlist) ORDER BY CAST(v.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) DESC
SELECT v.Patient_Results_ID, v.Encounter_ID, v.Human_ID, v.Physician_ID, v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, v.Created_By,CAST(v.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , v.Modified_By,CAST(v.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , v.Vitals_Group_ID,v.Version, CAST(v.Captured_date_and_time AS char(100)), PERIOD_DIFF(date_format(v.Captured_date_and_time, '%Y%m'),date_format(h.birth_date, '%Y%m')), round(PERIOD_DIFF(date_format(v.Captured_date_and_time, '%Y%m'),date_format(h.birth_date, '%Y%m'))/12), v.Notes FROM patient_results v, Human h WHERE v.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and v.Human_ID=? AND v.Vitals_Group_ID IN (:GroupIdlist) and v.value<>'' ORDER BY CAST(v.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) DESC
SELECT count(Patient_Results_ID) FROM patient_results WHERE Human_ID=? and Results_Type='Vitals' ORDER BY CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100))
SELECT w.EHR_Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.EHR_Obj_Sub_Type,w.EHR_Obj_System_Id FROM ehr_wf_object w, Proc_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = 'Unknown') and w.Facility_Name=?
SELECT w.EHR_Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.EHR_Obj_Sub_Type,w.EHR_Obj_System_Id FROM ehr_wf_object w, Proc_User u where w.Current_Process = u.Process_Name and u.user_name=? and (w.current_owner = ?) and w.Facility_Name=?
SELECT icde FROM problem_list p where human_id=?
select s.SCN_ID,s.SCN_Name,s.Parent_SCN_ID,u.Permission,s.Assigned_Physician_Editable,u.User_Name from scn_tab s join user_scn_tab u on s.SCN_ID=u.SCN_ID where u.User_Name=?
select e.Element_Name,e.SCN_ID,e.Element_Type,e.Target_SCN_ID,s.SCN_Name from element e join scn_tab s on s.SCN_ID=e.SCN_ID
SELECT Patient_Account_External FROM human WHERE Patient_Account_External=?
SELECT count(*) FROM coding_feedback c where encounter_id=?
SELECT Coding_Feedback_ID, Encounter_ID, Human_ID, Physician_ID, Issues, Feedback, Created_By, cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), Modified_By, cast(Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), Feedback_Provided_By, Version FROM coding_feedback where Encounter_ID = ? order by Modified_Date_And_Time desc limit ?,?
SELECT * FROM all_icd where (Leaf_Node= 'Y' and Is_Active='Y' and all_icd like ? and (icd_description | icd_synonyms) like ?);
SELECT distinct (Parent_ICD) FROM all_icd where All_ICD= ?
SELECT All_ICD, Parent_ICD, ICD_Description, Leaf_Node, Mutually_Exclusive, HCC_Category FROM all_icd where Parent_ICD=? and Version_Year='ICD_10' order by All_ICD asc
SELECT All_ICD, Associated_ICD, Associated_ICD_Description, Mutually_Exclusive, Leaf_Node, Prefix FROM associated_primary_icd where All_ICD=? and Version_Year='ICD_10' order by Associated_ICD desc
SELECT a.Assessment_Type,a.Primary_Diagnosis,a.Chronic_Problem,a.ICD,a.ICD_Description, a.Assessment_Status,a.Assessment_Notes,a.Assessment_ID,p.Problem_List_ID,a.Version as assessment_version,p.Version as problem_version, b.version as assessment_source_version FROM assessment a LEFT JOIN problem_list p ON (a.Assessment_ID = p.Reference_ID and p.Reference_Source='Assessment') , assessment_source b WHERE a.Encounter_ID = ? and b.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
select a.Primary_Diagnosis,a.Chronic_Problem,a.ICD,a.ICD_Description,a.Assessment_Status,a.Assessment_Notes,a.Assessment_ID, b.Source_For_Diagnosis,cast(b.Date as char(100)),b.Notes,b.Reference_ID,b.Version,b.Assessment_Source_ID as assess_sourceVersion from assessment_source b left join assessment a on a.encounter_id = b.encounter_id and a.assessment_id = b.assessment_id where a.encounter_id = ?
SELECT count(*) FROM med_history where Human_ID=?
SELECT Medication_ID,Drug_Name,Dosage,Frequency,Medication_Notes,From_Date,To_Date,Route_Of_Administration,Version,Is_Medication_Discontinued,Reason_For_Medication_Discontinued FROM med_history where Human_ID = ? order by To_Date desc limit ?,?

select e.Element_Name,e.SCN_ID,e.Element_Type,e.Target_SCN_ID,s.SCN_Name,sc.Style_Name,sc.Font_Family,sc.Em_Size,sc.Color,sc.Font_Style,e.Display_Text from element e join scn_tab s on s.SCN_ID=e.SCN_ID left outer join scn_controls_style sc on e.Scn_Controls_Style_ID =sc.Scn_Controls_Style_ID
select SCN_ID,SCN_Name,Parent_SCN_ID,Is_UBAC_Or_PBAC from scn_tab where Parent_SCN_ID =0

(select not null as FEE49) as FEE49,(select not null as CPT50) as CPT50,(select not null as M50) as M50,(select not null as BM50) as BM50, (select not null as FEE50) as FEE50,w.Current_Process as CurrentProcess from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join pat_insured_plan l on(l.human_id=h.human_id) left join insurance_plan i on(i.insurance_plan_id=l.insurance_plan_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where ( w.Current_Process='BILLING_COMPLETE') and l.active='yes' AND cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)) between ? and ?
SELECT distinct(q.icd) FROM e_m_coding_icd q left join e_m_coding e on (e.encounter_id=q.encounter_id) where e.encounter_id=? and q.icd<>?
select h.human_id, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix),cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from human h, encounter e,physician_library p where h.human_id=e.human_id and p.physician_library_id=e.Encounter_Provider_ID and e.encounter_id=?
SELECT e.human_id FROM encounter e where e.encounter_id=?
select distinct pi.policy_holder_id from pat_insured_plan pi,encounter e,superbill s,insurance_plan i where pi.insurance_plan_id=s.insurance_plan_id and pi.Human_ID=?

l.Policy_Holder_ID AS MEMBERID, e.Place_Of_Service as POS, a.icd as ICD9, cast(current_date as char(100)) as BILLDT, (select not null as AUTH) as AUTH,(select not null as TOTU) as TOTU, (select not null as START) as START,(select not null as STOP) as STOP, (select not null as TIME) as TIME, (SELECT 1 as Qty)as Qty, (select not null as CPT1) as CPT1,(select not null as M1) as M1,(select not null as BM1) as BM1, (select not null as FEE1) as FEE1, (select not null as CPT2) as CPT2,(select not null as M2) as M2,(select not null as BM2) as BM2, (select not null as FEE2) as FEE2, (select not null as CPT3) as CPT3,(select not null as M3) as M3,(select not null as BM3) as BM3, (select not null as FEE3) as FEE3, (select not null as CPT4) as CPT4,(select not null as M4) as M4,(select not null as BM4) as BM4, (select not null as FEE4) as FEE4, (select not null as CPT5) as CPT5,(select not null as M5) as M5,(select not null as BM5) as BM5, (select not null as FEE5) as FEE5, (select not null as CPT6) as CPT6,(select not null as M6) as M6,(select not null as BM6) as BM6, (select not null as FEE6) as FEE6, (select not null as CPT7) as CPT7,(select not null as M7) as M7,(select not null as BM7) as BM7, (select not null as FEE7) as FEE7, (select not null as CPT8) as CPT8,(select not null as M8) as M8,(select not null as BM8) as BM8, (select not null as FEE8) as FEE8, (select not null as CPT9) as CPT9,(select not null as M9) as M9,(select not null as BM9) as BM9, (select not null as FEE9) as FEE9,w.Current_Process as CurrentProcess
from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join pat_insured_plan l on(l.human_id=h.human_id) left join insurance_plan i on(i.insurance_plan_id=l.insurance_plan_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where (w.Current_Process='PROMED_REPORT' or w.Current_Process='BILLING_COMPLETE') and l.active='yes' AND cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)) between ? and ?
select User_Name,Last_Logged_Time,MacAddress from user_session
delete from user_session where User_Name=?
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, CAST(Block_Date AS CHAR(100)),From_Time ,To_Time , Reason, CAST(From_Date_Choosen AS CHAR(100)), CAST(To_Date_Choosen AS CHAR(100)), Day_Choosen, Block_Type FROM block_days b WHERE b.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND b.Facility_Name=? ORDER BY CAST(Block_Date AS CHAR(100))DESC LIMIT ?,?
select a.Batch_ID, a.Batch_Name,sum(c.charge_amount), a.Total_Amount_In_Batch, a.Number_Of_Checks,CAST(a.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(50)), a.Batch_Status from batch a join charge_header b on a.Batch_ID=b.Batch_ID join charge_line_item c on b.charge_header_id=c.charge_header_id where a.batch_name like ? group by a.Batch_ID limit ?,?
select COUNT(*) from batch a join charge_header b on a.Batch_ID=b.Batch_ID join charge_line_item c on b.charge_header_id=c.charge_header_id where a.batch_name like ? group by a.Batch_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM block_days b WHERE b.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND b.Facility_Name=?
select Feedback from coding_feedback where encounter_id=?
DELETE from Acurus.Capella.Core.DomainObjects.TreatmentPlan as TreatmentPlan where TreatmentPlan.Encounter_Id = ?
select e.Examination_ID,e.Condition_Name,CAST(e.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(50)) from Examination e where e.Status != 'Not Examined' and e.Encounter_ID = ?
SELECT e.System_Name as System,e.Condition_Name as Conditions, e.default_value as Status, '' as Comments, e.options as StatusOptions,e.Exam_Lookup_Id as ExamLookupID, ' ',e.Normal_System_Status,0 as ExaminationID,0 as UpdateFlag, 0 as Version, e.Default_Value,e.field_type,e.field_value, '' as CreatedBy, '0001-01-01 00:00:00' as CreatedDateandTime,e.Short_Description,e.Default_System_Color,e.other_description FROM exam_lookup e where e.category=? and e.user_name=? and e.status='Active' order by e.category, e.sort_order
select x.system_name,x.condition_name,x.status,x.examination_notes,x.Examination_ID,0 as UpdateFlag,x.version as Version, x.Created_By,cast(x.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),x.Short_Description from examination x where x.encounter_id=? and x.category=?
Select count(*) from process_user
Select Process_User_ID,Process_Name,User_Name,Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) as cdt from process_user order by Modified_Date_And_Time desc limit ?,?
SELECT Block_Days_ID FROM block_days b WHERE Physician_ID=? AND Facility_Name=? AND Block_Date=? AND (? BETWEEN From_Time AND To_Time OR ? BETWEEN From_Time AND To_Time);
SELECT Block_Type FROM block_days b WHERE Physician_ID=? AND Facility_Name=? AND Block_Date=? AND (? BETWEEN From_Time AND To_Time OR ? BETWEEN From_Time AND To_Time);
SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as AppointmentDate, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ' , p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PhysicianName, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as PatientName,e.Payment_Note,e.Patient_Payment, e.Method_of_Payment,e.Check_Card_No,w.Current_Process,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate FROM encounter e left join human h on(e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join wf_object w on(e.Encounter_ID=w.Obj_System_Id) left join physician_library p on(e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) between ? and ?
SELECT Carrier_ID, Carrier_Name, NAIC_ID, Created_By, CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)), Modified_By, CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),Version FROM carrier ORDER BY Sort_order,CAST(Carrier_Name AS CHAR(100)) LIMIT ?,?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM carrier c;
SELECT Procedure_Code, Procedure_Product_Code, Procedure_Code_Description, Procedure_Contract_ID, Procedure_CMN_Req, Procedure_Type, Created_By, CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)), Modified_By, CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),Version,CVX_Code FROM procedure_code_library ORDER BY CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC LIMIT ?,?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedure_code_library;
btnRunReport_click(it retrieves only Promed_report and make workFlow changes after report generated-->
