(select not null as FEE49) as FEE49,(select not null as CPT50) as CPT50,(select not null as M50) as M50,(select not null as BM50) as BM50, (select not null as FEE50) as FEE50, w.Current_Process as CurrentProcess, concat(z.Physician_Prefix,' ',z.Physician_First_Name,' ', z.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', z.Physician_Last_Name,' ', z.Physician_Suffix)as EncounterProviderReviewName, z.Physician_Qual as REVIEWLICENSE, z.Physician_NPI as REVIEWNPI from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join pat_insured_plan l on(l.human_id=h.human_id) left join insurance_plan i on(i.insurance_plan_id=l.insurance_plan_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join physician_library z on(z.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_Review_ID) left join carrier c on (i.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where c.Carrier_Name like ? and w.Current_Process='PROMED_REPORT' and l.active='yes';
SELECT p.Is_Labs,p.Is_Mammogram,p.Is_PAP,p.Is_DRE,p.Is_Colonoscopy,p.Is_FOBT, p.Treatment_Plan_Notes,p.Referral_Notes,p.Physician_Attestation,l.Physician_First_Name, l.Physician_Last_Name,l.Physician_Middle_Name,p.Referral_Physician_Id,l.Physician_Prefix,l.Physician_Suffix FROM treatment_plan p left join physician_library l on (p.Referral_Physician_Id=l.Physician_Library_ID) where p.Encounter_Id=?;
select 'Patient ID','Patient Name','Provider Name','Facility Name','Date Of Service','Current Process','Current User','Current Arrival Time','Duration in Days','No of Times Previously in Queue'
select h.human_id as PatientID, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, concat(p.Physician_Prefix ,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, w.Facility_name,cast(e.Date_of_service as char(100))as DateofService,w.Current_process as CurrentProcess, w.Current_owner as CurrentOwner,cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100))as Arrival_time,w.obj_system_id,(select count(*) from object_process_history o where (o.wf_object_id=w.obj_system_id and o.Process_Name=w.Current_process and o.Comments='MOVED_TO_NEXT_PROCESS')) as No_Of_Times_Previously_In_Queue
from wf_object w left join encounter e on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (h.human_id=e.human_id) left join physician_library p on (p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) where (w.current_process='PROVIDER_PROCESS' or w.current_process='CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' or w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING' or w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING_2' or w.current_process='PROMED_REPORT' or w.current_process='BILLING_COMPLETE') and w.current_arrival_time between ? and ? order by current_arrival_time
select p.process_name from process_master p join process_user m on p.process_name=m.process_name where m.user_name=? and p.Is_Encounter_Process='Y';
select Problem_List_ID, ICD,Problem_Description,reference_source,Is_Active from problem_list where human_id = ? and Is_Active='Y' group by ICD
select 'Encounter ID','Patient ID','Patient Name','Patient DOB','Facility Name','Provider Name','Date Of Service','ICD','ICD Description','Problem List Category',' ICD Selected by Assigned Physician?'
select e.encounter_id,h.human_id as PatientID, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DOB, w.Facility_name as FacilityName, concat(p.Physician_Prefix ,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as ProviderName from wf_object w left join encounter e on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (h.human_id=e.human_id) left join physician_library p on (p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) where ( w.current_process like ? or w.current_process like ? or w.current_process like ?) and w.current_arrival_time between ? and ? order by w.current_process
select cast(current_date as char(100)) as Date_Of_service,a.icd,a.icd_description , (SELECT 1 as Problem_List_Type)as Problem_List_Category, (SELECT 'Yes' as Icdselectedbyphysician)as Icdselectedbyphysician from assessment a where a.encounter_id=? union select cast(current_date as char(100)) as Date_Of_service,b.icd,b.icd_description, (SELECT 1 as Problem_List_Type)as Problem_List_Category, (SELECT 'No' as Icdselectedbyphysician)as Icdselectedbyphysician from assessment_problem_list_difference b where b.encounter_id=?
select p.Reference_Source FROM problem_list p where p.ICD=? and p.Encounter_ID=?
select p.Reference_Source FROM problem_list p where p.ICD=? and p.human_id=?
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_service as char(100)) FROM encounter e where e.encounter_id=?
SELECT cast(m.Last_Rendering_Service_Date as char(100)) FROM problem_list p left join medadv_problem_list m on(m.MA_Problem_List_ID=p.Reference_ID and m.human_id=p.human_id) where p.human_id=? and p.icd=?
SELECT f.family_history_id,f.human_id,f.RelationShip,f.age,f.Status,f.cause_of_death,d.disease,f.Version,f.Created_By,cast(f.Created_Date_And_Time as char(20)),f.Family_History_Notes FROM family_history f left join family_history_disease d on (f.Family_history_id=d.family_history_id) where f.human_id=? order by f.Modified_Date_And_Time desc limit ?,?
SELECT * FROM raf_demographic_lookup r where r.Gender=? and ? between r.Age_From and r.Age_To
SELECT * FROM raf_model_category r where r.ICD_Code=?
SELECT * FROM raf_hcc_code_and_factors r where r.Disease_Coefficients=?
SELECT concat(all_icd,'!',icd_description) FROM all_icd where all_icd in(:IcdCode)group by concat(all_icd,'!',icd_description)
SELECT count(*) FROM charge_line_item c, account_transaction a WHERE c.Charge_Line_Item_ID=a.Charge_Line_ITem_ID AND a.Human_ID= ? AND a.Source_Type='BILL_TO' AND a.CLAIM_TYPE<>'TRANSFER'
SELECT c.Charge_Line_Item_Id, cast(c.From_DOS as char(100)) as From_DOS, cast(c.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time, c.Rendering_Provider_ID,c.Procedure_Code, c.NDC_Code, c.Charge_Amount, a.Bill_To_PP_Line_Item_ID, c.Appeal_Status,a.Claim_Type, a.Line_Type FROM charge_line_item c, account_transaction a WHERE c.Charge_Line_Item_ID=a.Charge_Line_ITem_ID AND a.Human_ID= ? AND a.Source_Type='BILL_TO' AND a.CLAIM_TYPE<>'TRANSFER' limit ?,?
SELECT sum(Amount) FROM account_transaction WHERE Charge_Line_Item_ID = ? ORDER BY Charge_Line_Item_ID
SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? ORDER BY a.Human_ID
SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? AND a.Claim_Type= 'PATIENT' ORDER BY a.Human_ID
SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? AND a.Claim_Type<> 'PATIENT' AND a.Carrier_ID= 41 ORDER BY a.Human_ID
SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? AND a.Line_Type= 'UNAPPLIED' ORDER BY a.Human_ID
SELECT count(*) FROM physician_library where physician_last_name like ? and physician_first_name like ?
SELECT Physician_Library_ID,Physician_Prefix,Physician_First_Name, Physician_Middle_Name, Physician_Last_Name, Physician_Suffix,Physician_Address1,Physician_City, Physician_State, Physician_Zip,Physician_NPI FROM physician_library where physician_last_name like ? and physician_first_name like ? limit ?,?;
SELECT Lab_ID FROM lab_insurance_plan WHERE Insurance_Plan_ID IN (:InsPlanIDList)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE Encounter_ID=? AND Order_Type=?;
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, null,ifnull(OS.Stat,""),ifnull(OS.Fasting,""), CAST(OS.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""),ifnull(OS.Culture_Location,""),OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,ifnull(W.Current_Process,''),CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),OS.Temperature,OS.Order_Submit_ID,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Unit,""),ifnull(OS.Quantity,0),OS.Version FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object W ON (O.Order_Submit_ID=W.Obj_System_ID and OS.Order_Type=W.Obj_Type) WHERE O.Encounter_ID=? AND OS.Order_Type=? ORDER BY CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, null,ifnull(OS.Stat,""),ifnull(OS.Fasting,""), CAST(OS.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""),ifnull(OS.Culture_Location,""),OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,ifnull(W.Current_Process,''),CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),OS.Temperature,OS.Order_Submit_ID,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Unit,""),ifnull(OS.Quantity,0),OS.Version FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object W ON (O.Order_Submit_ID=W.Obj_System_ID and OS.Order_Type=W.Obj_Type) WHERE O.CMG_Encounter_ID=? ORDER BY CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC
SELECT OA.Order_Assessment_ID, OA.Order_ID, OA.Source_ID, OA.ICD, OA.ICD_Description, OA.Created_By, CAST(OA.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Modified_By, CAST(OA.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Version,OA.Encounter_ID,OA.Source FROM orders_assessment OA WHERE OA.Order_ID IN (:OrderIDList)
DELETE FROM orders_assessment WHERE Order_ID=?

AND P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?) OR (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? and P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?)) AND (if ((?!='%'),(S.Specialty LIKE ? AND P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND M.Facility_Name like ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?),(P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND M.Facility_Name like ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?))) ;

AND P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?) OR (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? and P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?)) AND (if((?!='%'),(S.Specialty LIKE ? AND P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND M.Facility_Name like ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?),(P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND M.Facility_Name like ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?))) LIMIT ?,?;

AND P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?) OR (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? and P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?)) AND (if((?!='%'),s.Specialty LIKE ? AND P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?)));
SELECT P.Physician_Library_ID,P.Physician_Prefix,P.Physician_First_Name, P.Physician_Middle_Name,P.Physician_Last_Name,P.Physician_Suffix, S.Specialty,P.Physician_City,P.Physician_State, P.Physician_Zip,P.Physician_NPI,S.physician_specialty_id,M.Facility_Name,P.Physician_Fax,P.Physician_Address1,P.Physician_Telephone FROM `physician_library` P LEFT JOIN map_facility_physician M ON (P.Physician_Library_ID=M.Physician_ID) left join physician_specialty s on (p.Physician_Library_ID=s.Physician_ID) WHERE ((P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? AND P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?) OR (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? and P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ?)) AND (if((?!='%'),S.Specialty LIKE ? AND P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?,(P.Physician_NPI LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Address1 LIKE ? AND P.Physician_City LIKE ? AND P.Physician_State LIKE ? AND P.Physician_Zip LIKE ?))) LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT OA.Referral_Order_Assessment_ID, OA.Referral_Order_ID, OA.Assessment_ID, OA.ICD, OA.Assessment_Description, OA.Created_By, CAST(OA.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Modified_By, CAST(OA.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Version FROM referral_orders_assessment OA WHERE OA.Referral_Order_ID IN (:ReferralOrderIDList)
DELETE FROM referral_orders_assessment WHERE Referral_Order_ID=?
SELECT all_icd,icd_description from all_icd where all_icd like ? and icd_description like ? limit ?,?
SELECT Count(*) from all_icd where all_icd like ? and icd_description like ?
SELECT Procedure_Code,Procedure_Description from procedure_code_library where Procedure_Code like ? and Procedure_Description like ? limit ?,?
SELECT Count(*) from procedure_code_library where Procedure_Code like ? and Procedure_Description like ?
select 'BATCH NAME','FROM DOS','PROVIDER NAME','PRIMARY PAYER NAME', 'PATIENT ID','PATIENT NAME', 'DATE OF BIRTH','PROCEDURE CODE','CHARGE AMOUNT','CHARGE LINE ITEM ID','CREATED DATE AND TIME', 'MODIFIED DATE AND TIME','STATUS'
select ifnull(e.Batch_Name,'') as BATCHNAME, ifnull(cast(B.From_DOS as char(100)),'') AS FROMDOS, ifnull(concat(d.Physician_Prefix ,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ', d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix),'') as PROVIDERNAME, ifnull(B.Primary_Payer_Name,'') AS PRIMARY_PAYER_NAME, A.Human_ID AS PATIENT_ID, ifnull(concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),'') as PATIENT_NAME, ifnull(cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)),'') AS DATE_OF_BIRTH, ifnull(B.Procedure_Code,'') AS PROCEDURE_CODE, B.Charge_Amount AS CHARGE_AMOUNT, B.Charge_line_item_id AS CHARGE_LINE_ITEM_ID, ifnull(cast(b.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),'') AS CREATED_DATE_AND_TIME, ifnull(cast(b.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),'') AS MODIFIED_DATE_AND_TIME, ifnull(b.Status,'')AS STATUS from charge_line_item b left join charge_header a on (A.charge_header_id=b.charge_header_id) left join Human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id)
left join batch e on (a.Batch_ID=e.Batch_ID) left join physician_library d on (b.rendering_provider_id=d.Physician_library_id ) WHERE A.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ?
select 'Appointment Date ','Facility Name','Scheduled','Cancelled','NoShow', 'Rescheduled','Walked Away','MA_PROCESS', 'PROVIDER_REVIEW','PROVIDER_PROCESS','PROMED_REPORT','REVIEW_CODING','REVIEW_CODING_2','BILLING_COMPLETE','CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION'
select appointmentDate,fac_name, sum( case current when 'SCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'SCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'CANCELLED' then data else 0 end)as 'CANCELLED', sum( case current when 'NO_SHOW' then data else 0 end)as 'NO_SHOW', sum( case current when 'RESCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'RESCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'WALKED_AWAY' then data else 0 end)as 'WALKED_AWAY', sum( case current when 'MA_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'MA_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_REVIEW' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_REVIEW', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROMED_REPORT' then data else 0 end)as 'PROMED_REPORT', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING_2' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING_2', sum( case current when 'BILLING_COMPLETE' then data else 0 end)as 'BILLING_COMPLETE', sum( case current when 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' then data else 0 end)as 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' from (SELECT date_format(e.appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s') appointmentDate,e.Facility_Name as fac_name,w.current_process as Current,count(*) data FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id and (w.obj_type='Encounter' or w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION')) left join human h on(e.human_id=h.human_id) where (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ) and h.account_status='active' group by appointmentDate,w.current_process,e.Facility_Name ) as result group by appointmentDate,fac_name
select 'BATCH NAME','FROM DOS', 'PROVIDER NAME' ,'PRIMARY PAYER NAME','PATIENT ID','PATIENT NAME','DATE OF BIRTH','PROCEDURE CODE','CHARGE AMOUNT', 'CLAIM TYPE','LINE TYPE','AMOUNT','CHARGE LINE ITEM ID','CREATED DATE AND TIME ', 'TOTAL AMOUNT IN BATCH','DEPOSIT DATE'
select ifnull(a.Batch_Name,'') as BatchName, ifnull(cast(c.From_DOS as char(100)),'') AS FROMDOS, ifnull(concat(d.Physician_Prefix ,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ', d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix),'') as PROVIDERNAME, ifnull(c.Primary_Payer_Name,'') as PrimaryPayerName, h.Human_ID AS PATIENT_ID, ifnull(concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),'') as PATIENT_NAME, ifnull(cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)),'') AS DATE_OF_BIRTH, ifnull(c.Procedure_Code,'') as Procedurecode, c.Charge_Amount as Charge_Amount, ifnull(a.Claim_Type,'') as ClaimType, ifnull(a.Line_Type,'') as LineType, a.Amount as Amount, ifnull(c.Charge_Line_Item_Id,'') as ChargeLineItemid, ifnull(cast(A.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),'') AS CREATED_DATE_AND_TIME, ifnull(p.Total_Amount_in_Batch,'') as TotalAmountInBatch, ifnull(cast(a.Deposit_Date as char(100)),'') as DepositDate from account_transaction a left join Charge_Line_Item C on (a.charge_line_item_id=c.charge_line_item_id) left join Human H on (a.human_id=h.Human_ID) left join physician_library d on (c.rendering_provider_id=d.Physician_library_id) left join batch p on (a.Batch_Id=p.Batch_Id) WHERE A.Deposit_Date between ? and ? and a.Source_Type<>'bill_to'
SELECT S.Superbill_ID,S.Enounter_ID,S.Human_ID,S.Physician_ID,CAST(E.Date_of_Service AS CHAR(100)) AS DOS, CONCAT(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ',P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix), CONCAT(H.Prefix,' ',H.First_Name,' ',H.MI,' ',H.Last_Name,' ',H.Suffix) FROM superbill S LEFT JOIN encounter E ON (S.Enounter_ID=E.Encounter_ID) LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON(S.Physician_ID=P.Physician_Library_ID) LEFT JOIN human H ON (S.Human_ID=H.Human_ID) WHERE S.Superbill_ID LIKE ? AND CAST(E.Date_of_Service AS CHAR(100)) LIKE ? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT w.Facility_name, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'.',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) as PhyName,w.obj_type,w.current_process, concat(h.Prefix,' ',h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI,' ',h.Suffix),h.Human_id,Cast(e.date_of_service as char(20)),e.Encounter_id,p.Physician_library_id FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_System_id=e.Encounter_id) left join Human h on (e.Human_id=h.Human_id) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_library_id) where w.facility_name like ? and w.obj_type like ? And e.Encounter_Provider_ID like ? and w.current_Process like ? and e.human_Id like ? and cast(date_format(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') as char(20)) between ? and ? order by w.Current_Arrival_Time Desc
SELECT w.Facility_name, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'.',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) as PhyName, w.obj_type,w.current_process,concat(h.Prefix,' ',h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI,' ',h.Suffix),o.Human_id,Cast(o.order_date as char(20)), o.Encounter_id,p.Physician_library_id,a.location_name,l.lab_name,concat(o.lab_procedure,' - ',o.lab_procedure_description), cast(o.test_date as char(20)) FROM wf_object w left join orders o on (w.obj_System_id=o.Order_ID) left join Human h on (o.Human_id=h.Human_id) left join physician_library p on (o.Physician_ID=p.Physician_library_id) left join lab l on (o.Lab_Id=l.Lab_ID) Left join Lab_Location a on (o.Lab_location_id=a.Lab_Location_id) where w.facility_name like ? and w.obj_type like ? And o.Physician_ID like ? and w.current_Process like ? and h.human_Id like ? and cast(date_format(o.order_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as char(20)) between ? and ? order by o.Modified_Date_And_Time Desc;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superbill S LEFT JOIN encounter E ON (S.Enounter_ID=E.Encounter_ID) LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON(S.Physician_ID=P.Physician_Library_ID) LEFT JOIN human H ON (S.Human_ID=H.Human_ID) WHERE S.Superbill_ID LIKE ? AND CAST(E.Date_of_Service AS CHAR(100)) LIKE ?;
SELECT Procedure_Code,Procedure_Code_Description,ICD FROM `icd_procedure`WHERE ICD IN (:ICDCodeList) AND Procedure_Type=:procedureType
SELECT order_type,order_plan FROM orders where encounter_id=?
select DATEDIFF(sysdate(),cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100))) as Duration from wf_object w WHERE w.obj_system_id= ? and w.current_process=?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM in_house_procedure WHERE Encounter_ID=?
SELECT In_House_Procedure_ID, Encounter_ID, Human_ID, Physician_ID, Procedure_Code, Procedure_Code_Description, Notes, Created_By, CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)), Modified_By, CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)), Version,Authorization_Required FROM `in_house_procedure` WHERE Encounter_ID=? ORDER BY Modified_Date_And_Time DESC;
SELECT CONCAT(Procedure_Code,'-',Procedure_Code_Description) FROM in_house_procedure WHERE Encounter_ID=?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rx_order WHERE Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT R.Rx_Order_ID, R.Encounter_ID, R.Human_ID, R.Physician_ID, R.Drug_Name, R.Strength, R.Dispense, R.Generic, R.Formulary, R.Dose, R.Unit, R.Frequency, R.Days_supply, CAST(R.Start_Date AS char(100)), R.Is_Refills, R.Number_Of_Refills, R.Number_Per_Refills, R.Order_Type, R.Lot_Number, CAST(R.Expiry_Date AS char(100)), R.Pharmacy_ID, R.Pharmacy_Location_ID, R.Notes, R.Created_By, CAST(R.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),R.Modified_By, CAST(R.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), R.Version, P.Pharmacy_Name,PL.City,R.Authorization_Required,R.Route_Of_Administration FROM rx_order R LEFT JOIN pharmacy P ON (R.Pharmacy_ID=P.Pharmacy_ID) LEFT JOIN pharmacy_location PL ON (R.Pharmacy_Location_ID=PL.Pharmacy_Location_ID) WHERE R.Encounter_ID=? ORDER BY CAST(R.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC;
SELECT OA.Rx_Order_Assessment_ID, OA.Rx_Order_ID, OA.Source_ID, OA.ICD, OA.ICD_Description, OA.Created_By, CAST(OA.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Modified_By, CAST(OA.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Version,OA.Source FROM rx_order_assessment OA WHERE OA.Rx_Order_ID IN (:OrderIDList);
DELETE FROM rx_order_assessment WHERE Rx_Order_ID=?
SELECT Parent_ICD FROM `all_icd` WHERE All_ICD IN (:ICDList);
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, O.Lab_Location_ID, O.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, O.Authorization_Required, CAST(O.Test_Date AS char(100)), O.Order_Notes, O.Specimen_In_House, O.Stat, O.Fasting, CAST(O.Order_Date AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, O.Order_Type,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,O.Specimen_ID,O.Is_In_House,O.Facility_Name,O.Order_Code, O.Order_Code_Name FROM orders O LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) WHERE O.Encounter_ID=? AND O.Order_Type=? ORDER BY CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100))
select O.Order_ID, S.Specimen_ID, S.Specimen_Type, S.Quantity, S.Specimen_Unit, S.Created_By, CAST(S.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), S.Modified_By, CAST(S.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), S.Version from orders o join specimen S on o.Specimen_id=S.Specimen_id where O.Encounter_id=?
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.Person_Name,OS.Lab_Name,OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), OS.Encounter_ID,OS.Physician_ID,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id, cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,fmn.file_management_index_id,w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date,c.is_narrative_interpretation from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (O.Order_submit_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join human H on H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID left join User p on OS.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join scan_index_conversion c on (c.Order_ID = os.Order_submit_id) left join file_management_index fmn on (c.scan_index_conversion_id=fmn.scan_index_conversion_id) where w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name, OS.Lab_Name, OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), OS.Encounter_ID,OS.Physician_ID,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id, cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,fmn.file_management_index_id,w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date,c.is_narrative_interpretation from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (O.Order_submit_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join human H on H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID left join user p on OS.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join scan_index_conversion c on (c.Order_ID = os.Order_submit_id) left join file_management_index fmn on (c.scan_index_conversion_id=fmn.scan_index_conversion_id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.Person_Name,OS.Lab_Name, OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,Os.Lab_ID,Os.Lab_Location_ID,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process, w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id,cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,fmn.file_management_index_id,w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (OS.Order_submit_id=O.Order_submit_id) left join human H on OS.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join scan_index_conversion c on (c.Order_ID = os.Order_submit_id) left join file_management_index fmn on (c.scan_index_conversion_id=fmn.scan_index_conversion_id) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name, OS.Lab_Name, OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,Os.Lab_ID,Os.Lab_Location_ID,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id, cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,fmn.file_management_index_id,w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date,c.is_narrative_interpretation from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (OS.Order_submit_id=O.Order_submit_id) left join human H on OS.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join scan_index_conversion c on (c.Order_ID = os.Order_submit_id) left join file_management_index fmn on (c.scan_index_conversion_id=fmn.scan_index_conversion_id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT OA.Order_Problem_List_ID, OA.Order_ID, OA.Problem_List_ID,OA.Encounter_ID, OA.ICD, OA.ICD_Description, OA.Created_By, CAST(OA.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Modified_By, CAST(OA.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), OA.Version FROM orders_problem_list OA WHERE OA.Order_ID IN (:OrderIDList)
DELETE FROM orders_problem_list WHERE Order_ID=?
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, OS.Specimen_In_House,ifnull(OS.Stat,""), ifnull(OS.Fasting,""), CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""),ifnull(OS.Culture_Location,""),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,OS.Temperature,CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),CAST(OS.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),CAST(OS.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),os.Quantity,os.specimen_unit FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) WHERE O.Order_Submit_ID=? AND OS.Order_Type=? ORDER BY CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, OS.Specimen_In_House, OS.Stat, OS.Fasting, CAST(OS.Order_Date AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,OS.Specimen_type,OS.Culture_Location,OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) WHERE O.Order_ID IN (:IDList);
SELECT O.Order_Code,O.Order_Code_Name,O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, O.Lab_Location_ID, O.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, O.Authorization_Required,CAST(O.Test_Date AS char(100)), O.Order_Notes, O.Specimen_In_House, O.Stat, O.Fasting, CAST(O.Order_Date AS char(100)),O.Specimen_ID,O.Is_In_House,O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, O.Order_Type,L.Lab_ID,L.Lab_Name, LL.Lab_Location_ID,LL.Location_Name,LL.Lab_ID from orders O LEFT JOIN wf_object w ON (O.Order_ID = w.Obj_System_Id) LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) where w.current_process ='Result_Process';

ifnull(OBX.NAME_OF_CODING_SYSTEM_1,''),ifnull(OBX.NAME_OF_ALTERNATE_CODING_SYSTEM,''),ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_ID, ifnull(ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME,''),ifnull(ORC.ORDER_CONTROL,''),ifnull(ORC.SPECIMEN_ID,''),ifnull(ORC.INSTITUITION_ID,''), ifnull(ORC.SOURCE_TABLE,''),ifnull(ORC.CALL_BACK_PHONE,''),PID.LABCORP_RESULT_ID,ifnull(PID.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME,''), ifnull(PID.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,''),ifnull(PID.EXTERNAL_PATIENT_ID,''),ifnull(PID.LAB_ASSIGNED_PATIENT_ID,''), ifnull(PID.ALTERNATE_PATIENT_ID,''),ifnull(PID.PATIENT_LAST_NAME,''),ifnull(PID.PATIENT_FIRST_NAME,''), ifnull(PID.PATIENT_CITY,''),ifnull(PID.PATIENT_STATE,''),ifnull(PID.PATIENT_ZIP,''),ifnull(PID.LAB_CORP_CLIENT_ID,''), ifnull(PID.BILL_CODE,''),ifnull(PID.SPECIMEN_STATUS,''),ifnull(PID.FASTING,''),ifnull(PID.PATIENT_SSN_NUMBER,''), ZPS.LABCORP_RESULT_ID,ifnull(ZPS.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME,''),ifnull(ZPS.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,''), ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_MNEMONIC,''),ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_NAME,''),ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_ADDRESS,''),ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_CITY,''), ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_STATE,''),ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_ZIP,''),ifnull(ZPS.FACILITY_PHONE_NUMBER,''),
