(ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME = PID.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME) LEFT JOIN LABCORP_RESULT_OBR OBR ON (ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME = OBR.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME) LEFT JOIN LABCORP_RESULT_OBX OBX ON (ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME = OBX.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME) LEFT JOIN LABCORP_RESULT_ZPS ZPS ON (ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME = ZPS.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME) LEFT JOIN LABCORP_RESULT_MSH MSH ON (ORC.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME = MSH.LABCORP_RESULT_FILE_NAME) WHERE PID.EXTERNAL_PATIENT_ID = ? AND OBR.OBSERVATION_BATTERY_IDENTIFIER = ? OR OBX.OBSERVATION_IDENTIFIER = ?;
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, OS.Specimen_In_House,ifnull(OS.Stat,""), ifnull(OS.Fasting,""), CAST(OS.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""),ifnull(OS.Culture_Location,""),OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,W.current_Process,CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),OS.Temperature,OS.Order_Submit_ID,OS.Version FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object W ON(O.Order_ID=W.obj_system_id AND OS.Order_Type=W.obj_type) WHERE O.Human_ID=? AND O.Created_Date_And_Time LIKE ? AND OS.Order_Type=? AND O.Encounter_ID=? AND O.Physician_ID=? ORDER BY CAST(if(O.Modified_Date_And_Time<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00',O.Modified_Date_And_Time,O.Created_date_and_time) AS CHAR(100)) DESC
SELECT R.Rx_Order_ID, R.Encounter_ID, R.Human_ID, R.Physician_ID, R.Drug_Name, R.Strength, R.Dispense, R.Generic, R.Formulary, R.Dose, R.Unit, R.Frequency, R.Days_supply, CAST(R.Start_Date AS char(100)), R.Is_Refills, R.Number_Of_Refills, R.Number_Per_Refills, R.Order_Type, R.Lot_Number, CAST(R.Expiry_Date AS char(100)), R.Pharmacy_ID, R.Pharmacy_Location_ID, R.Notes, R.Created_By, CAST(R.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),R.Modified_By, CAST(R.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), R.Version, P.Pharmacy_Name,PL.City,Authorization_Required FROM rx_order R LEFT JOIN pharmacy P ON (R.Pharmacy_ID=P.Pharmacy_ID) LEFT JOIN pharmacy_location PL ON (R.Pharmacy_Location_ID=PL.Pharmacy_Location_ID) WHERE R.Human_ID=? AND R.Created_Date_And_Time LIKE ?
SELECT Immunization_Id,Human_ID,Physician_Id,Encounter_Id,Procedure_Code,Immunization_Description,cast(Visit_Date as char(100)) as Visit_Date,CVX_Code,Dose, Dose_No,Given_By,cast(Given_Date as char(100)) as Given_date,Location,Lot_Number,Manufacturer, cast(Date_on_Vis as char(100)) as Date_on_Visit,cast(Vis_Given_Date as char(100)) as Visit_Given_Date, cast(Expiry_Date as char(100)) as Expiry_Date,Route_of_Administration,Notes,Vfc,Immunization_Source, Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , Modified_By,CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) ,Version,Is_VIS_Given,Authorization_Required FROM immunization where Human_ID = ? and Created_Date_And_Time like ?
SELECT (select f.value from care_plan_lookup f where c.parent_care_plan_id=f.care_plan_lookup_id) as Care_Plan, c.value as Care_Plan_Value,c.options,p.Status as Status, p.Care_plan_notes as Care_plan_notes,p.Created_by as Created_by,cast(p.Created_date_and_time as char(100))as Created_date_and_time,c.Care_Plan_Lookup_ID,p.Care_Plan_ID as Plan_ID, p.Version as Version,c.Controls,p.Plan_Date as Plan_Date,p.Status_Value as Status_Value,c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID as Measure_ID ,m.rule_description as Rule_Description, c.control_name as Control_Name,m.Additional_Rule as Additional_Rule, m.Parent_Rule_ID as Parent_Rule_ID,p.Modified_By as Modified_By, cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100))as Modified_Date_And_Time,p.Snomed_Code FROM care_plan_lookup c left join measures_rule_master m on (m.Measures_Rule_ID=c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID) left join care_plan p on c.care_plan_lookup_id=p.care_plan_lookup_id and p.Encounter_ID= ? where c.field_name=? and ? between c.From_Age and c.To_Age and c.Gender in (:gender) and c.status='Active' order by Parent_Care_Plan_ID,sort_order,Rule_Description desc;
SELECT (select f.value from care_plan_lookup f where c.parent_care_plan_id=f.care_plan_lookup_id) as Care_Plan, c.value as Care_Plan_Value,c.options,ifnull(p.Status,'') as Status, ifnull(p.Care_plan_notes,'') as Care_plan_notes,ifnull(p.Created_by,'') as Created_by, ifnull(cast(p.Created_date_and_time as char(100)) ,now())as Created_date_and_time, c.Care_Plan_Lookup_ID,ifnull(p.Care_Plan_ID,0) as Plan_ID, ifnull(p.Version,0) as Version,ifnull(c.Controls,''),ifnull(p.Plan_Date,'') as Plan_Date, ifnull(p.Status_Value,'') as Status_Value, ifnull(c.control_name,'') as Control_Name, ifnull(c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID,0) as Measure_ID
FROM care_plan_lookup c left join measures_rule_master m on (m.Measures_Rule_ID=c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID) left join care_plan p on c.care_plan_lookup_id=p.care_plan_lookup_id and p.Encounter_ID= ? where c.field_name='Care_Name_Value' and ? between c.From_Age and c.To_Age and c.Gender in (:Gender) and c.status='Active' order by Parent_Care_Plan_ID,sort_order,Rule_Description desc; ;
SELECT (select f.value from care_plan_lookup f where c.parent_care_plan_id=f.care_plan_lookup_id) as Care_Plan, c.value as Care_Plan_Value,c.options,ifnull(p.Status,'') as Status, ifnull(p.Care_plan_notes,'') as Care_plan_notes,ifnull(p.Created_by,'') as Created_by, ifnull(cast(p.Created_date_and_time as char(100)) ,now())as Created_date_and_time, c.Care_Plan_Lookup_ID,ifnull(p.Care_Plan_ID,0) as Plan_ID, ifnull(p.Version,0) as Version,ifnull(c.Controls,''),ifnull(p.Plan_Date,'') as Plan_Date, ifnull(p.Status_Value,'') as Status_Value, ifnull(c.control_name,'') as Control_Name, ifnull(c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID,0) as Measure_ID
FROM care_plan_lookup c left join measures_rule_master m on (m.Measures_Rule_ID=c.Measure_Rule_Master_ID) left join care_plan_arc p on c.care_plan_lookup_id=p.care_plan_lookup_id and p.Encounter_ID= ? where c.field_name='Care_Name_Value' and ? between c.From_Age and c.To_Age and c.Gender in (:Gender) and c.status='Active' order by Parent_Care_Plan_ID,sort_order,Rule_Description desc;
select 0 as Preventive_Screening_ID,(select f.value from preventive_screening_lookup f where p.Parent_Preventive_Screening_Lookup_ID=f.Preventive_Screening_Lookup_ID) as Preventive_Service,p.Value as Preventive_Service_Value,p.Options,'' as Status,'' as Preventive_Screening_Notes,'' as Created_By, '0001-01-01 00:00:00' as Created_Date_And_Time,p.Preventive_Screening_Lookup_ID,0 as Version, p.Depending_Value,p.Description from preventive_screening_lookup p where p.field_name=? and p.Status='Active';
SELECT P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_ID, P.PREVENTIVE_SERVICE, P.PREVENTIVE_SERVICE_VALUE, L.OPTIONS, P.STATUS, P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_NOTES, P.CREATED_BY, CAST(P.CREATED_DATE_AND_TIME AS CHAR(20)), P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID, P.VERSION, L.DEPENDING_VALUE, L.DESCRIPTION FROM PREVENTIVE_SCREENING P LEFT JOIN PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP L ON ( P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID = L.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID ) WHERE ( P.ENCOUNTER_ID = :ENCOUNTER_ID )
SELECT P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_ID, P.PREVENTIVE_SERVICE, P.PREVENTIVE_SERVICE_VALUE, L.OPTIONS, P.STATUS, P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_NOTES, P.CREATED_BY, CAST(P.CREATED_DATE_AND_TIME AS CHAR(20)), P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID, P.VERSION, L.DEPENDING_VALUE, L.DESCRIPTION FROM PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_ARC P LEFT JOIN PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP L ON ( P.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID = L.PREVENTIVE_SCREENING_LOOKUP_ID ) WHERE ( P.ENCOUNTER_ID = :ENCOUNTER_ID )
SELECT procedure_code FROM `e_m_coding` where encounter_id=?
SELECT e.charge_amount,e.modifier1 FROM `e_m_coding` e where e.encounter_id=?
SELECT e.Procedure_code,e.charge_amount,e.modifier1 FROM `e_m_coding` e where e.encounter_id=? order by e.Procedure_code desc
SELECT p.Physician_Patient_ID,p.Physician_Name,p.Human_ID,p.Relationship,p.Phone_No,p.Created_By,cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Cdt,p.Modified_By,cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Mdt,p.Version,p.Encounter_ID FROM physician_patient p where p.Human_ID=? and p.Encounter_ID=? ORDER BY Mdt DESC limit ?,?
SELECT w.wf_object_id,p.doos,p.batch_name,w.demos_enc_ppline_rcvd,p.Doc_name, w.current_process ,p.Workset_Proc_Alloc_ID from wf_object_billing w,WorkSet_Proc_Alloc P WHERE W.Doc_Type = ? And W.Doc_Sub_Type = ? And W.Obj_Type='WORKSET' And W.Obj_Type<>'CHARGE_LINE_ITEM' AND W.Current_Process=P.Process_Name And P.Batch_Name = W.Batch_Name And P.sub_batch_range = W.sub_batch_range And P.Process_Name = ? And P.Allocated_To = ? And P.DOOS like ? ORDER BY P.DOOS, P.Batch_Name, P.doc_name, P.Allocated_To
SELECT 'Patient A/C No ' ,'Patient Name','Patient DOB','Phone No','Appointment Phy Name ','Appointment Created Date','Appointment Date','Appointment Time','Transportation note','Comments','Current Process'
select (h.Human_Id) as PATIENT_AC ,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as PATIENT_NAME,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DATE_OF_BIRTH,h.Home_Phone_No as PHONE_NO, concat( d.Physician_Prefix,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ',d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix) as PHYSICIAN_NAME, cast(e.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as CREADTED_DATE, cast(DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s ') as char(100)) as APPOINMENT_DATE,group_concat(distinct(p.Message_Description) separator ',')as notes, group_concat(distinct(p.Notes) separator ',') AS COMMENTS,w.Current_Process as CURRENT_PROCESS FROM wf_object w LEFT JOIN encounter e on (e.encounter_id =w.obj_system_id) left join human H on(e.human_id=h.Human_Id) left join Physician_Library d on (d.Physician_Library_ID=e.Appointment_Provider_ID) left join patient_notes p on(p.Human_Id=h.Human_Id) where (e.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ?) and w.Obj_Type= 'Encounter' group by e.encounter_id order by e.Created_Date_And_Time
SELECT count(*) FROM e_m_coding where encounter_id=? and modifier2<>''
select concat(h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as MEMBERNAME, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DOB, h.human_id as ACCOUNT, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as FROMDT, m.procedure_code,m.modifier1,m.modifier2,m.modifier3,m.modifier4 from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on (m.encounter_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where w.Current_Process='PROMED_REPORT'and m.modifier2<>''
select 'MEMBER NAME','DOB','ACCOUNT','PROVIDER NAME','DOS','CPT1','M1','M2','M3','M4','COMMENTS'
select concat(h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as MEMBERNAME, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DOB, h.human_id as ACCOUNT, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as FROMDT, m.procedure_code,m.modifier1,m.modifier2,m.modifier3,m.modifier4 from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on (m.encounter_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where ( w.Current_Process='BILLING_COMPLETE') AND cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)) between ? and ? and m.modifier2<>''
select concat(h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as MEMBERNAME, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DOB, h.human_id as ACCOUNT, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as FROMDT, m.procedure_code,m.modifier1,m.modifier2,m.modifier3,m.modifier4 from wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on (m.encounter_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join assessment a on(a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.Encounter_id=e.Encounter_ID ) where (w.Current_Process='PROMED_REPORT' or w.Current_Process='BILLING_COMPLETE') AND cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)) between ? and ? and m.modifier2<>''
select concat(h.Last_Name,' ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as MEMBERNAME, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DOB, h.human_id as ACCOUNT, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as Dos, (select not null as procedure_code) as procedure_code, (select not null as modifier1) as modifier1, (select not null as modifier2) as modifier2, (select not null as modifier3) as modifier3, (select not null as modifier4) as modifier4, (select not null as Comments) as Comments from encounter e left join human h on (h.human_id=e.human_id) left join physician_library p on(p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) where e.encounter_id=?
SELECT i.icd FROM e_m_coding_icd i left join e_m_coding e on (e.encounter_id=i.encounter_id) where e.encounter_id=? and e.procedure_code=? and i.icd_category='Primary';
SELECT count(*) FROM immunization_History where Human_ID = ?
SELECT Immunization_History_Id,Human_ID,Physician_ID,Procedure_Code,Immunization_Description,Dose, Dose_No,cast(Date_On_Vis as char(100)) as Date_on_Visit,cast(Vis_Given_Date as char(100)) as Vis_Given_Date,Location,Lot_Number,Manufacturer, cast(Expiry_Date as char(100)) as Expiry_Date,Route_Of_Administration,Notes,Immunization_Source,Is_VIS_Given, Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , Modified_By,CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) ,CVX_Code,Version,Administered_Date,Protection_State FROM immunization_History where Human_ID =? order by Modified_Date_And_Time desc limit ?,?
SELECT 'Measure Name','Measure in Detail','Numerator','Denominator','Percentage','Percentage','Cleared'
(SELECT distinct(p.Human_Id) hi FROM problem_list p where human_id in (HumanID))
select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m;
SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h where human_id in (:HumanID) and h.Birth_Date <> "" and Race <> "" and h.Ethnicity <> "" and h.Sex <> "" and h.Preferred_Language <> ""
select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
Select distinct p.human_id from Patient_results p, human h where encounter_id in(SELECT e.encounter_id FROM encounter e , patient_results p where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and p.human_id = e.human_id and (p.Loinc_Observation='Height' and p.value!='')) and p.human_id = h.human_id and ((Loinc_Observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' and value!='') or(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) <3)) group by p.human_Id;
select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.encounter_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? ) as m;
SELECT distinct(h.human_id) FROM human h ,social_history s where h.human_id = s.human_id and s.Social_Info='Smoking Habit' and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date))))>? and s.human_id in(:HumanID);
select hi from ( SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >? union SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >?
) as m ;
select distinct(e.human_Id) from encounter e ,document d where e.Encounter_ID=d.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and d.Document_Type not in('wellness note','clinical summary' ,'progress note','consultation note','Clinical Summary - Declined','Clinical Summary - Portal','') group by d.human_Id union select distinct(e.human_Id) from encounter_arc e ,document_arc d where e.Encounter_ID=d.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and d.Document_Type not in('wellness note','clinical summary' ,'progress note','consultation note','Clinical Summary - Declined','Clinical Summary - Portal','') group by d.human_Id;
select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ? and Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' group by human_id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ? and Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' group by human_id ) as m
Select o.human_id from result_master r, orders_submit o,lab l, result_obx ro where r.result_master_id=ro.result_master_id and (ro.obx_observation_value ='positive'or ro.obx_observation_value='negative' or ro.obx_observation_value REGEXP '^(-|\\+){0,1}([0-9]+\\.[0-9]*|[0-9]*\\:[0-9]+|[0-9]+)$' ) and o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and r.order_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='lab' and o.Physician_id =? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by o.human_id
select hi from (select (o.human_id)hi from orders_submit o,lab l where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and l.Lab_Type='lab' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ?) as m
SELECT distinct(m.Human_Id) hi FROM rcopia_medication m where m.human_id in (:HumanID)
select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m
SELECT distinct(a.Human_Id) hi FROM rcopia_allergy a where a.human_ID in(:HumanID)
select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m
select hi from (SELECT Rcopia_ID,(Human_ID) hi FROM rcopia_prescription where created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and Deleted='N') as m
select hi from (SELECT Rcopia_ID,(Human_ID) hi FROM rcopia_prescription where created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and Deleted='N') as m
select distinct e.human_id from rcopia_prescription p, encounter e, rcopia_medication m where e.human_id=m.human_id and e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and p.created_by=? and p.deleted='n' group by e.human_id union select distinct e.human_id from rcopia_prescription p, encounter_arc e, rcopia_medication m where e.human_id=m.human_id and e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and p.created_by=? and p.deleted='n' group by e.human_id;
select distinct (e.human_id) from encounter e, rcopia_medication m where e.human_id=m.human_id and deleted='n' and encounter_provider_id=? and date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.human_id union select distinct (e.human_id) from encounter_arc e, rcopia_medication m where e.human_id=m.human_id and deleted='n' and encounter_provider_id=? and date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.human_id;
SELECT human_id,No_of_Med_Orders_In_Paper FROM encounter where No_of_Med_Orders_In_Paper!=0 and Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ? union SELECT human_id,No_of_Med_Orders_In_Paper FROM encounter_arc where No_of_Med_Orders_In_Paper!=0 and Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?
select d.human_id from document d,encounter e where d.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID and d.Document_Type in('Clinical Summary','Clinical Summary - Declined','Clinical Summary - Portal') and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_service between ? and ? and DATEDIFF(d.Given_Date,e.Date_of_Service) <=1 union select d.human_id from document_arc d,encounter_arc e where d.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID and d.Document_Type in('Clinical Summary','Clinical Summary - Declined','Clinical Summary - Portal') and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_service between ? and ? and DATEDIFF(d.Given_Date,e.Date_of_Service) <=1;
SELECT Human_Id FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and Date_of_Service between ? and ? union SELECT Human_Id FROM encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and Date_of_Service between ? and ?
select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter e inner join referral_order r on (e.encounter_id=r.encounter_id) inner join document d on (r.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and Document_type='Clinical Summary')where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as k union select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc e inner join referral_order r on (e.encounter_id=r.encounter_id) inner join document_arc d on (r.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and Document_type='Clinical Summary')where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as k
select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter e inner join referral_order r on (e.encounter_id=r.encounter_id) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as k union select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc e inner join referral_order r on (e.encounter_id=r.encounter_id) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as k
SELECT human_id FROM rcopia_medication where pharmacy_electronic='Y' and created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by rcopia_id;
SELECT concat(human_id,'~',UPPER(pharmacy_electronic)) FROM rcopia_medication where created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by rcopia_id;
select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter e inner join document d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 4 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc e inner join document_arc d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 4 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m;
select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter e inner join document d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 3 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc e inner join document_arc d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 3 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m;
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Hypertension' and PQRI_Type='icd') and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING FACILITY' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='cpt')) group by enc_id)as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >18 group by hid having count(hid)>=2)as result
Select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join patient_results v on(e.encounter_id=v.encounter_id ) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and (v.loinc_observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation='BP-Standing Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation='BP-Lying Sys/Dia') and a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Hypertension' and PQRI_Type='icd') and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING FACILITY' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='cpt')))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >18 group by hid having count(hid)>=2)as result
SELECT 'Measure Number','Measure Name','Provider','Numerator 1','Denominator 2','Denominator 1','Denominator 2','Total Denomiator','Total Numerator','Exclusion','Percentage','Performance Not Met','Reporting Rate'
SELECT Value FROM patient_results where human_id=? and( loinc_observation='BMI'or loinc_observation='BMI Status') and results_type='vitals')
SELECT value,is_Present FROM social_history where Human_Id=? and (Social_Info='Tobacco Use and Exposure');
SELECT Value,is_Present FROM social_history where Human_Id=? and (Social_Info='Smoking Habit');
SELECT human_id,loinc_observation,Value FROM patient_results where human_id=? and encounter_id=? and results_type='vitals' and( loinc_observation in('BMI') ) group by vitals_group_id order by (Captured_date_and_time) desc;
SELECT human_id,loinc_observation,Value FROM patient_results where human_id=? and encounter_id=? and results_type='vitals' and( loinc_observation in('BMI status') ) group by vitals_group_id order by (Captured_date_and_time) desc
SELECT Result_Master_ID, cast(Result_Received_Date as char(100)) as Result_Received_Date,Order_ID,MSH_Segment_Type_ID, MSH_Delimiter,MSH_Sending_Application, MSH_Sending_Facility,MSH_Receiving_Application,MSH_Receiveing_Facility,MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,MSH_Security, MSH_Message_Type, MSH_Message_Control_ID,MSH_Processing_ID,MSH_HL7_Version,PID_Segment_Type_ID,PID_Sequence_Number,PID_External_Patient_ID, PID_Lab_Assigned_Patient_ID,PID_Alternate_Patient_ID,PID_Patient_Last_Name,PID_Patient_First_Name,PID_Patient_Middle_Name, PID_Mother_Maiden_Name,PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,PID_Patient_Gender,PID_Patient_Alias,PID_Patient_Race,PID_Patient_Address1, PID_Patient_Address2,PID_Patient_City,PID_Patient_State,PID_Patient_Zip,PID_Patient_Country_Code,PID_Patient_Home_Phone, PID_Patient_Work_Phone,PID_Patient_Language,PID_Patient_Marital_Status,PID_Patient_Religion,PID_Labcorp_Customer_ID, PID_Check_Digit, PID_Check_Digit_Scheme,PID_Bill_Code,PID_ABN_Flag,PID_Status_Of_Specimen,PID_Fasting,PID_Patient_SSN, Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time ,Modified_By,cast(Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time ,Version,Result_Review_Comments,cast(Result_Review_Date as char(100)) as Result_Review_Date,Result_Review_By,Is_Electronic_Mode,MA_Notes FROM RESULT_MASTER WHERE RESULT_MASTER_ID IN (SELECT RESULT_MASTER_ID FROM RESULT_MASTER WHERE Order_ID=? and MSH_DATE_AND_TIME_OF_MESSAGE<>"")ORDER BY RESULT_MASTER_ID DESC;
SELECT Result_Master_ID, cast(Result_Received_Date as char(100)) as Result_Received_Date,Order_ID,MSH_Segment_Type_ID,MSH_Delimiter,MSH_Sending_Application, MSH_Sending_Facility,MSH_Receiving_Application,MSH_Receiveing_Facility,MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,MSH_Security, MSH_Message_Type, MSH_Message_Control_ID,MSH_Processing_ID,MSH_HL7_Version,PID_Segment_Type_ID,PID_Sequence_Number,PID_External_Patient_ID, PID_Lab_Assigned_Patient_ID,PID_Alternate_Patient_ID,PID_Patient_Last_Name,PID_Patient_First_Name,PID_Patient_Middle_Name, PID_Mother_Maiden_Name,PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,PID_Patient_Gender,PID_Patient_Alias,PID_Patient_Race,PID_Patient_Address1, PID_Patient_Address2,PID_Patient_City,PID_Patient_State,PID_Patient_Zip,PID_Patient_Country_Code,PID_Patient_Home_Phone, PID_Patient_Work_Phone,PID_Patient_Language,PID_Patient_Marital_Status,PID_Patient_Religion,PID_Labcorp_Customer_ID, PID_Check_Digit, PID_Check_Digit_Scheme,PID_Bill_Code,PID_ABN_Flag,PID_Status_Of_Specimen,PID_Fasting,PID_Patient_SSN, Created_By,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time ,Modified_By,cast(Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time ,Version,Result_Review_Comments,cast(Result_Received_Date as char(100)) as Result_Received_Date,Result_Review_By,Is_Electronic_Mode,MA_Notes FROM RESULT_MASTER WHERE Order_ID=? and MSH_DATE_AND_TIME_OF_MESSAGE<>"";
SELECT O.Order_ID,O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID, O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Procedure,O.Lab_Procedure_Description,O.Authorization_Required, cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)) as Test_Date,O.Order_Notes,O.Specimen_In_House,O.Stat, O.Fasting,cast(O.Order_Date as char(100)) as Order_Date,O.Created_By, cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,O.Modified_By, cast(O.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time,O.Version, O.Order_Type,O.Specimen_ID,O.Facility_Name,O.Bill_Type,O.Is_ABN_Signed,O.Order_Code_Type, O.Specimen,O.Culture_Location,O.Is_In_House,O.Height,O.Weight FROM Orders O WHERE (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Location_ID LIKE ? AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? AND O.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Order_ID IN (:OrderSubmitList);
SELECT O.Order_ID,O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID, O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Procedure,O.Lab_Procedure_Description,O.Authorization_Required, cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)) as Test_Date,O.Order_Notes,O.Specimen_In_House,O.Stat, O.Fasting,cast(O.Order_Date as char(100)) as Order_Date,O.Created_By, cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,O.Modified_By, cast(O.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time,O.Version,O.Order_Type, O.Specimen_ID,O.Facility_Name,O.Bill_Type,O.Is_ABN_Signed,O.Order_Code_Type,O.Specimen, O.Culture_Location,O.Order_ID,O.Is_In_House,O.Height,O.Weight FROM Orders O WHERE (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Location_ID LIKE ? AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? AND O.Order_Type LIKE ?;
SELECT R.Rx_Order_ID,R.Encounter_ID,R.Human_ID,R.Physician_ID,R.Drug_Name, R.Strength,R.Dispense,R.Generic,R.Formulary,R.Dose,R.Unit, R.Frequency,R.Days_supply,cast(R.Start_Date as char(100)) as Start_Date,R.Is_Refills, R.Number_Of_Refills,R.Number_Per_Refills,R.Order_Type,R.Lot_Number, cast(R.Expiry_Date as char(100)) as Expiry_Date,R.Pharmacy_ID,R.Pharmacy_Location_ID,R.Notes, R.Created_By,cast(R.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,R.Modified_By, cast(R.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time,R.Version,R.Authorization_Required, R.Route_Of_Administration FROM RX_ORDER R WHERE (cast(R.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND R.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND R.Human_ID LIKE ? AND R.Pharmacy_ID LIKE ? AND R.Pharmacy_Location_ID LIKE ?;
SELECT I.Immunization_ID,I.Human_ID,I.Physician_Id,I.Encounter_Id,I.Procedure_Code, I.Immunization_Description,cast(I.Visit_Date as char(100)) AS Visit_Date,I.CVX_Code,I.Dose,I.Dose_No,I.Given_By, CAST(I.Given_Date AS CHAR(100)) AS Given_Date,CAST(I.Date_on_Vis AS CHAR(100)) AS Date_on_Vis, cast(I.Vis_Given_Date as char(100)) as Vis_Given_Date,I.Location,I.Lot_Number, I.Manufacturer,CAST(I.Expiry_Date AS CHAR(100)) AS Expiry_Date,I.Route_of_Administration,I.Notes,I.Vfc, I.Immunization_Source,I.Created_By,CAST(I.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) AS Created_Date_And_Time, I.Modified_By,CAST(I.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) AS Modified_Date_And_Time,I.Version,I.Is_VIS_Given, I.Authorization_Required FROM IMMUNIZATION I WHERE (cast(I.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND I.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND I.Human_ID LIKE ?;
SELECT O.In_House_Procedure_ID,O.Encounter_Id,O.Human_ID,O.Physician_Id,O.Procedure_Code,O.Procedure_Code_Description, O.Notes,O.Created_By,CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) AS Created_Date_And_Time,O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) AS Modified_Date_And_Time,O.Version,O.Authorization_Required FROM in_house_procedure O WHERE (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ?;
SELECT r.referral_order_id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process,cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,R.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,", ",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,R.From_Physician_ID,R.Reason_For_Referral,R.From_Physician_ID,R.To_Physician_Name, R.To_Facility_Name,R.Referral_order_id,concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ',P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider FROM wf_object w left join REFERRAL_ORDER R on R.REFERRAL_ORDER_GROUP_ID=W.obj_System_Id LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=R.Human_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=R.From_Physician_ID WHERE (cast(R.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND R.From_Physician_ID LIKE ? AND R.Human_ID LIKE ? AND W.Facility_Name like ? AND W.Obj_Type=? AND W.Current_Process like ? ;
SELECT W.Obj_System_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process, cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,R.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,", ",h.First_Name," ",h.MI), cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,R.From_Physician_ID,R.Reason_For_Referral,R.From_Physician_ID, R.To_Physician_Name,R.To_Facility_Name,R.Referral_order_id,concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ',P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider FROM wf_object w left join REFERRAL_ORDER R on R.REFERRAL_ORDER_GROUP_ID=W.obj_System_Id LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=R.Human_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=R.From_Physician_ID WHERE (cast(R.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND R.From_Physician_ID LIKE ? AND R.Human_ID LIKE ? AND W.Facility_Name like ? AND W.Obj_Type=? AND W.Current_Process like ? limit ?,?;
SELECT t.Test_Name as Test,t.Question_Name as Questions, '' as Status, '' as Comments, t.options as StatusOptions,t.Test_Lookup_Id as TestLookupID, ' ',0 as ExaminationID,0 as UpdateFlag, 0 as Version, '' as CreatedBy, '0001-01-01 00:00:00' as CreatedDateandTime,'' as Score,t.Is_Score,t.Is_Status,t.Maximum_Score FROM test_lookup t where t.category=? and t.user_name=? and t.status='Active'
SELECT 0 as HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID, e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID,e.Questionnaire_Category,e.Questionnaire_Type, e.Question,'' as Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options,'' as Notes,'' as CreatedBy, '0001-01-01 00:00:00' as CreatedDateandTime,'' as Modified_By,'0001-01-01 00:00:00' as Modified_Date_And_Time, 0 as Version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required,e.Is_Notes FROM questionnaire_lookup e where e.User_Name=? and e.Questionnaire_Category=? order by e.sort_order
select x.HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID,x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID, x.Questionnaire_Category,x.Questionnaire_Type,x.Question,x.Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options, x.Notes,x.Created_By,cast(x.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),x.Modified_By,cast(x.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), x.version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required,e.Is_Notes from healthcare_questionnaire x,questionnaire_lookup e where x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID=e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID and x.Encounter_ID=? and x.Questionnaire_Category=?
select x.HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID,x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID, x.Questionnaire_Category,x.Questionnaire_Type,x.Question,x.Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options, x.Notes,x.Created_By,cast(x.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),x.Modified_By,cast(x.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), x.version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required,e.Is_Notes from healthcare_questionnaire x,questionnaire_lookup e where x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID=e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID and x.Encounter_ID=? and x.Questionnaire_Category=? union select x.HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID,x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID, x.Questionnaire_Category,x.Questionnaire_Type,x.Question,x.Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options, x.Notes,x.Created_By,cast(x.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),x.Modified_By,cast(x.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), x.version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required,e.Is_Notes from healthcare_questionnaire_arc x,questionnaire_lookup e where x.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID=e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID and x.Encounter_ID=? and x.Questionnaire_Category=?
select t.Test_ID,t.Question_Name,CAST(t.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(50)) from Test t where t.Status != 'Not Examined' and t.Encounter_ID =?
select x.test_name,x.Question_name,x.status,x.test_notes,t.options as StatusOptions, t.test_Lookup_Id as TestLookupID, ' ',x.Test_ID,0 as UpdateFlag,x.Version as Version, x.Created_By,cast(x.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),x.Score,t.Is_Score,t.Is_Status,t.Maximum_Score from test x,test_lookup t where x.test_lookup_id=t.test_lookup_id and x.encounter_id=? and t.Category=?
Update scan_index_conversion set Is_Moved_To_Production='Y' where Scan_Index_Conversion_ID=?
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding m on (e.human_id=m.human_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt')))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >? group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result;
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join pqri p on(e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id= p.physician_id) join e_m_coding m on (p.human_id=m.human_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and (p.pqri_name='Tobacco use ' and (p.pqri_value='Y' or p.pqri_value='N')) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt')))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >? group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join pqri p on(e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id= p.physician_id) join e_m_coding m on (p.human_id=m.human_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and p.pqri_name='Tobacco use ' and p.pqri_value='Y' and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt')))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) > 18 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join pqri p on(e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id= p.physician_id)left join e_m_coding m on (p.human_id=m.human_id) left join rcopia_medication r on(e.human_id=r.human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data d on(s.rxcui=d.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM')where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and p.pqri_name='Tobacco use ' and p.pqri_value='Y' and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept= 'Tobacco Use Cessation Counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')) and r.ndc_id in (select atv from rxnsat where standard_concept='Smoking Cessation Agents'and pqri_type='RxNorm'))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) > 18 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Encounter Outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt'))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))>65 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Encounter Outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between '18'and '64' group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join pqri p on(e.encounter_id=p.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and (p.pqri_value>22) or (p.is_done='Y') and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='follow-up plan_BMI management' and PQRI_Type='cpt') group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >65 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join pqri p on(e.encounter_id=p.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and (p.pqri_value>18) or (p.is_done='Y')and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='follow-up plan_BMI management' and PQRI_Type='cpt') group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 18 and 65 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM cqm_data where( Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='icd')) and a.icd not in( SELECT pqri_value FROM `cqm_data` where (Standard_concept='Encounter pregnancy' and PQRI_Type='icd'))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 2 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM cqm_data where( Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='icd')) and a.icd not in( SELECT pqri_value FROM `cqm_data` where (Standard_concept='Encounter pregnancy' and PQRI_Type='icd'))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 2 and 10 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM cqm_data where( Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='icd')) and a.icd not in( SELECT pqri_value FROM `cqm_data` where (Standard_concept='Encounter pregnancy' and PQRI_Type='icd'))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 11 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='BMI percentile' and pqri_type='icd')group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 2 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM `cqm_data` where (Standard_concept='counseling for nutrition' and PQRI_Type='icd')) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where Standard_concept='counseling for nutrition' and PQRI_Type='cpt')group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 2 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM `cqm_data` where (Standard_concept='counseling for physical activity ' and PQRI_Type='icd'))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 2 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') where e.encounter_provider_id =? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and
(a.icd in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='ICD') and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='medication'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') and (m.procedure_code in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or
(standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') ))))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 17 and 74 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
SELECT 'Measure Number','Measure Name','Provider','Numerator','Denominator','Exclusion','Percentage','Performance Not Met','Reporting Rate'
select p.Problem_List_ID,p.Encounter_ID,p.Physician_ID,p.Reference_Source,p.ICD, p.Problem_Description,p.Created_By,CAST(p.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Created_Date_Time, p.Modified_By,CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Modified_Date_Time, p.Version,p.version_year,p.Status,p.Date_Diagnosed,p.Rcopia_ID,p.Is_Active,p.Resolved_Date,p.Is_Health_Concern from problem_list as p where Human_Id=? and (is_active='Y' or is_active='N' or ICD='0000') group by ICD order by Date_Diagnosed desc
select p.Problem_List_ID,p.Encounter_ID,p.Physician_ID,p.Reference_Source,p.ICD, p.Problem_Description,p.Created_By,CAST(p.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Created_Date_Time, p.Modified_By,CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Modified_Date_Time, p.Version,p.Status,p.Date_Diagnosed,p.Rcopia_ID,p.Is_Active,p.version_year from problem_list as p where Human_Id=? and (is_active='Y' or ICD='0000') order by Date_Diagnosed desc
select p.Problem_List_ID,p.Encounter_ID,p.Physician_ID,p.Reference_Source,p.ICD, p.Problem_Description,p.Created_By,CAST(p.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Created_Date_Time, p.Modified_By,CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Modified_Date_Time, p.Version,p.Status,p.Date_Diagnosed,p.Rcopia_ID,p.Is_Active from problem_list as p where Human_Id=? and Is_Active='Y' and Status=('Active' or 'Inactive') group by ICD order by status, Date_Diagnosed asc,problem_list_id
SELECT w.Obj_Type,w.current_process,w.Current_Owner, w.Obj_Sub_Type,w.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object w where (w.current_Process = ?) and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Obj_Type=?
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT Short_Description, System_Name, Condition_Name, Status, Examination_Notes FROM examination where Encounter_ID = ? and
SELECT 'Date & Time','Patient A/C No','Patient Name','Patient DOB','User Name','Transaction Type','Transaction In','Attribute Name','Old Value','New Value'
select cast(a.Transaction_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Transaction_Date_And_Time,a.Human_Id as PATIENT_AC,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DATE_OF_BIRTH, a.Transaction_By as User_Name,a.Transaction_Type,(select substring_index(a.entity_name,'.',-1))as Transaction_In, a.attribute as Attribute_Name,a.old_value as Old_Value,a.new_value as New_Value from audit_log a left join human h on (h.human_id=a.human_id) where Transaction_Date_And_Time between ? and ? order by a.Transaction_Date_And_Time desc
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join orders o on(e.encounter_id=o.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or o.lab_procedure in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='BREAST CANCER SCREENING' and pqri_type='CPT')and o.lab_procedure not in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where (Standard_concept='bilateral mastectomy'or Standard_concept= 'unilateral mastectomy' ))group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 41 and 68 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result

select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (SELECT pqri_value FROM cqm_data where( Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='icd') and (Standard_concept='counseling for physical activity' and PQRI_Type='icd')) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where Standard_concept='counseling for physical activity' and PQRI_Type='cpt')group by enc_id )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 11 and 16 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join orders o on(e.human_id=o.human_id) left join Result_master c on(o.Order_ID=c.Order_ID)left join result_obx x on(c.result_master_id=x.result_master_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') where e.date_of_service between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id =? and r.ndc_id in (select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='medication'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') and o.lab_procedure in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='ldl TEst'and PQRI_Type='cpt') and (x.OBX_Loinc_Identifier in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='ldl test'and PQRI_Type='loinc')and x.OBX_Observation_Value>9.0 ) and (a.icd in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or (standard_concept='polycystic ovaries' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or(standard_concept='gestational diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')or(standard_concept='steroid induced diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')) or(m.procedure_code in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or
(standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt'))))))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 17 and 74 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join result_entry re on(e.human_id=re.human_id) left join result_sub_entry rs on( re.Result_Entry_ID=rs.Result_Entry_ID ) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') where e.encounter_provider_id =? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in (select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='medication'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') and (rs.Loinc_Num in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='ldl test'and PQRI_Type='loinc')and rs.Result>9.0) and (a.icd in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or (standard_concept='polycystic ovaries' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or(standard_concept='gestational diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')or(standard_concept='steroid induced diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')) or(m.procedure_code in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or
(standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') )))))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 17 and 74 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(a.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id)
left join result_entry re on(e.human_id=re.human_id) left join result_sub_entry rs on( re.Result_Entry_ID=rs.Result_Entry_ID ) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') where e.encounter_provider_id =? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in (select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='medication'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') and
(rs.Loinc_Num in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='ldl test'and PQRI_Type='loinc')and rs.Result<100) and (a.icd in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or (standard_concept='polycystic ovaries' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or(standard_concept='gestational diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')or(standard_concept='steroid induced diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')) or(m.procedure_code in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or
(standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') )))))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 17 and 74 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result

select count(*)from ( select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID , m.procedure_code from encounter e left join e_m_coding m on (e.human_id=m.human_id) left join rcopia_medication r on(e.human_id=r.human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='INFLUENZA VACCINE'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER PREV MED OTHER SERVICES' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER PREV MED-INDIVIDUAL COUNSELING' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER PREV MED GROUP COUNSELING' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER PREV MED 40 AND OLDER'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING FACILITY'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING DISCHARGE'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept= 'ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT'and PQRI_Type='cpt'))) )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) > 50 group by hid having count(hid)>=1) as result
select count(*) from (select distinct(e.encounter_id) as encounterId,e.encounter_provider_id,DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y')-DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date,'%Y') -(DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d')< DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as age from encounter e inner join human h on (h.human_id = e.human_id) inner join assessment a on(e.encounter_id = a.encounter_id and a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where (p.standard_concept in('HYPERTENSION','ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT')) and p.pqri_type = 'icd') and a.icd not in(select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where (p.standard_concept in('PREGNANCY','ESRD')) and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join e_m_coding em on(e.encounter_id = em.encounter_id and em.procedure_code in (select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where q.standard_concept ='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and q.pqri_type = 'cpt') and em.procedure_code not in(select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where q.standard_concept ='PROCEDURES INDICATIVE OF ESRD' and q.pqri_type = 'cpt')) where DATE_FORMAT(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? having age between 17 and 84) as t;
select count(distinct(encounter)) from (select ifnull( (case when memberfirst <=140 and membersecond <= 90 then memberfirst end),'') as 'VitalValue', Encounter from (select substring_index(VitalValue ,'/',1) as memberfirst ,substring_index(VitalValue,'/',-1) as membersecond,Encounter from (select v.Value as VitalValue,v.Encounter_id as Encounter,DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y')- DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date,'%Y') -(DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d')< DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as age from encounter e inner join human h on (h.human_id = e.human_id) inner join patient_results v on(e.encounter_id =v.encounter_id and (v.loinc_observation ='BP-Standing Sys/Dia'or v.loinc_observation = 'BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation ='BP-Lying Sys/Dia')) inner join assessment a on(e.encounter_id = a.encounter_id and a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where (p.standard_concept in('HYPERTENSION','ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT')) and p.pqri_type = 'icd') and a.icd not in(select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where (p.standard_concept in('PREGNANCY','ESRD')) and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join e_m_coding em on(e.encounter_id = em.encounter_id and em.procedure_code in (select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where q.standard_concept ='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and q.pqri_type = 'cpt') and em.procedure_code not in(select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where q.standard_concept ='PROCEDURES INDICATIVE OF ESRD' and q.pqri_type = 'cpt')) where DATE_FORMAT(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? having age between 17 and 84 order by v.encounter_id) as t) as l having VitalValue <>'') as f;
select count(*) from (select distinct(e.encounter_id) as encounterId,e.encounter_provider_id,DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y')-DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date,'%Y') -(DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d')< DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as age from encounter e inner join human h on (h.human_id = e.human_id) inner join rcopia_medication r on(h.human_id = r.human_id and r.NDC_ID in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where i.standard_concept = 'MEDICATION' and i.pqri_type = 'rxnorm') and sab ='RXNORM')) inner join assessment a on(e.encounter_id = a.encounter_id or a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where p.standard_concept in('DIABETES','ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join e_m_coding em on(e.encounter_id = em.encounter_id and em.procedure_code in (select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where (standard_concept = 'ENCOUNTER ACUTE INPATIENT' or standard_concept ='ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and pqri_type = 'cpt')) where DATE_FORMAT(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? having age between 18 and 75) as tem;
select count(*) from(select ifnull( (case when memberfirst <=140 and membersecond <= 90 then memberfirst end),'') as 'VitalValue', Encounter from (select substring_index(VitalValue ,'/',1) as memberfirst ,substring_index(VitalValue,'/',-1) as membersecond,Encounter from (select v.Vital_Value as VitalValue,v.Encounter_id as Encounter,DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y')- DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date,'%Y') -(DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d')< DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as age from encounter e inner join human h on (h.human_id = e.human_id) inner join patient_results v on(e.encounter_id =v.encounter_id and (v.loinc_observation ='BP-Standing Sys/Dia'or v.loinc_observation = 'BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation ='BP-Lying Sys/Dia')) inner join rcopia_medication r on(h.human_id = r.human_id and r.NDC_ID in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where i.standard_concept = 'MEDICATION' and i.pqri_type = 'rxnorm') and sab ='RXNORM')) inner join assessment a on(e.encounter_id = a.encounter_id or a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where p.standard_concept in('DIABETES','ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join e_m_coding em on(e.encounter_id = em.encounter_id and em.procedure_code in (select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where (standard_concept = 'ENCOUNTER ACUTE INPATIENT' or standard_concept ='ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and pqri_type = 'cpt')) where DATE_FORMAT(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? having age between 18 and 75 order by v.encounter_id) as t) as l group by Encounter having VitalValue <>'') as tem;
select count(*) from (select distinct(e.encounter_id) as encounterId,e.encounter_provider_id,DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y')-DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date,'%Y') -(DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d')< DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as age from encounter e inner join human h on (h.human_id = e.human_id) inner join assessment a on(e.encounter_id = a.encounter_id and a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where p.standard_concept in('POLYCYSTIC OVARIES') and p.pqri_type = 'icd') or a.icd in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where p.standard_concept in('GESTATIONAL DIABETES','STEROID INDUCED DIABETES') and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join rcopia_medication r on(h.human_id = r.human_id and r.NDC_ID in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where i.standard_concept = 'MEDICATION' and i.pqri_type = 'rxnorm') and sab ='RXNORM')) inner join assessment a1 on(e.encounter_id = a1.encounter_id and a1.icd not in (select p.pqri_value from cqm_data p where p.standard_concept in('DIABETES','ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and p.pqri_type = 'icd')) inner join e_m_coding em on(e.encounter_id = em.encounter_id and em.procedure_code in (select q.pqri_value from cqm_data q where (standard_concept = 'ENCOUNTER ACUTE INPATIENT' or standard_concept ='ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY') and pqri_type = 'cpt')) where DATE_FORMAT(e.date_of_service,'%Y-%m-%d') between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? having age between 18 and 75) as t;
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID ,a.icd,m.procedure_code from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='icd') ) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='cpt') )))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv ) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') left join rcopia_allergy g on (e.human_id=g.human_id and g.ndc_id not in (select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='Dtap Vaccine'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm'))
where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='Dtap Vaccine'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm')
and (a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='icd')or(standard_concept='Dtap Vaccine'and pqri_type='icd')))
and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='cpt'))) )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 group by hid having count(hid)>=3) as result

where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='IPV'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm')

and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='cpt'))) )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))between 1 and 2 group by hid having count(hid)>=3) as result
