where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept in('MUMPS VACCINE','RUBELLA VACCINE','MMR VACCINE')and p.pqri_type='rxnorm')
and (a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='icd')or(standard_concept='Dtap Vaccine'and pqri_type='icd')))
and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='cpt'))))as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 group by hid having count(hid)>=1)as result
select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv ) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') left join rcopia_allergy g on (e.human_id=g.human_id and g.ndc_id not in (select atv from rxnsat where (p.standard_concept='HIB'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') ))
where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and r.ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where p.standard_concept='HIB'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm')

select count(*) from (select enc_id ,hid from (select e.encounter_id as ENC_ID,e.human_id as HID from encounter e left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) join rcopia_medication R on(e.Human_id=r.Human_id) left join rxnsat s on(r.ndc_id=s.atv ) inner join cqm_data p on(s.rxcui=p.PQRI_value and s.atn='ndc'and s.sab='RXNORM') left join rcopia_allergy g on (e.human_id=g.human_id and g.ndc_id not in (select atv from rxnsat where( (p.standard_concept='IPV'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') or (p.standard_concept='neomycin'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') or (p.standard_concept='streptomycin'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm') or(p.standard_concept='DTAP VACCINE'and p.pqri_type='rxnorm'))))

and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_TYPE='cpt'))) )as d join human h on(h.human_id=hid) where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 group by hid having count(hid)>=3) as result
SELECT h.human_ID FROM human h inner join orders o on (h.human_id=o.human_id) where H.Human_Id=? and o.Lab_Procedure in (:List)
SELECT r.result_master_id myid,Order_ID,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time ,(select OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time from result_obr where result_master_id=myid limit 1), (select group_concat(OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",o.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text) from result_obr o where o.result_master_id=myid) FROM `result_master` r where r.PID_External_Patient_ID =? order by result_Received_Date desc;
SELECT o.Order_ID as order_submit,human_id,max(m.result_master_id),b.obr_observation_Battery_identifier, b.obr_observation_battery_text FROM `orders` o inner join result_master m on(m.Order_ID = o.Order_ID and m.pid_alternate_patient_id = human_id) inner join result_obr b on(b.result_master_id = m.result_master_id) where encounter_id = ? group by m.Order_ID;
SELECT o.Order_ID as order_submit,o.human_id,e.result_entry_id,o.lab_procedure,o.lab_procedure_description FROM `orders` o inner join result_entry e on(e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id) inner join result_sub_entry s on(s.result_entry_id = e.result_entry_id) where o.encounter_id = ? group by o.Order_ID;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Immunization_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.Obj_System_ID=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Immunization_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.Obj_System_ID=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Immunization_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.Obj_System_ID=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Immunization_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.Obj_System_ID=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id;
select 'Encounter Id','Patient A/C No ' ,'External A/C No','Patient Name','Patient DOB','Home Phone No','Cell Phone No', 'Appointment Facility','Appointment Phy #','Appointment Phy Name','Encounter Phy #','Encounter Phy Name','Date of Service','Appointment Date','Appointment Time','Created By','Purpose of Visit', 'Type of Visit','Current Process','Transportation Note','Reschedule Reason','Comments'
select e.Encounter_ID,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC ,(h.Patient_Account_External) as External_Account_Number, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,h.Home_Phone_No as Phone_No, h.Cell_Phone_Number as Cell_Phone_Number,w.Facility_Name,e.Appointment_Provider_ID, concat( d.Physician_Prefix,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ',d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix) as App_Physician_Name, e.encounter_provider_id,concat( s.Physician_Prefix,' ',s.Physician_First_Name,' ',s.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',s.Physician_Last_Name,' ', s.Physician_Suffix) as Enc_Physician_Name, cast(Date_of_Service as char(100)) as Date_of_Service,cast(DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s ') as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, e.Created_By as Created_By,e.Purpose_of_Visit as Purpose_of_Visit,e.Visit_Type as Type_of_Visit, w.Current_Process as Current_Process,group_concat(distinct(p.Message_Description) separator ',')as notes,e.Reschedule_Reason_Text as Reschedule_Reason, group_concat(p.Notes separator ',') AS COMMENTS FROM wf_object w LEFT JOIN encounter e on (e.encounter_id =w.obj_system_id) left join human H on(e.human_id=h.Human_Id) left join Physician_Library d on (d.Physician_Library_ID=e.Appointment_Provider_ID) left join Physician_library s on(e.encounter_provider_id=s.physician_library_id) left join patient_notes p on(p.Human_Id=h.Human_Id) left join user u on (u.Physician_Library_ID=d.Physician_Library_ID) where (e.Appointment_Date between ? and ?) and w.Facility_Name like ? and e.Appointment_Provider_ID like ? and h.Human_Id like ? and e.encounter_provider_id like ? and e.Created_by like ? and h.Account_Status='Active' and (w.Obj_Type in (:objlist)) and (w.Current_process in (:Currentlist)) group by w.wf_object_id order by e.Appointment_Date;
SELECT u.User_Name,u.Physician_Library_ID,u.Role,u.Person_Name FROM user u where User_Name like ? limit ?,?
SELECT count(*) FROM user where User_Name like ?
SELECT cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type ,w.Is_abnormal from wf_object w left join orders O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) where w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type ,w.Is_abnormal from wf_object w left join orders O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
select 'Patient A/C No ','Patient Name','Date of Birth','Phone','Patient Address','Destination Address', 'Appointment Date','Appointment Time' ,'Transportation Notes','Comments','Assigned Physician'
select (h.Human_Id) as PAtient_AC ,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as PAtient_NAme, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as DATE_OF_BIRTH, h.Home_Phone_No as PHONE_NO, concat(h.Street_Address1,',',h.City,',',h.State,',',h.ZipCode)as PatienAddress,
concat(f.Facility_Address1,f.Facility_Address2,',',f.Facility_City,',',f.Facility_State,',',f.Facility_Zip) as FAcilityAddress, cast(DATE_FORMAT(e.appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s ') as char(100)) as APPOINMENT_DATE, group_concat(p.Message_Description separator ',') AS COMMENTS,group_concat(p.Notes separator ',') as PATIENT_NOTES,concat( d.Physician_Prefix,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ',d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix) as PHYSICIAN_NAME
FROM wf_object w LEFT JOIN encounter e on (e.encounter_id =w.obj_system_id) left join human H on(e.human_id=h.Human_Id) left join Physician_Library d on (d.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join patient_notes p on(p.Human_Id=h.Human_Id) left join facility_library f on(e.facility_name=f.facility_name) where (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ) and w.Obj_Type= 'Encounter'and (w.Current_Process='SCHEDULED' )group by e.encounter_id order by(e.appointment_date )asc
select * from (SElECT cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,OS.Order_Type,Replace(W.Current_Process,'_',' _'),H.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,', ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate, group_concat(distinct concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator '; '),"Assessment", OS.Physician_ID,W.Facility_Name,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.wf_object_id,OS.Order_Submit_ID,O.Order_ID, OS.Encounter_ID,cast(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time,F.Order_ID as File_Management_Index_Order_ID,concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ', P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider, L.Lab_Name as Lab_Name,F.file_management_index_id as File_Ref_No from wf_object W LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON W.Obj_System_ID = OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID LEFT JOIN File_Management_Index F ON F.Order_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=OS.Physician_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON L.Lab_ID=OS.Lab_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name LIKE ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND OS.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Human_ID LIKE ? and os.physician_id<>0 AND OS.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Procedure<>'' group by O.Order_Submit_Id union SElECT cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,OS.Order_Type,Replace(W.Current_Process,'_',' _'),H.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,', ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate, group_concat(distinct concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator '; '),"Assessment", OS.Physician_ID,W.Facility_Name,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.wf_object_id,OS.Order_Submit_ID,O.Order_ID, OS.Encounter_ID,cast(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time,F.Order_ID as File_Management_Index_Order_ID,concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ', P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider, L.Lab_Name as Lab_Name,F.file_management_index_id as File_Ref_No from wf_object_arc W LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON W.Obj_System_ID = OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID LEFT JOIN File_Management_Index F ON F.Order_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=OS.Physician_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON L.Lab_ID=OS.Lab_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name LIKE ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND OS.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Human_ID LIKE ? and os.physician_id<>0 AND OS.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Procedure<>'' group by O.Order_Submit_Id)aa order by aa.Created_Date_And_Time desc;;
select * from ( SElECT cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,OS.Order_Type,Replace(W.Current_Process,'_',' _'),H.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,', ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate, group_concat(distinct concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator '; '),"Assessment", OS.Physician_ID,W.Facility_Name,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.wf_object_id,OS.Order_Submit_ID,O.Order_ID, OS.Encounter_ID,cast(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time,F.Order_ID as File_Management_Index_Order_ID,concat(P.Referring_physician) as Ordering_Provider, L.Lab_Name as Lab_Name,F.file_management_index_id as File_Ref_No from wf_object W LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON W.Obj_System_ID = OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID LEFT JOIN File_Management_Index F ON F.Order_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN encounter P ON P.order_submit_id=OS.order_submit_id LEFT JOIN lab L ON L.Lab_ID=OS.Lab_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name LIKE ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND OS.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Human_ID LIKE ? and os.physician_id=0 AND OS.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Procedure<>'' group by O.Order_Submit_Id union SElECT cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,OS.Order_Type,Replace(W.Current_Process,'_',' _'),H.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,', ',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate, group_concat(distinct concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator '; '),"Assessment", OS.Physician_ID,W.Facility_Name,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,w.wf_object_id,OS.Order_Submit_ID,O.Order_ID, OS.Encounter_ID,cast(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time,F.Order_ID as File_Management_Index_Order_ID,concat(P.Referring_physician) as Ordering_Provider, L.Lab_Name as Lab_Name,F.file_management_index_id as File_Ref_No from wf_object_arc W LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON W.Obj_System_ID = OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID LEFT JOIN File_Management_Index F ON F.Order_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN encounter P ON P.order_submit_id=OS.order_submit_id LEFT JOIN lab L ON L.Lab_ID=OS.Lab_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name LIKE ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND OS.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Human_ID LIKE ? and os.physician_id=0 AND OS.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Procedure<>'' group by O.Order_Submit_Id)aa order by aa.Created_Date_And_Time desc;
select O.order_submit_id, Group_concat(concat(A.ICD,"-",A.ICD_DESCRIPTION) separator ' <split> ') from orders O ,orders_assessment A where A.Order_Submit_ID=O.Order_Submit_ID and O.Order_Submit_ID in (:OrderIDs) group by O.Order_Submit_ID;
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_System_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,Replace(W.Current_Process,'_',' _'), cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,W.Current_Owner,O.Order_ID,O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID,O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Procedure,O.Lab_Procedure_Description,O.Order_Type,O.Facility_Name, O.Specimen,O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID,cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(W.Obj_System_ID = O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID) WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name =? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Location_ID LIKE ? AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? AND O.Order_Type LIKE ? AND O.Lab_Procedure order by W.Current_Arrival_Time desc LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT W.Obj_System_ID,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process, cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,O.Human_ID,concat(h.Last_Name,", ",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description) separator ';'),concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ',P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN immunization O ON(W.Obj_System_ID = O.immunization_group_id) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=O.Human_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=O.Physician_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name Like ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? group by O.immunization_group_id ;
SELECT W.Obj_System_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process, cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,O.Human_ID,concat(h.Last_Name,", ",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description) separator ';'),concat(P.Physician_Prefix,' ',P.Physician_First_Name,' ',P.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',P.Physician_Last_Name,' ',P.Physician_Suffix) as Ordering_Provider FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN immunization O ON(W.Obj_System_ID = O.immunization_group_id) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=O.Human_ID LEFT JOIN physician_library P ON P.Physician_Library_ID=O.Physician_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name Like ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? group by O.immunization_group_id LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT W.Obj_System_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process, cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,O.Human_ID,concat(h.Last_Name,",",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';') FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN in_house_procedure O ON(W.Obj_System_ID = O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=O.Human_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name Like ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? group by O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID;
SELECT W.Obj_System_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Facility_Name,W.Current_Process, cast(W.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)) as Current_Arrival_Time,O.Human_ID,concat(h.Last_Name,",",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';') FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN in_house_procedure O ON(W.Obj_System_ID = O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=O.Human_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name Like ? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND O.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND O.Human_ID LIKE ? group by O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT 'Acc#','PatientName','DOB','CommMode','Pref Lang','HomePh#','CellPh#','WorkPh#','CreatedDateTime#','Email','Gender','Ethnicity','Race','PreferredLang','Problem','ProblemDateTime#','Medication','MedicationDateTime#','MedAlergy','MedAlergyDateTime#','LabResult','LabResultDateTime#'
select count(hi) from (SELECT distinct(Human_Id) hi FROM encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and Date_of_Service between ? and ?) as m;
select count(human_id) from Human h join encounter as a on where h.human_id in (:HumanID) and h.Is_Mail_Sent='Y' and a.human_id = h.human_id and date_format(h.Mail_Sent_Date,'%Y-%m-%d') between date_format(a.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d') and date_add(date_format(a.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 4 DAY))
select count(hid) from (select h.Human_ID hid, DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as Agec from human h inner join (select human_id hi from encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? group by hi ) as b on (h.Human_id=b.hi) having Agec not between 6 and 64) as m union select count(hid) from (select h.Human_ID hid, DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as Agec from human h inner join (select human_id hi from encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? group by hi ) as b on (h.Human_id=b.hi) having Agec not between 6 and 64) as m
select human_id from human where human_Id in (Select Human_ID from Activity_Log where Activity_Type in('EMail','Mail','Phone') and human_id in(:HumanID)) group by human_id having count(human_id)>=2
select cast(p.Prescription_Date as char(100)) as Prescription_Date,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,p.Prescription_Id,w.obj_type,w.current_owner,w.Current_Process from WF_Object w left join prescription p on (w.obj_system_id=p.Prescription_Id) LEFT JOIN human h on (p.human_id=h.human_Id) where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by Prescription_Id;
select cast(p.Prescription_Date as char(100)) as Prescription_Date,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,p.Prescription_Id,w.obj_type,w.current_owner,w.Current_Process from WF_Object w left join prescription p on (w.obj_system_id=p.Prescription_Id) LEFT JOIN human h on (p.human_id=h.human_Id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by Prescription_Id;
select cast(p.Prescription_Date as char(100)) as Prescription_Date,h.Medical_Record_Number,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,p.Prescription_Id,w.obj_type,w.current_owner,w.Current_Process from WF_Object w left join prescription p on (w.obj_system_id=p.Prescription_Id) LEFT JOIN human h on (p.human_id=h.human_Id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by Prescription_Id;
select cast(p.Prescription_Date as char(100)) as Prescription_Date,h.Medical_Record_Number,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,p.Prescription_Id,w.obj_type,w.current_owner,w.Current_Process from WF_Object w left join prescription p on (w.obj_system_id=p.Prescription_Id) LEFT JOIN human h on (p.human_id=h.human_Id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by Prescription_Id;
Select distinct(substring_index(questionnaire_type,'-',1)),Is_Calculation_Required from questionnaire_lookup q where q.User_Name=?
SELECT li.Lab_ID FROM lab_insurance_plan li join lab l on l.Lab_ID=li.Lab_Id where l.Lab_Type=? and li.Legal_Org=? and li.Insurance_Plan_Id in (:InsList);
select 'Patient Id','MM ID','Patient Name','DOS','Physician name','Smoking status','Vitals Y/N','Vitals BP', 'Orders Inhouse procedures','Orders Injections / immunization' ,'Service and procedure codes','Diagnosis Code'
SELECT (h.Human_Id) as PAtient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External as MMID,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as PAtient_NAme, cast(DATE_FORMAT(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s') as char(100))as dos, concat( p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PHYSICIAN_NAME, if(s.is_present='','N',s.Is_Present)as smokingstatu,
if(v.value!='','Y',' ') as Vital_Status,v.value, group_concat(distinct( op.procedure_code) separator '/') as inhouseprocedure,group_concat(distinct(i.procedure_code)separator '/') as immunizationcode, group_concat(distinct(m.procedure_code) separator '/'), group_concat(distinct(a.icd) separator '/') from human h left join encounter e on(e.human_id=h.human_id) left join Patient_results v on(e.encounter_id=v.encounter_id and v.loinc_observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia') left join social_history s on(e.human_id=s.human_id and s.social_info='Smoking HAbit') left join e_m_coding m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join in_house_procedure op on(e.encounter_id=op.encounter_id) left join immunization i on(e.encounter_id=i.encounter_id) left join assessment a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join wf_object w on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join physician_library p on (e.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and (w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION' and (w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING'or w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING_2'))and e.facility_name not in (:Faclist) group by e.encounter_id
SELECT (h.Human_Id) as PAtient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External as MMID,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as PAtient_NAme, cast(DATE_FORMAT(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s') as char(100))as dos, concat( p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PHYSICIAN_NAME, if(s.is_present='','N',s.Is_Present)as smokingstatu,
if(v.value!='','Y',' ') as Vital_Status,v.value, group_concat(distinct( op.procedure_code) separator '/') as inhouseprocedure,group_concat(distinct(i.procedure_code)separator '/') as immunizationcode, group_concat(distinct(m.procedure_code) separator '/'), group_concat(distinct(a.icd) separator '/') from human h left join encounter_arc e on(e.human_id=h.human_id) left join Patient_results v on(e.encounter_id=v.encounter_id and v.loinc_observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia') left join social_history s on(e.human_id=s.human_id and s.social_info='Smoking HAbit') left join e_m_coding_arc m on(e.encounter_id=m.encounter_id) left join in_house_procedure op on(e.encounter_id=op.encounter_id) left join immunization i on(e.encounter_id=i.encounter_id) left join assessment_arc a on(e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id) left join wf_object_arc w on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join physician_library p on (e.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and (w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION' and (w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING'or w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING_2'))and e.facility_name not in (:Faclist) group by e.encounter_id
select encounter_id from encounter where encounter_provider_id=? and date_of_service between ? and ? group by human_id having count(human_id)>=2
select a.encounter_id from assessment a where a.encounter_id in(:encids) and a.icd in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Hypertension' and PQRI_Type='icd') group by a.encounter_id ;
select m.encounter_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING FACILITY' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='cpt')) group by m.encounter_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NURSING FACILITY' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER OUTPATIENT' and PQRI_Type='cpt')) group by m.encounter_id
select v.human_id from patient_results v where (v.loinc_observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation='BP-Standing Sys/Dia' or v.loinc_observation='BP-Lying Sys/Dia') and v.encounter_id in(:encids) and results_type='vitals' group by v.human_id
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >18 and human_id in(:Humanids)
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt'))) group by m.encounter_id
select Encounter_id from pqri p where encounter_id in(:encids)and (p.pqri_name='Tobacco use ' and (p.pqri_value='Y' or p.pqri_value='N'))
select encounter_id from encounter where encounter_provider_id=? and date_of_service between ? and ?
select Encounter_id from pqri p where encounter_id in(:encids)and (p.pqri_name='Tobacco use ' and p.pqri_value='Y')
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Encounter Office Visit' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='Encounter Occupational Therapy' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='Encounter Health and Behavior Assessment' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Psychiatric & Psychologic'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Services 18 and Older'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling'and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (Standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services'and PQRI_Type='cpt'))) group by m.encounter_id

select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 and human_id in(:Humanids) group by human_id having count(human_id)>=2
select human_id from rcopia_medication where human_id in(:Humanids) and ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where ((i.standard_concept='DTAP VACCINE')or(i.standard_concept='IPV')) and i.pqri_type='rxnorm') and atn='ndc' and sab ='RXNORM')
select human_id from rcopia_allergy where human_id in(:Humanids) and ndc_id not in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where ((i.standard_concept='DTAP VACCINE')or(i.standard_concept='IPV')) and i.pqri_type='rxnorm') and atn='ndc' and sab ='RXNORM')
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 1 and 2 and human_id in(:Humanids)
select a.encounter_id from assessment a where a.encounter_id in(:encids) and a.icd in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='DIABETES' and PQRI_Type='ICD') group by a.encounter_id ;
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') )) group by m.encounter_id
select human_id from rcopia_medication where human_id in(:Humanids) and ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where i.standard_concept = 'MEDICATION' and i.pqri_type = 'rxnorm') and atn='ndc' and sab ='RXNORM')
select Result_Master_ID from Result_master where PID_External_Patient_ID in (:Humanids)
select Result_Master_ID from result_obx where Result_Master_ID in(:RSID) and OBX_Loinc_Identifier in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='ldl test'and PQRI_Type='loinc')and OBX_Observation_Value<100)
select PID_External_Patient_ID from Result_master where Result_Master_ID in(:RSID)
select a.encounter_id from assessment a where a.encounter_id in(:encids) and a.icd in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='POLYCYSTIC OVARIES' and PQRI_type='Icd')or (standard_concept='GESTATIONAL DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd') or (standard_concept='STEROID INDUCED DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd')and a.icd not in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd')or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY' and PQRI_type='Icd')))) group by a.encounter_id
select a.encounter_id from assessment a where a.encounter_id in(:encids) and a.icd in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='POLYCYSTIC OVARIES' and PQRI_type='Icd')or (standard_concept='GESTATIONAL DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd') or (standard_concept='STEROID INDUCED DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd')and a.icd not in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='DIABETES' and PQRI_type='Icd')or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER NON-ACUTE INPATIENT OR OUTPATIENT OR OPHTHALMOLOGY' and PQRI_type='Icd')))) group by a.encounter_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in (select Pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='encounter outpatient - opthamological services' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt')or (standard_concept='encounter non-acute inpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') or(standard_concept='encounter ED' and PQRI_Type='cpt') )) group by m.encounter_id
select a.encounter_id from assessment a where a.encounter_id in(:encids) and a.icd in(select Pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='encounter outpatient' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or (standard_concept='polycystic ovaries' and PQRI_Type='ICD') or(standard_concept='gestational diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')or(standard_concept='steroid induced diabetes'and PQRI_Type='icd')) group by a.encounter_id
select human_id from rcopia_medication where human_id in(:Humanids) and ndc_id in(select atv from rxnsat where rxcui in(select i.pqri_value from cqm_data i where i.standard_concept = 'MEDICATION' and i.pqri_type = 'rxnorm') and atn='ndc' and sab ='RXNORM')
select Result_Master_ID from Result_master where PID_External_Patient_ID in(:Humanids)
select Result_master_ID from result_obx where Result_Master_ID in(:RSID) and OBX_Loinc_Identifier in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where (standard_concept='HBA1C TEST'and PQRI_Type='loinc')and OBX_Observation_Value<8.0)
select PID_External_Patient_ID from Result_master where Result_Master_ID in(:RSID)
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 17 and 74 and human_id in(:Humanids)
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='follow-up plan_BMI management' and PQRI_Type='cpt') group by m.encounter_id
select Encounter_id from pqri p where encounter_id in(:encids)and (p.pqri_value>22) or (p.is_done='Y')
select Encounter_id from pqri p where encounter_id in(:encids)and (p.pqri_value>18) or (p.is_done='Y')
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d'))>65 and human_id in(:Humanids)
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 18 and 65 and human_id in(:Humanids)
select m.Human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:encids) and m.procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where standard_concept='Encounter Outpatient' and PQRI_Type='cpt') group by m.encounter_id
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,s.Scan_ID FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=?;
SELECT O.Order_Submit_ID,cast(OS.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),ifnull(L.Lab_Name,' '),ifnull(LL.Location_Name,' '),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,OS.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_Submit_ID) left join orders O on (OS.Order_Submit_ID=O.Order_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name, cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''), ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,w.Current_Owner FROM wf_object w, patient_notes n left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) where n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id and w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? ;
SELECT e.Encounter_ID, e.Human_ID, e.Facility_Name FROM encounter e left join human a on (a.human_id=e.human_id) left join facility_library f on(f.Facility_Name=e.Facility_Name) where e.encounter_id=?
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, From_Time, To_Time, min(CAST(From_Date_Choosen as CHAR(100))), max(CAST(To_Date_Choosen as CHAR(100))), Reason,group_concat(Distinct(Day_Choosen) separator ', '), Block_Type, Blockdays_Group_ID,CAST(Block_Date as CHAR(100)),group_concat(CAST(Block_Days_ID as CHAR(100)) separator ','),Is_Alternate_Weeks,Is_Alternate_Months FROM block_days where Physician_ID like ? and Facility_Name like ? and To_Date_Choosen >= ? group by Blockdays_Group_ID limit ?,?;
SELECT count(distinct(Blockdays_Group_ID)) FROM block_days where Physician_ID like ? and Facility_Name like ? and To_Date_Choosen >= ?;
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Machine_Technician_Library_ID, Facility_Name, From_Time, To_Time, min(CAST(From_Date_Choosen as CHAR(100))), max(CAST(To_Date_Choosen as CHAR(100))), Reason,group_concat(Distinct(Day_Choosen) separator ', '), Block_Type, Blockdays_Group_ID,CAST(Block_Date as CHAR(100)),group_concat(CAST(Block_Days_ID as CHAR(100)) separator ','),Is_Alternate_Weeks,Is_Alternate_Months FROM block_days where Machine_Technician_Library_ID like ? and Facility_Name like ? and To_Date_Choosen >= ? group by Blockdays_Group_ID limit ?,?;
SELECT count(distinct(Blockdays_Group_ID)) FROM block_days where Machine_Technician_Library_ID like ? and Facility_Name like ? and To_Date_Choosen >= ?;
SELECT 0 as HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID, e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID,e.Questionnaire_Category,e.Questionnaire_Type, e.Question,'' as Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options,'' as Notes,'' as CreatedBy,'0001-01-01 00:00:00' as CreatedDateandTime, '' as Modified_By,'0001-01-01 00:00:00' as Modified_Date_And_Time,0 as Version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required,e.Is_Notes FROM questionnaire_lookup e where e.User_Name=? and e.Questionnaire_Category=? and ? between e.From_Months and e.To_Months order by e.Sort_Order;
select p.list_of_tables, m.Table_Comment, m.Manager_Object_Name, m.Domain_Object_Name, m.Table_Name,p.computer_name, m.Bucket_Number from registered_Client r join pending_downloads p on (r.Computer_Name=p.Computer_name) join master_table_list m on (m.Table_Name=p.List_of_Tables) where r.Mac_Address=? and m.Bucket_Number in ('1','2')
SELECT OS.Order_Submit_ID,O.Lab_Procedure, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Authorization_Required, OS.Specimen_In_House, OS.Order_Type, null, ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""), CAST(OS.Modified_Date_And_Time as CHAR(100)),ifnull(L.Lab_Name,' '),ifnull(LL.Location_Name,' '),w.current_process FROM orders_submit OS left join Orders o on Os.order_submit_id=o.order_submit_id left join lab L on (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) left join lab_location LL on (OS.Lab_Location_ID =LL.Lab_Location_ID) left join wf_object w on (w.obj_system_id=Os.order_submit_id and w.obj_type=os.order_type and w.current_process<>"DELETED_ORDER") where OS.Encounter_ID=? order by os.order_type desc;
select utc_timestamp()
SELECT ifnull(pi.insurance_type,''),ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,''), concat(pl.Physician_Prefix,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Suffix), c.carrier_name FROM human h left join pat_insured_plan pi on (h.human_id = pi.Human_ID and pi.Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' and pi.Active='Yes') left join insurance_plan i on (pi.Insurance_Plan_ID = i.Insurance_Plan_ID) left join encounter e on (h.Human_ID = e.Human_ID) left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = u.Physician_Library_ID) LEFT JOIN carrier c on (i.carrier_id = c.carrier_id) where h.human_id=? group by e.encounter_id
SELECT CONCAT(Procedure_Code,'-',Procedure_Code_Description) FROM in_house_procedure WHERE Encounter_ID=? AND Human_ID=? AND Physician_ID=? AND In_House_Procedure_Group_ID=?
select 'Patient ID','Patient Name','Patient DOB','Provider Name','Facility Name','Appointment Date','Date Of Service','Current Process','Current User','Current Arrival Time','PCP Name','PCP Telephone'
select h.human_id as PatientID,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as DOB, concat(p.Physician_Prefix ,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, w.Facility_name,cast(e.Appointment_date as char(100))as AppointmentDate,cast(e.Date_of_service as char(100))as DateofService,w.Current_process as CurrentProcess, w.Current_owner as CurrentOwner,cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100))as Arrival_time,concat(pl.Physician_Prefix ,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix) as PCPName, pl.Physician_Telephone as PCP_Telephone from wf_object w left join encounter e on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (h.human_id=e.human_id) left join physician_library p on (p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join pat_insured_plan I on (I.human_ID=h.human_ID and Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' and Active='YES') left join physician_library pl on (pl.Physician_Library_ID=I.PCP_ID) where e.Appointment_date between ? and ? and w.current_process like ? and w.current_owner like ? order by e.appointment_date asc
select h.human_id as PatientID,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as DOB, concat(p.Physician_Prefix ,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ', p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_Suffix) as PROVIDERNAME, w.Facility_name,cast(e.Appointment_date as char(100))as AppointmentDate,cast(e.Date_of_service as char(100))as DateofService,w.Current_process as CurrentProcess, w.Current_owner as CurrentOwner,cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100))as Arrival_time,concat(pl.Physician_Prefix ,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix) as PCPName, pl.Physician_Telephone as PCP_Telephone from wf_object_arc w left join encounter_arc e on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (h.human_id=e.human_id) left join physician_library p on (p.Physician_Library_ID=e.Encounter_Provider_ID) left join pat_insured_plan I on (I.human_ID=h.human_ID and Insurance_Type='PRIMARY' and Active='YES') left join physician_library pl on (pl.Physician_Library_ID=I.PCP_ID) where e.Appointment_date between ? and ? and w.current_process like ? and w.current_owner like ? order by e.appointment_date asc
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(created_date_and_time, '%d-%b-%Y %h:%i %p') FROM abi_results WHERE patient_id=?
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(created_date_and_time, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM spirometry WHERE patient_id=?
SELECT Insurance_Plan_ID,Insurance_Plan_Name,Carrier_ID,Payer_Rec_Code,Payer_Addrress1,Payer_Addrress2, Payer_City,Payer_State,Payer_Zip,Payer_Phone_Number,Eligibility_Phone_Number,Office_Number, Fax_Number,Payer_Notes,Form_Number,Format_File_Number,Emc_ID1, Emc_ID2,Govt_Type,Financial_Class_Name,Is_Workers_Comp,Active,External_Plan_Number,Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) , Modified_By,CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),Version FROM insurance_plan where Carrier_Id=? order by Modified_Date_And_Time desc limit ?,?;
SELECT count(*) FROM insurance_plan where Carrier_Id=?;
SELECT Procedure_Code,modifier,Procedure_Charge,Procedure_Allowed,Procedure_Adjust, Procedure_Code_Description, Procedure_Contract_ID,Procedure_CMN_Req,Procedure_Type,Procedure_Product_Code,CVX_Code, CVX_Code_Description, Created_By,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)), Modified_By, CAST(Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),Version FROM procedure_code_library where ((Procedure_Code like ? and Procedure_Code_Description like ?) and (Procedure_Code like ? )and (Procedure_Code_Description like ?)) and date_format(from_date,'%Y-%m-%d')<= ? and date_format(to_date,'%Y-%m-%d')>=?;
SELECT concat(Procedure_Code,'-',Procedure_Code_Description) FROM procedure_code_library where Is_Active='Y' and (Procedure_Code like ? or Procedure_Code_Description like ?);
SELECT concat(all_icd,'-',icd_description,'-',SUBSTRING_INDEX(ICD_Synonyms, '|', 1)) FROM `all_icd` where ((icd_description like ? or icd_synonyms like ? ) or all_icd like ?) and Leaf_Node= 'Y' and Is_Active='Y' and Version_Year='ICD_10';
SELECT e.exam_room FROM encounter e LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.encounter_id=e.encounter_id WHERE o.order_id=?;
SELECT file_name FROM abi_results WHERE in_house_procedure_id=?
SELECT file_name FROM spirometry WHERE in_house_procedure_id=?
SELECT w.WF_Object_Id FROM `wf_object` w LEFT JOIN orders_submit o ON (o.order_submit_id=w.obj_system_id AND o.order_type=w.obj_type) WHERE o.human_id=? AND o.encounter_id=? AND o.Physician_ID=?;
SELECT Long_Common_Name,Loinc_Num FROM loinc where (Long_Common_Name like ? and Loinc_Num like ?);
SELECT h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)) from human h where h.human_id = ?;
SELECT DISTINCT(w.WF_Object_Id),w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Process,l.Lab_Name,w.Obj_Type,os.Is_Submit_Immediately,cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)) as Date_And_Time ,os.Order_Code_Type FROM wf_object w LEFT JOIN orders_submit os ON w.obj_system_id=os.order_submit_id LEFT JOIN lab l ON os.lab_id=l.lab_id WHERE w.obj_type=? AND w.current_process IN (:CurrentProcess);
select wf_object_id from wf_object where obj_type=? and obj_system_id in (:WfobjSubIDs);
select * from orders_submit os , human h where h.human_id=os.human_id and os.orders_submit_id=? and os.human_id=? and h.Last_Name=? and h.First_Name=? and h.Birth_Date=?;
select group_concat(obr_observation_battery_identifier,'-',obr_observation_battery_text) from result_obr where result_master_id=?;
select * from orders where order_id in (:OrderId);
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, OS.Specimen_In_House, OS.Stat, OS.Fasting, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, O.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,OS.Specimen_Type,OS.Culture_Location,OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,ifnull(W.Current_Process,''),CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),OS.Temperature,O.Order_Submit_ID FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object W ON (O.Order_Submit_ID=W.Obj_System_ID and O.Order_Type=W.Obj_Type) WHERE O.Order_Type=? AND CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100))=?
select distinct(os.icd) from orders_assessment os join orders o on o.order_submit_id=os.order_submit_id where o.order_submit_id=?;
select appointmentDate,fac_name,carrier,plan, sum( case current when 'SCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'SCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'CANCELLED' then data else 0 end)as 'CANCELLED', sum( case current when 'NO_SHOW' then data else 0 end)as 'NO_SHOW', sum( case current when 'RESCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'RESCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'WALKED_AWAY' then data else 0 end)as 'WALKED_AWAY', sum( case current when 'MA_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'MA_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_REVIEW' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_REVIEW', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROMED_REPORT' then data else 0 end)as 'PROMED_REPORT', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING_2' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING_2', sum( case current when 'BILLING_COMPLETE' then data else 0 end)as 'BILLING_COMPLETE', sum( case current when 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' then data else 0 end)as 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' from (SELECT date_format(e.appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s') appointmentDate,e.Facility_Name as fac_name,c.carrier_name as carrier ,i.insurance_plan_name as plan,w.current_process as Current,count(*) data FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id and (w.obj_type='Encounter' or w.obj_type='Documentation' ) )left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join pat_insured_plan p on(e.human_id=p.human_id) left join insurance_plan i on(p.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id ) left join carrier c on(i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id) where (e.appointment_date between ? and ? and i.insurance_plan_name = ? and p.insurance_type='PRIMARY' and p.active='yes' and h.account_status='active') group by appointmentDate,w.current_process,e.Facility_Name,i.insurance_plan_name) as result group by appointmentDate,fac_name,plan
select appointmentDate,fac_name,carrier,plan, sum( case current when 'SCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'SCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'CANCELLED' then data else 0 end)as 'CANCELLED', sum( case current when 'NO_SHOW' then data else 0 end)as 'NO_SHOW', sum( case current when 'RESCHEDULED' then data else 0 end)as 'RESCHEDULED', sum( case current when 'WALKED_AWAY' then data else 0 end)as 'WALKED_AWAY', sum( case current when 'MA_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'MA_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_REVIEW' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_REVIEW', sum( case current when 'PROVIDER_PROCESS' then data else 0 end)as 'PROVIDER_PROCESS', sum( case current when 'PROMED_REPORT' then data else 0 end)as 'PROMED_REPORT', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING', sum( case current when 'REVIEW_CODING_2' then data else 0 end)as 'REVIEW_CODING_2', sum( case current when 'BILLING_COMPLETE' then data else 0 end)as 'BILLING_COMPLETE', sum( case current when 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' then data else 0 end)as 'CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION' from (SELECT date_format(e.appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s') appointmentDate,e.Facility_Name as fac_name,c.carrier_name as carrier,i.insurance_plan_name as plan,w.current_process as Current,count(*) data FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on (e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id and (w.obj_type='Encounter' or w.obj_type='Documentation' ) ) left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id)
left join pat_insured_plan p on(e.human_id=p.human_id) left join insurance_plan i on(p.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id and p.insurance_type='PRIMARY') left join carrier c on (i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id) where (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ) and p.insurance_type='PRIMARY' and p.active='yes' and h.account_status='active' group by appointmentDate,w.current_process,e.Facility_Name) as result group by appointmentDate,fac_name
select 'Appointment Date ','Facility Name','Carrier Name','Plan Name','Scheduled','Cancelled','NoShow', 'Rescheduled','Walked Away','MA_PROCESS', 'PROVIDER_REVIEW','PROVIDER_PROCESS','PROMED_REPORT','REVIEW_CODING','REVIEW_CODING_2','BILLING_COMPLETE','CODER_REVIEW_CORRECTION'
