SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,w.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,O.Reason_For_Referral,O.To_Physician_Name,O.To_Facility_Name,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,w.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,O.Reason_For_Referral,O.To_Physician_Name,O.To_Facility_Name,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,w.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,O.Reason_For_Referral,O.To_Physician_Name,O.To_Facility_Name,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,w.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,O.Reason_For_Referral,O.To_Physician_Name,O.To_Facility_Name,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT 0 as HealthCare_Questionnaire_ID, e.Questionnaire_Lookup_ID,e.Questionnaire_Category,e.Questionnaire_Type, e.Question,'' as Selected_Option,e.Lookup_Values as Possible_Options,'' as Notes,'' as CreatedBy,'0001-01-01 00:00:00' as CreatedDateandTime, '' as Modified_By,'0001-01-01 00:00:00' as Modified_Date_And_Time,0 as Version,0 as UpdateFlag,e.Normal_Question_Status as Normal_Question_Status,e.Is_Calculation_Required FROM questionnaire_lookup e where e.User_Name=? and e.Questionnaire_Category=? and ? > e.From_Months and ? <= e.To_Months order by e.Sort_Order;
select count(*) from patient_results v where v.human_id=? and v.Loinc_observation='Height' and v.encounter_id=?
select 'Encounter Id','Patient A/C No ' ,'External A/C No','Patient Name','Patient DOB','Home Phone No','Cell Phone No', 'Carrier','Insurance Plan','Appointment Facility','Appointment Phy #','Appointment Phy Name','Encounter Phy #','Encounter Phy Name','Date of Service','Appointment Date','Appointment Time','PCP Name','Created By','Purpose of Visit', 'Type of Visit','Current Process','Transportation Note','Reschedule Reason','Comments'
select e.Encounter_ID,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC ,(h.Patient_Account_External) as External_Account_Number, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,h.Home_Phone_No as Phone_No,h.Cell_Phone_Number as Cell_Phone_Number, c.carrier_name as carrier,i.insurance_plan_name as plan,w.Facility_Name,e.Appointment_Provider_ID, concat( d.Physician_Prefix,' ',d.Physician_First_Name,' ',d.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',d.Physician_Last_Name,' ', d.Physician_Suffix) as App_Physician_Name, e.encounter_provider_id,concat( s.Physician_Prefix,' ',s.Physician_First_Name,' ',s.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',s.Physician_Last_Name,' ', s.Physician_Suffix) as Enc_Physician_Name, cast(Date_of_Service as char(100)) as Date_of_Service,cast(DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s ') as char(100)) as Appointment_Date,concat( q.Physician_Prefix,' ',q.Physician_First_Name,' ',q.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',q.Physician_Last_Name,' ', q.Physician_Suffix) as PCP_Name, e.Created_By as Created_By,e.Purpose_of_Visit as Purpose_of_Visit,e.Visit_Type as Type_of_Visit, w.Current_Process as Current_Process,group_concat(distinct(p.Message_Description) separator ',')as notes,e.Reschedule_Reason_Text as Reschedule_Reason, group_concat(p.Notes separator ',') AS COMMENTS FROM wf_object w LEFT JOIN encounter e on (e.encounter_id =w.obj_system_id) left join human H on(e.human_id=h.Human_Id) left join Physician_Library d on (d.Physician_Library_ID=e.Appointment_Provider_ID) left join Physician_library s on(e.encounter_provider_id=s.physician_library_id) left join patient_notes p on(p.Human_Id=h.Human_Id) left join user u on (u.Physician_Library_ID=d.Physician_Library_ID) left join pat_insured_plan f on(e.human_id=f.human_id) left join physician_library q on (f.pcp_id=q.physician_library_id) left join insurance_plan i on(f.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id) left join carrier c on(i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id) where (e.Appointment_Date between ? and ? and f.insurance_type='PRIMARY') and i.insurance_plan_name like ? and w.Facility_Name like ? and e.Appointment_Provider_ID like ? and h.Human_Id like ? and f.PCP_ID like ? and e.encounter_provider_id like ? and c.Carrier_Name like ? and e.Created_by like ? and h.Account_Status='Active' and f.Active='Yes' and (w.Obj_Type in (:objList)) and (w.Current_process in (:CurrentList)) group by e.encounter_id order by e.Appointment_Date;
select ifnull(p.insurance_type,''),i.Insurance_Plan_ID,ifnull(i.Insurance_Plan_Name,'') ,c.carrier_code from human h left join pat_insured_plan p on(h.human_id=p.human_id)left join insurance_plan i on (p.Insurance_Plan_ID = i.Insurance_Plan_ID) LEFT JOIN carrier c on (i.carrier_id = c.carrier_id) where h.human_id=? and (p.insurance_type="PRIMARY" or p.insurance_type="Secondary") and p.active="YES"
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wf_object W LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON W.Obj_System_ID = OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN Orders O ON(O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID) LEFT JOIN Human H ON H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID WHERE W.Obj_Type = ? AND W.Facility_Name =? AND W.Current_Process LIKE ? AND (cast(OS.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) BETWEEN ? AND ?) AND OS.Lab_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Lab_Location_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Physician_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Human_ID LIKE ? AND OS.Order_Type LIKE ?
SELECT distinct l.Acurus_Result_Description,l.Acurus_Result_Code FROM acurus_results_mapping l where l.Acurus_Result_Description LIKE ?
SELECT distinct(i.icd) FROM e_m_coding_icd i left join e_m_coding e on (e.encounter_id=i.encounter_id) where e.encounter_id=? and e.procedure_code=? order by icd desc;
select 'Encounter_Id','Account#','Patient_Name','Date_Of_Birth','Member_Address','Home_Phone_No','Company','Insurance_Plan', 'PCP_Name','PCP_Phone_No','Facility' ,'Appointment_Date','Date_of_Service','Appointment_Physician','Encounter_Physician','Current_Process','G0438_Coded'
select distinct e.Encounter_Id, e.Human_Id as Account ,concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, concat('Dr. ',p1.physician_first_name,' ',p1.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p1.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No, e.facility_name as Facility, cast(e.appointment_date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as Date_of_Service, concat(p2.physician_prefix,' ',p2.physician_first_name,' ',p2.physician_last_name) as Appointment_Physician, concat(p3.physician_prefix,' ',p3.physician_first_name,' ',p3.physician_last_name) as Encounter_Physician, w.current_process as Current_Process,
d.procedure_code as G0438_Coded from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id left join pat_insured_plan p on e.human_id=p.human_id and p.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join e_m_coding d on e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and d.procedure_code='G0438' left join physician_library p1 on h.encounter_provider_id=p1.physician_library_id left join physician_library p2 on e.appointment_provider_id=p2.physician_library_id left join physician_library p3 on e.encounter_provider_id=p3.physician_library_id where ((e.date_of_service between ? and ? ) and h.Account_Status like ? and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete')) and w.obj_type='encounter') or (e.facility_name='HOUSE CALL VISIT' and (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ))
select 'Account#','Patient_Name','Date_Of_Birth','Member_Address','Home_Phone_No','Company','Insurance_Plan','PCP_ID', 'PCP_Name','PCP_Phone_No'
select h.Human_Id as Account, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No from human h left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where h.human_id not in (SELECT distinct human_id FROM encounter e where ((e.date_of_service between ? and ? ) and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete'))) or (e.facility_name='HOUSE CALL VISIT' and (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ))) and h.Account_Status like ?
select 'Encounter_Id','Account#','Patient_Name','Date_Of_Birth','Member_Address','Home_Phone_No','Company','Insurance_Plan', 'PCP_Name','PCP_Phone_No','Facility' ,'Appointment_Date','Date_of_Service','Appointment_Physician','Encounter_Physician','Current_Process','G0438_Coded'
select distinct e.Encounter_Id, e.Human_Id,concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, concat('Dr. ',p1.physician_first_name,' ',p1.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p1.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No, e.facility_name as Facility, cast(e.appointment_date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) as Date_of_Service, concat(p2.physician_prefix,' ',p2.physician_first_name,' ',p2.physician_last_name) as Appointment_Physician, concat(p3.physician_prefix,' ',p3.physician_first_name,' ',p3.physician_last_name) as Encounter_Physician, w.current_process as Current_Process, d.procedure_code as G0438_Coded from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id left join pat_insured_plan p on e.human_id=p.human_id and p.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join e_m_coding d on e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and d.procedure_code='G0438' left join physician_library p1 on h.encounter_provider_id=p1.physician_library_id left join physician_library p2 on e.appointment_provider_id=p2.physician_library_id left join physician_library p3 on e.encounter_provider_id=p3.physician_library_id where (e.date_of_service between ? and ?) and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete')) and w.obj_type='encounter' and h.Account_Status like ?
select 'Account#','Patient_Name','Date_Of_Birth','Member_Address','Home_Phone_No','Company','Insurance_Plan','PCP_ID', 'PCP_Name','PCP_Phone_No'
select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No from human h left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where h.human_id not in (SELECT distinct human_id FROM encounter e where (e.date_of_service between ? and ? ) and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete'))) and h.Account_Status like ?
select distinct to_process from workflow where Obj_Type in ('encounter','documentation','document review') order by to_process
SELECT Count(*) FROM insurance_plan where Insurance_Plan_Name=? and Payer_Addrress1=? and Carrier_ID=? and Payer_City=? and Payer_State=? and Payer_Zip=? and Insurance_Plan_ID <> ?;
Select a.Lab_Result_Code,a.Lab_Result_Description, (SELECT r.Units FROM result_reference_interval r WHERE a.Acurus_Result_Code=r.Acurus_Result_Code AND r.gender = ? AND ? between From_Age_Days and To_Age_Days), (SELECT r.Range FROM result_reference_interval r WHERE a.Acurus_Result_Code=r.Acurus_Result_Code AND r.gender = ? AND ? between From_Age_Days and To_Age_Days), a.Acurus_Result_Code,a.Acurus_Result_Description,a.Order_Code,a.Order_Code_Description FROM Acurus_Results_Mapping a where a.Order_Code = ? and a.Lab_ID= ? group by Acurus_Result_Code order by Sort_Order asc;
Select r.*,s.* from result_master s,result_obr r,result_zps z where s.result_master_id=r.result_master_id and s.result_master_id=z.result_master_id and s.PID_External_Patient_ID= ? and s. order_id<>0
select 'Patient AccNo ','Patient Name','Home Phone','Work Phone','Stop Date', 'Brand Name','Generic Name','Strength' ,'Refills'
select h.Human_Id,concat(h.Last_Name,h.First_Name),h.Home_Phone_No,h.Work_Phone_No,cast(r.Stop_Date as char(100)) as Stop_Date,r.Brand_Name, r.Generic_Name,r.Strength,r.Refills FROM `rcopia_prescription` r, human h,user u where h.human_id=r.human_id and r.last_modified_by=u.RCopia_User_Name and u.Physician_Library_ID=? and r.Stop_Date between ? and ? order by r.Stop_Date asc;
select Id,master_id,context,phrases,user_name,CreatedBy,Created_Date_And_Time,Modified_By,Modified_Date_And_Time,Sort_Order from (select p.Template_Phrases_ID as Id,p.Template_Master_ID as master_id,p.Context as context,p.Phrases as phrases,p.User_Name as user_name,p.Created_By as CreatedBy, CAST(p.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time,p.Modified_By as Modified_By, CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)) as Modified_Date_And_Time,p.Sort_Order as Sort_Order from template_phrases p left join template_master t on p.Template_Master_ID=t.Template_Master_ID where (p.Template_Master_ID=? and p.Context=? ) or t.Template_Name like 'ALL' order by p.User_Name,p.Phrases) as d where Context=? and user_name in (:UserName);
SELECT m.Template_Master_ID,m.Template_Name,m.User_Name,m.Created_By,cast(m.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),m.Modified_By, cast(m.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),m.Sort_Order FROM template_master m left join template_phrases p on (m.Template_Master_Id=p.Template_Master_Id) where (m.Template_Name like ? or p.Phrases like ?) and (m.User_Name in(:UserName)) group by m.Template_Name,m.User_Name order by m.User_Name,m.Template_Name;
SELECT Phrases FROM template_master where Template_Name=?
SELECT r.result_master_id myid,Order_ID,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time ,(select OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time from result_obr where result_master_id=myid limit 1), (select group_concat(OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",o.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text) from result_obr o where o.result_master_id=myid), (select Order_Type from orders_submit where Order_Submit_ID=r.Order_ID),r.Is_Electronic_Mode,r.msh_date_and_time_of_message FROM `result_master` r where r.Matching_Patient_ID =? or r.order_id=? order by result_Received_Date desc;
SELECT r.result_master_id myid,Order_ID,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time ,(select OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time from result_obr where result_master_id=myid limit 1), (select group_concat(OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",o.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text) from result_obr o where o.result_master_id=myid), (select Order_Type from orders_submit where Order_Submit_ID=r.Order_ID),r.Is_Electronic_Mode,r.msh_date_and_time_of_message FROM `result_master` r where r.Matching_Patient_ID =? order by result_Received_Date desc;
SELECT O.Immunization_Group_ID,group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,O.Reason_For_Referral,h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,O.To_Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id;
select 'Form Required','Form Available','Appointment Date','Patient A/C No','Patient Name','Patient DOB','Home Phone No', 'Test ID','CPT','Ordering Physician','Ordering Clinic'
SELECT if(form_Required='Y',concat(form_name ),'') as Form_Required ,r.Form_Available, cast(DATE_FORMAT(e.appointment_date,'%Y-%b-%d %H:%i:%s ') as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, (h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,h.Home_Phone_No as Phone_No,r.Order_Id as Order_ID,r.CPT as cpt, concat( s.Physician_Prefix,' ',s.Physician_First_Name,' ',s.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',s.Physician_Last_Name,' ', s.Physician_Suffix) as Enc_Physician_Name, w.Facility_Name FROM `orders_required_forms` r left join orders o on (r.Order_ID=o.Order_ID) left join encounter e on (e.Encounter_ID=o.CMG_Encounter_ID) left join Physician_library s on(o.Physician_ID=s.physician_library_id) left join wf_object w on (o.Order_Submit_ID =w.obj_system_id) left join human h on(e.human_id=h.Human_Id) where ((e.Appointment_Date between ? and ?) and Obj_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' and form_Required='Y') order by e.Appointment_Date,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,CPT;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.Person_Name, OS.Lab_Name, OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,Os.Lab_ID,Os.Lab_Location_ID,Os.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id,cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,"","",w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (OS.Order_submit_id=O.Order_submit_id) left join human H on OS.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name)
where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,p.person_name, OS.Lab_Name, OS.Lab_Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,Os.Lab_ID,Os.Lab_Location_ID,Os.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,OS.Order_submit_id,cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,"","",w.Is_abnormal,OS.Test_Date from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (OS.Order_submit_id=O.Order_submit_id) left join human H on OS.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join user p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name)
where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
select o.procedure_code,o.procedure_code_description from authorization_procedure o left join authorization_encounter wf on (o.authorization_procedure_id = wf.authorization_procedure_id) where wf.encounter_id=? and o.is_delete='N';
select o.order_id,o.lab_procedure,o.lab_procedure_description from orders o left join wf_object wf on (o.Order_Submit_ID = wf.Obj_System_Id) where o.encounter_id=? and o.order_code_type=? and wf.Current_Process<>'DELETED_ORDER' and wf.obj_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER';
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.first_name,h.mi,h.last_name, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,h.Patient_Status,e.File_Reference_Number FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and u.process_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID;
SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID;
SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.facility_name=:FacName and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID;
SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.facility_name=:FacName and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,h.Patient_Status,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,w.Current_Process,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),w.current_owner FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where e.Appointment_Provider_ID=? and (w.Current_Process in (:ObjList));
delete from audit_log where month(transaction_date_and_time) <> month(current_date());
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id where (e.date_of_service between ? and ? and encounter_provider_id=? and ((w.current_process ='REVIEW_CODING' or w.current_process='BILLING_WAIT') and w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION'))
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_Group_Counseling' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_Other_Serivces' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_ Services_18_and_older' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_40_&_Older' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_Individual_Counseling' and nqf_number =0028)))group by m.human_id
select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding m where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Health_and_ Behavior_Assessment' and nqf_number =0028) or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Occupational_Therapy' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Office_Visit' and nqf_number =0028)or (Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Psychiatric_&_Psychologic'and nqf_number =0028)))
select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Health_and_ Behavior_Assessment' and nqf_number =0028) or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Occupational_Therapy' and nqf_number =0028) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Office_Visit' and nqf_number =0028)or (Standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Psychiatric_&_Psychologic'and nqf_number =0028))
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') <DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >=18 and human_id in(:HumanIds) group by human_id
SELECT human_id from social_history where human_id in (:HumanIds) and social_info = 'Tobacco Use and Exposure' and is_present='Y' group by human_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Tobacco_Use_Cessation_Counseling' and nqf_number =0028)))group by m.human_id
select e.encounter_id from encounter e left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id where (e.date_of_service between ? and ? and encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_id in (:HumanIds) and ((w.current_process ='REVIEW_CODING' or w.current_process='BILLING_WAIT') and w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION')) group by e.encounter_id
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') <DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 18 and 65 and human_id in(:HumanIds) group by human_id
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) > 65 and human_id in(:HumanIds) group by human_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient_CPT_with_Clinician' and nqf_number =0421) or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient_HCPCS_with_Clinician' and nqf_number =0421) or(standard_concept='follow-up_plan_BMI_management' and nqf_number =0421))) group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from assessment m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.human_id in (:HumanIds) and m.icd not in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Terminal_Illness' and nqf_number =0421) or (standard_concept='pregnancy' and nqf_number =0421))) group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from problem_list m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.human_id in (:HumanIds) and m.icd not in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Terminal_Illness' and nqf_number =0421) or (standard_concept='pregnancy' and nqf_number =0421))) group by m.human_id
SELECT m.human_id FROM `patient_results` where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.human_id in (:HumanIds) and (loinc_observation="height" or loinc_observation="Weight") and value="" and Notes <>"" group by m.human_id
SELECT human_id,cast(max(captured_date_and_time)as char(100)) FROM `patient_results` where captured_date_and_time between ? and ? and human_id in (:HumanIds) group by human_id
select value,encounter_id from patient_results where encounter_id in(:EncIds) and loinc_observation='BMI' group by encounter_id
select encounter_id from encounter where (Return_In_Months !=0 or Return_In_Weeks !=0 or Return_In_Days !=0 or Is_Document_Given ='YES') and encounter_id in (:EncIds) group by encounter_id
SELECT * FROM referral_order where encounter_id in (:EncIds)
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.human_id in (:HumanIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Nursing_Facility' and nqf_number=0013) or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient' and nqf_number=0013))) group by m.encounter_id
select m.human_id from assessment m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.icd in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Hypertension' and nqf_number=0013))) group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from problem_list m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.icd in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Hypertension' and nqf_number=0013))) group by m.human_id
select human_id from patient_results where(loinc_observation ='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' or loinc_observation ='BP-Standing Sys/Dia' or loinc_observation ='BP-Lying Sys/Dia' ) and value <> "" and encounter_id in (:EncIds) group by human_id
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') <DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) between 2 and 17 and human_id in(:HumanIds) group by human_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code not in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Ob/Gyn' and nqf_number=0024)or(standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient' and nqf_number=0024))) group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from assessment m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.icd not in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Ob/Gyn' and nqf_number=0024) or (standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient' and nqf_number=0024))) group by m.human_id

select m.human_id from assessment m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.icd in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='BMI_percentile' and nqf_number=0024))) group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from assessment m where m.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.icd in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='counseling_for_physical_activity' and nqf_number=0024) and (standard_concept='counseling_for_nutrition' and nqf_number=0024))) group by m.human_id
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id where (e.date_of_service between ? and ? and encounter_provider_id=? and ((w.current_process ='REVIEW_CODING' or w.current_process='BILLING_WAIT') and w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION'))
select human_id from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') <DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >=1 and human_id in(:HumanIds) group by human_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Outpatient' and nqf_number =0041)))group by m.human_id
select m.human_id from e_m_coding m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='ENCOUNTER_Prev_Med_40_&_Older' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med 40 and Older' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Group Counseling' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med-Individual counseling' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Prev Med Other Services' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Nursing Facility' and nqf_number =0041) or(standard_concept='Encounter Nursing Discharge' and nqf_number =0041)))group by m.encounter_id

select m.human_id from immunization_history m where m.human_id in(:HumanIds) and m.Procedure_code in (select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Influenza_Vaccination' and nqf_number =0041)))group by m.human_id

select human_id,cast(birth_date as char(100)) from human where DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '%Y')- (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') <DATE_FORMAT(birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) >=65 and human_id in(:HumanIds) and Sex='FEMALE' group by human_id

SELECT i.human_id FROM `immunization` i left join human h on (h.human_id=i.human_id) where ((i.given_Date > h.birth_Date+42) or (i.given_date = '') or (i.given_Date='0001-01-01')) and i.human_id in (:HumanIds) group by i.human_id
select m.human_id from immunization_history m where m.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and m.Procedure_Code in(select pqri_value from cqm_data where ((standard_concept='Dtap_Vaccination' and nqf_number=0038))) group by m.human_id
SELECT i.human_id FROM `immunization_history` i left join human h on (h.human_id=i.human_id) where ((cast(i.Administered_Date as DATETIME)as Administered_Date > h.birth_Date+42) or (i.Administered_Date = '') or (i.Administered_Date='0001-01-01')) and i.human_id in (:HumanIds) group by i.human_id

select h.human_id,concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No,w.current_process,e.encounter_id,w.obj_system_id
from encounter e left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where e.appointment_date between ? and ? and w.current_process='scheduled' and obj_type='encounter' and h.Account_Status=?
select h.human_id,concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No,w.current_process,e.encounter_id,w.obj_system_id
from encounter e left join wf_object w on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where e.appointment_date between ? and ? and w.current_process='scheduled' and obj_type='encounter' and e.facility_name!='HOUSE CALL VISIT' and h.Account_Status=?
select h.Human_Id as Account, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No from human h left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where h.human_id not in (SELECT distinct human_id FROM encounter e where ((e.date_of_service between ? and ? ) and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete','SCHEDULED'))) or (e.facility_name='HOUSE CALL VISIT' and (e.appointment_date between ? and ? ))) and h.Account_Status like ?
select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth, concat(h.street_address1,', ',h.city,', ',h.state,', ',h.zipcode) as Member_Address, h.home_phone_no as Home_Phone_No, c.carrier_name as Company, i.insurance_plan_name as Insurance_Plan, h.encounter_provider_id as PCP_ID, concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name, p.physician_telephone as PCP_Phone_No from human h left join pat_insured_plan p1 on h.human_id=p1.human_id and p1.insurance_type='primary' left join insurance_plan i on p1.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id left join carrier c on i.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join physician_library p on h.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id where h.human_id not in (SELECT distinct human_id FROM encounter e where (e.date_of_service between ? and ? ) and e.encounter_id in (select obj_system_id from wf_object where obj_type='encounter' and current_process in ('check_out','check_out_wait','billing_wait','billing_complete','SCHEDULED'))) and h.Account_Status like ?
select order_submit_id,lab_Id from orders_submit where lab_id in (1,2) and encounter_id=?
select order_submit_id,lab_Id from orders_submit where lab_id in (1,2) and physician_id=? and human_id=?;
select Order_id ,Lab_Procedure from orders where order_submit_id in (:OrderSubmitList)
select order_submit_id,icd from orders_assessment where order_submit_id in (:OrderSubmitList)
select Order_id ,Lab_Procedure,Lab_Procedure_description from orders where order_submit_id in (:OrderSubmitList)
SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name,p.Physician_Middle_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name,p.Physician_Suffix,p.Encounter_Mode,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type from encounter a left join wf_object w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where a.Appointment_Date between ? and ? and a.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and a.Appointment_Provider_ID in (:PhyList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED'
SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name,p.Physician_Middle_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name,p.Physician_Suffix, a.Facility_Name ,p.Encounter_Mode,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type from encounter a left join wf_object w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type='ENCOUNTER') left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where a.Appointment_Date between ? and ? and a.Appointment_Provider_ID in (:PhyList) and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED'
SELECT Block_Days_ID, Physician_ID, Facility_Name, Cast(Block_Date as char(100)), From_Time, To_Time, cast(From_Date_Choosen as char(100)), cast(To_Date_Choosen as char(100)), Reason, Day_Choosen, Block_Type, Created_By, Modified_By, Version from block_days b where b.From_Date_Choosen=? and b.To_Date_Choosen=? and b.Physician_ID=? and b.Facility_Name in (:FacList)
Select m.Message_Type from message m where m.Human_ID = ?
SELECT Cast(m.Message_Date as char(100)),m.Created_By,m.Message_Type,m.Message_Text,m.Charge_PP_Line_ID,m.Statement_ChargeLine_ID from message m where m.charge_pp_line_id <>0 and Human_Id = ? and m.Message_Type =?
SELECT Cast(m.Message_Date as char(100)),m.Created_By,m.Message_Type,m.Message_Text,m.Charge_PP_Line_ID,m.Statement_ChargeLine_ID from message m where m.Human_ID = ?
SELECT ch.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,',',h.First_Name,' ',h.MI),cl.Charge_Line_Item_Id,cl.Pat_Insured_Plan_ID, ch.Encounter_ID,cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,cl.Procedure_Code,cl.Modifier1,cl.Units,ch.Charge_Header_ID, cl.Charge_Amount,concat(ch.Diagnosis1,',',ch.Diagnosis2,',',ch.Diagnosis3,',',ch.Diagnosis4,',',ch.Diagnosis5,',', ch.Diagnosis6,',',ch.Diagnosis7,',',ch.Diagnosis8,',',ch.Diagnosis9,',',ch.Diagnosis10,',',ch.Diagnosis11,',', ch.Diagnosis12) FROM charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header ch on (ch.Charge_Header_ID =cl.Charge_Header_ID) left join human h on (h.human_id=ch.human_id)where ch.Human_ID=?
select distinct m.Facility_Name from map_facility_physician m
select e.encounter_id,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as AppointmentDateandTime,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id, h.Patient_Account_External,concat(h.Last_Name,'',h.First_Name,'',h.MI,'')as Patient_Name,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate, e.Visit_Type,e.Facility_Name,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'',p.Physician_First_Name,'',p.Physician_Middle_Name,'',p.Physician_Last_Name,'',p.Physician_Suffix,'') as Appointment_Physician_Name, wf.Current_Process,e.Appointment_Provider_ID from encounter e left join human h on (e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (e.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join wf_object wf on(e.encounter_id=wf.Obj_System_Id) where wf.Current_Owner=? and wf.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION' and wf.current_Process='PROVIDER_PROCESS_ELECTRONIC'
SELECT concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name) as patientname,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)),h.sex,h.Marital_Status,h.Patient_Status,h.Human_Type,h.Home_Phone_No,h.Cell_Phone_Number,h.Encounter_Provider_ID from human h where h.Human_ID=?
SELECT distinct b.Doc_Type from batch_encounter_human_map b
SELECT distinct b.Doc_Sub_Type from batch_encounter_human_map b where b.Doc_Type=?
SELECT b.Batch_ID, b.Batch_Name,sum(a.Amount),b.Batch_Total_Rcvd,b.Num_of_Checks_Rcvd,cast(b.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),b.Doc_Type,b.Doc_Sub_Type,b.DOOS,b.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,w.Current_Process, b.Scan_File_Path_Name,b.Scan_File_Name FROM wf_object_billing w, batch b LEFT JOIN account_transaction a on (a.Batch_ID =b.Batch_ID) where b.Batch_Name like ? and b.Doc_Type=? and b.Doc_Sub_Type=? and b.DOOS=? group by b.Batch_ID
select c.Encounter_ID,w.Obj_Type,w.Current_Process,cl.Charge_Amount, cl.charge_line_item_id, cast(cl.From_DOS as char(100)), cl.Procedure_Code, cl.Modifier1,cl.Units, c.Charge_Header_ID, concat(p.Physician_First_Name,',',p.Physician_Middle_Name,',',p.Physician_Last_Name), concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name),h.Human_ID,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)),h.Sex,h.SSN from human h left join charge_header c on (h.human_id=c.human_id) LEFT JOIN charge_line_item cl on (c.Charge_Header_ID =cl.Charge_Header_ID) LEFT JOIN physician_library p on (cl.Rendering_Provider_ID =p.Physician_Library_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object_billing w on (cl.charge_line_item_id =w.Obj_System_Id) where c.Batch_ID=? and w.obj_type="CHARGE_LINE_ITEM"
SELECT w.wf_object_id FROM wf_object_billing w where obj_system_id=? and obj_type='WORKSET'
SELECT c.claim_header_id,c.payer,c.human_id,c.patient_name,cast(c.patient_dob as char(100)), concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,',',p.Physician_Middle_Name,',',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), c.Total_Charge,c.Balance_Due FROM claim_header c,human h,claim_line_item l,physician_library p where c.claim_headeR_id=l.claim_header_id and c.human_id=h.human_id and c.claim_status='OPEN' and l.rendering_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and c.human_id like ? and l.from_dos like ? and l.procedure_code like ? and p.physician_last_name like ? group by c.claim_header_id;
SELECT count(*) FROM insurance_plan i left join carrier c on(i.Carrier_ID = c.Carrier_ID) where i.Insurance_Plan_ID like ? and c.Carrier_Name like ? and i.payer_city like ? and i.payer_zip like ? and i.Insurance_Plan_Name like ?
SELECT i.Insurance_Plan_ID,c.Carrier_Name,i.Insurance_Plan_Name,i.Payer_Addrress1,i.Payer_City,i.Payer_State, i.Payer_Zip,i.payer_phone_number,i.Financial_Class_Name,c.Carrier_id FROM insurance_plan i left join carrier c on(i.Carrier_ID = c.Carrier_ID) where i.Insurance_Plan_ID like ? and c.Carrier_Name like ? and i.payer_city like ? and i.payer_zip like ? and i.Insurance_Plan_Name like ? limit ?,?
select p.Type,p.Source,p.SourceID,p.Human_ID,concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name) as patientname,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)),CAST(p.Message_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),p.Message_Description,p.Facility_Name, p.Assigned_To,CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),p.Modified_By,p.notes,p.Priority,cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Created_By from patient_notes p left join human h on (p.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) where p.Type="TASK" and p.Created_By=? and p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select p.Type,p.Source,p.SourceID,p.Human_ID,concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name) as patientname,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)),CAST(p.Message_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),p.Message_Description,p.Facility_Name, p.Assigned_To,CAST(p.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),p.Modified_By,p.Notes,p.Priority,cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Created_By from patient_notes p left join human h on (p.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) where p.Type="TASK" and p.Human_ID=? order by CAST(p.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) desc;
select pl.insurance_plan_name,c.Encounter_ID,cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,cl.Procedure_Code,cl.Modifier1,cl.Units,c.Diagnosis1,c.Diagnosis2,c.Diagnosis3,c.Diagnosis4,c.Diagnosis5,c.Diagnosis6,c.Diagnosis7,c.Diagnosis8,c.Diagnosis9,c.Diagnosis10,c.Diagnosis11,c.Diagnosis12, c.Charge_Header_ID, cl.Charge_Line_Item_ID, cl.Charge_Amount from charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header c on (cl.Charge_Header_ID =c.Charge_Header_ID) join pat_insured_plan p on (p.human_id=c.human_id) join insurance_plan pl on (pl.insurance_plan_id=p.insurance_plan_id) where c.Human_ID=? and p.insurance_type='PRIMARY';
SELECT p.Human_ID,p.Assigned_To,p.Relationship,p.Facility_Name,p.Caller_Name,p.Message_Orign,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Message_Description,p.Notes,Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Created_By,p.Type,p.Source,p.SourceID,p.Priority,p.Line_ID,p.Modified_By,Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) from patient_notes p where p.human_id=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
SELECT distinct u.user_name FROM map_facility_physician m,user u where m.physician_id=u.physician_library_id and m.Facility_Name=?;
SELECT m.Physician_ID FROM map_facility_physician m where m.Facility_Name=?;
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select distinct u.Value from user_lookup u where u.Field_Name="MESSAGE DESCRIPTION" and u.User_Name=?;
select distinct u.Value from user_lookup u where u.Field_Name="MESSAGE NOTES" AND u.User_Name=?;
SELECT distinct u.user_name FROM map_facility_physician m,user u where m.physician_id=u.physician_library_id ;
select p.Guarantor_human_id,concat(ifnull(h.Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(h.Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(h.First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(h.MI,''),' ', ifnull(h.Suffix,'')) as Name ,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,h.home_phone_no,h.work_phone_no,h.cell_phone_number,p.relationship, cast(p.from_date as char(100)) as fromDate, cast(p.to_date as char(100)) as todate,p.active,p.pat_guarantor_id as ID from pat_guarantor p inner join human h on (p.guarantor_human_id=h.human_id) where p.guarantor_human_id in ( select guarantor_human_id from pat_guarantor where human_id=?) and p.human_id=? order by active desc, to_date desc;
select w.facility_name,e.Encounter_Provider_ID from wf_object w,encounter e where (w.current_process='REVIEW_CODING' and w.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION') and w.Obj_System_Id=e.encounter_id and e.encounter_provider_id>0 group by w.facility_name,e.Encounter_Provider_ID;
select p.Is_PopupEnable from patient_notes p where p.Is_PopupEnable="Y" and p.Human_ID=?;
SELECT P.Human_ID,P.Prefix,P.Last_Name,P.First_Name,P.MI,P.Suffix, cast(p.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,P.SSN,p.Account_Status from human p where ((P.Last_Name like ? and P.First_Name like ?)) and P.Birth_Date like ? and p.Human_ID like ? order by P.Last_Name, P.First_Name,P.Birth_Date
select carrier_id,carrier_code,carrier_name from carrier where carrier_name like ?
SELECT WF_Object_ID FROM `WF_Object_Billing` where Obj_System_ID=? and Obj_Type='WORKSET'
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM exception where Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM call_log where Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM qc_error where Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(amount) FROM `account_transaction` where Batch_ID=? and WF_Object_ID<>?
SELECT Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Source,p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Priority,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By,Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.SourceID, p.Batch_Id, p.Carrier_Id, p.Type, p.Message_Code from patient_notes p where p.human_id=? and p.Line_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
SELECT H.Human_ID,concat(H.Prefix,' ',H.First_Name,' ',H.MI,' ',H.Last_Name,' ',H.Suffix), cast(H.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,ifnull(A.Auth_No,''),cast(A.From_Date as char(100)), cast(To_Date as char(100)),A.referred_to_specialty,A.referred_to_facility, A.number_of_visits_approved,A.number_of_visits_approved-A.number_of_visits_used,A.Is_Active,A.Authorization_ID,A.pcp_id,A.referred_to_provider_id,
(select ifnull(I.Insurance_Plan_Name,'') from insurance_plan I where A.Insurance_Plan_ID=I.Insurance_Plan_ID and A.insurance_plan_id like ?),
(select concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP from physician_library p where A.pcp_id=p.physician_library_id and A.pcp_id like ?),
(select concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as RefToPhyName from physician_library p where A.referred_to_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and A.referred_to_provider_id like ?)
from Authorization A,Human H where A.Human_ID=H.Human_ID and A.Is_Active="Y" and H.Human_ID =? and A.Auth_No like ? and A.Referred_To_Facility like ? and A.Insurance_plan_id like ? and A.referred_to_provider_id like ? and A.pcp_id like ?
SELECT H.Human_ID,concat(H.Prefix,' ',H.First_Name,' ',H.MI,' ',H.Last_Name,' ',H.Suffix), cast(H.Birth_Date as char(100)) as BirthDate,ifnull(A.Auth_No,''),cast(A.From_Date as char(100)), cast(To_Date as char(100)),A.referred_to_specialty,A.referred_to_facility, A.number_of_visits_approved,A.number_of_visits_approved-A.number_of_visits_used,A.Is_Active,A.Authorization_ID,A.pcp_id,A.referred_to_provider_id,
(select ifnull(I.Insurance_Plan_Name,'') from insurance_plan I where A.Insurance_Plan_ID=I.Insurance_Plan_ID and A.insurance_plan_id like ?),
(select concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP from physician_library p where A.pcp_id=p.physician_library_id and A.pcp_id like ?),
(select concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as RefToPhyName from physician_library p where A.referred_to_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and A.referred_to_provider_id like ?)
from Authorization A,Human H where A.Human_ID=H.Human_ID and H.Human_ID =? and A.Auth_No like ? and A.Referred_To_Facility like ? and A.Insurance_plan_id like ? and A.referred_to_provider_id like ? and A.pcp_id like ?
SELECT distinct m.physician_id,p.physician_last_name,p.physician_first_name,p.physician_middle_name,p.physician_prefix FROM physician_library p,map_facility_physician m where p.Physician_Library_ID=m.physician_id and m.Status LIKE 'Y%'
SELECT concat(Physician_Last_Name,',',Physician_First_Name),Physician_Library_ID FROM physician_library where Physician_Library_ID=?
SELECT c.claim_header_id,c.payer,c.human_id,c.patient_name,cast(c.patient_dob as char(100)), concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,',',p.Physician_Middle_Name,',',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), c.Total_Charge,c.Balance_Due FROM claim_header c,human h,claim_line_item l,physician_library p where c.claim_headeR_id=l.claim_header_id and c.human_id=h.human_id and c.claim_status='OPEN' and l.rendering_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and c.human_id like ? and c.patient_name like ? and c.patient_dob like ? and h.ssn like ? and l.from_dos like ? and l.procedure_code like ? and p.physician_last_name like ? group by c.claim_header_id;
select CAST( p.created_date_and_time as char(100)),c.Carrier_Name, p.Unapplied_DOS, concat( l.Physician_Prefix,' ',l.Physician_First_Name,' ' ,l.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',l.Physician_Last_Name,' ', l.Physician_Suffix)as name,p.batch_name, p.Comments ,p.payment_id ,p.amount,p.pp_line_item_id,p.check_table_int_id,p.Batch_ID,p.Carrier_ID from pp_line_item p left join physician_library l on(p.Unapplied_Physician_ID=l.physician_library_id) left join Carrier c on(p.Carrier_ID=c.Carrier_ID) where p.line_type='unapplied' and p.amount<>0.00 and p.human_id=?
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM exception where Chk_Int_War_No=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM call_log where Chk_Int_War_No=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM qc_error where Chk_Int_War_No=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(amount) FROM `account_transaction` where Batch_ID=? and WF_Object_ID<>? and Payment_ID =?
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM exception where Chk_Int_War_No =? and Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM call_log where Chk_Int_War_No =? and Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM qc_error where Chk_Int_War_No =? and Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(amount) FROM `account_transaction` where Batch_ID=? and WF_Object_ID<>? and Payment_ID =? and Human_ID=?
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM exception where Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM call_log where Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(worksetamt) FROM qc_error where Account_Number=? and Parent_Object_ID in (:WFList)
SELECT sum(amount) FROM `account_transaction` where Batch_ID=? and WF_Object_ID<>? and Human_ID=?
select contract_amount from insurance_contract_amount where insurance_plan_id=? and Procedure_code=? and physician_id=?
SELECT medicare_percentage FROM `medicare_physician_contract` where physician_id=?;
SELECT Rate FROM `medicare_rate` where CPT=?;
SELECT sum(Amount) FROM account_transaction WHERE Charge_Line_Item_ID = ? and source_type='pp_line_item' and line_type<>'WRITEOFF'
Select SUM(a.Amount) from PP_Line_Item a where a.Charge_Line_Item_ID =? and a.Claim_Type='PATIENT' and (a.Line_Type='COPAY' or a.Line_Type='COINSURANCE' or a.Line_Type='DEDUCTIBLE') group by a.Charge_Line_Item_ID order by a.PP_Line_Item_ID
select c.Carrier_Patient_Name,c.Encounter_ID,c.Payment_Amount from `checks` c where c.Encounter_ID in (:EncID);
SELECT p.insurance_plan_id,p.human_id FROM `pat_insured_plan` p where p.human_id in (:HumanID);
SELECT wf.obj_system_id,wf.current_process from wf_object wf where wf.obj_system_id in (:ObjSystemId) and wf.obj_type='DOCUMENTATION';
select concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix,'') as Appointment_Physician_Name, e.Facility_Name,CAST(e.Appointment_Date AS CHAR(100)) as Appointment_Date,h.Last_Name,h.Suffix,h.First_Name,h.MI,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Street_Address1, h.City,h.State,h.ZipCode,e.Human_ID,e.Encounter_ID,h.Past_Due,v.Method_of_Payment,v.Check_Card_No,v.Patient_Payment,v.Payment_Note,if(v.modified_date_and_time = '0001-01-01 00:00:00', cast(v.created_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(v.modified_date_and_time as char(100))) as Date_Payment, v.Refund_Amount,v.Rec_on_Acc,v.Amount_Paid_By,v.Created_By,CAST(e.Date_of_service AS CHAR(100)) as Date_of_service,v.visit_payment_id as visit_payment_id,h.Patient_Account_External
from encounter e left join human h on(e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on(e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id) left join visit_payment v on(e.encounter_id=v.encounter_id) where e.human_id=? and e.encounter_id=? and v.is_delete='N' union all select concat(p.Physician_Prefix,'',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix,'') as Appointment_Physician_Name, e.Facility_Name,CAST(e.Appointment_Date AS CHAR(100)) as Appointment_Date,h.Last_Name,h.Suffix,h.First_Name,h.MI,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Street_Address1, h.City,h.State,h.ZipCode,e.Human_ID,e.Encounter_ID,h.Past_Due,v.Method_of_Payment,v.Check_Card_No,v.Patient_Payment,v.Payment_Note,if(v.modified_date_and_time = '0001-01-01 00:00:00', cast(v.created_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(v.modified_date_and_time as char(100))) as Date_Payment, v.Refund_Amount,v.Rec_on_Acc,v.Amount_Paid_By,v.Created_By,CAST(e.Date_of_service AS CHAR(100)) as Date_of_service,v.visit_payment_id as visit_payment_id,h.Patient_Account_External
from encounter_arc e left join human h on(e.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on(e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id) left join visit_payment_arc v on(e.encounter_id=v.encounter_id) where e.human_id=? and e.encounter_id=? and v.is_delete='N' order by visit_payment_id
select '' as Appointment_Physician_Name, '',CAST('' AS CHAR(100)) as Appointment_Date,h.Last_Name,h.Suffix,h.First_Name,h.MI,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Street_Address1, h.City,h.State,h.ZipCode,v.Human_ID,v.voucher_no,h.Past_Due,v.Method_of_Payment,v.Check_Card_No,v.Patient_Payment,v.Payment_Note,CAST(v.Created_Date_and_Time AS CHAR(100)) as Date_Payment, v.Refund_Amount,v.Rec_on_Acc,v.Amount_Paid_By,v.Created_By,CAST('' AS CHAR(100)) as Date_of_service,v.visit_payment_id as visit_payment_id,h.Patient_Account_External from visit_payment v left join human h on(v.human_id=h.human_id) where v.human_id=? and v.voucher_no=? and v.is_delete='N' union all select '' as Appointment_Physician_Name, '',CAST('' AS CHAR(100)) as Appointment_Date,h.Last_Name,h.Suffix,h.First_Name,h.MI,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Street_Address1, h.City,h.State,h.ZipCode,v.Human_ID,v.voucher_no,h.Past_Due,v.Method_of_Payment,v.Check_Card_No,v.Patient_Payment,v.Payment_Note,CAST(v.Created_Date_and_Time AS CHAR(100)) as Date_Payment, v.Refund_Amount,v.Rec_on_Acc,v.Amount_Paid_By,v.Created_By,CAST('' AS CHAR(100)) as Date_of_service,v.visit_payment_id as visit_payment_id,h.Patient_Account_External from visit_payment_arc v left join human h on(v.human_id=h.human_id) where v.human_id=? and v.voucher_no=? and v.is_delete='N' order by visit_payment_id;
SELECT b.encounter_id FROM batch_encounter_human_map b,wf_object w where b.workset_id=? and b.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id and b.object_type=w.obj_type and w.current_process=?;
SELECT b.Human_ID FROM batch_encounter_human_map b,wf_object w where b.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id and b.object_type=w.obj_type and b.doos=? and b.batch_name=? and w.current_process=?;
Select cast(w.DOOS as char(100)) as d,w.Batch_Name,w.Sub_Batch_Range,w.Doc_Name,w.Doc_Type,w.Doc_Sub_Type,w.Obj_Type,w.Current_Process from wf_object_billing w where WF_Object_Id=?;
Select cast(w.DOOS as char(100)) as d,w.Doc_Type,w.Doc_Sub_Type,w.Batch_Name,w.Current_Process,w.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,w.Batch_total_Rcvd,b.Num_of_Checks_Rcvd from wf_object_billing w inner join batch b on (w.Obj_System_Id =b.Batch_ID) where WF_Object_Id=?;
select c.Procedure_Code,c.Page_Number,c.Patient_Name,cast(c.DOS as char(100)) as d,c.Sub_Batch_Range,c.Account_Number,c.Charge_Header_ID,c.Encounter_ID from call_log c where c.Call_Log_ID=?;
select e.Procedure_Code,e.Page_Number,e.Patient_Name,cast(e.DOS as char(100)) as d,e.Sub_Batch_Range,e.Account_Number,e.Charge_Header_ID,e.Encounter_ID from exception e where e.Exception_ID=?;
select q.Procedure_Code,q.Page_Number,q.Patient_Name,cast(q.DOS as char(100)) as d,q.Sub_Batch_Range,q.Account_Number,q.Charge_Header_ID,q.Encounter_ID from qc_error q where q.QC_Error_ID=?;
SELECT w.WF_Object_Id, w.Obj_System_Id, w.Obj_Type, w.Obj_Sub_Type, w.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w.Current_Owner, w.Priority, w.Parent_Obj_Type, w.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w.Process_Allocation, w.Version, w.Doc_Type, w.Doc_Sub_Type,w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem,w.Is_Abnormal FROM wf_object w where w.Obj_System_ID = ? and w.Obj_Type=?;
SELECT w.WF_Object_Id, w.Obj_System_Id, w.Obj_Type, w.Obj_Sub_Type, w.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w.Current_Owner, w.Priority, w.Parent_Obj_Type, w.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w.Process_Allocation, w.Version, w.Doc_Type, w.Doc_Sub_Type,w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem,w.Is_Abnormal FROM wf_object w left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where w.Obj_System_ID = ? and w.Obj_Type=? and p.is_deleted_process<>'Y' ;
SELECT Amount as Paid FROM account_transaction WHERE Charge_Line_Item_ID = ? AND Source_Type='PP_Line_Item' AND Line_Type<>'WriteOff'ORDER BY Charge_Line_Item_ID
SELECT Amount as Writeoff FROM account_transaction WHERE Charge_Line_Item_ID = ? AND Source_Type='PP_Line_Item' AND Line_Type='WriteOff'ORDER BY Charge_Line_Item_ID
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,E.DOOS,E.Batch_Name, W.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing W left join Process_User P on (w.current_process=p.process_name) WHERE W.Current_Owner=? and P.user_name=? and W.Facility_Name=? and W.Obj_Type in (:ObjList) ORDER BY W.Batch_Name,W.DOOS
SELECT concat(p.physician_first_name,',',p.physician_last_name),physician_NPI,p1.specialty, concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name) as patientname,CAST(h.birth_date AS CHAR(100)),h.sex,h.human_id,concat(h.Street_Address1,',',h.Street_Address2) FROM charge_line_item c, physician_library p,physician_specialty p1,human h where charge_line_item_id=? and c.rendering_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and c.rendering_provider_id=p1.physician_specialty_Id and human_id=?
SELECT i.insurance_plan_Name,i.insurance_plan_Id,concat(i.payer_addrress1,',',i.payer_addrress2),i.payer_phone_number,p.insurance_type from insurance_plan i, denial_capture d,pat_insured_plan p where d.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id and d.charge_line_item_id=? and p.human_id=? and p.insurance_plan_id=d.insurance_plan_id group by i.insurance_plan_id
SELECT c1.company_name,c1.ptan,c1.tax_id,c1.address1,c1.company_id from company c1, claim_header c2, claim_line_item c3, charge_line_item c4 where c3.charge_line_item_id=? and c3.claim_header_id=c2.claim_header_id and c2.bill_id=c1.company_id group by company_name
SELECT a.Provider_Type,a.Claim_Info,d.claim_number,CAST(c.From_DOS AS CHAR(100)),p.policy_holder_id,i.payer_addrress1,i.payer_addrress2,i.payer_city,i.payer_state,i.payer_zip from appeal_sent a, denial_capture d, charge_line_item c, pat_insured_plan p, insurance_plan i where a.Denial_Capture_Id=? and d.Denial_Capture_ID=? and c.Charge_Line_Item_Id=? and p.human_id=d.human_id and p.insurance_plan_Id=d.insurance_plan_Id and i.insurance_plan_Id=d.insurance_plan_Id
SELECT c1.facility_name,Facility_NPI,c1.Facility_Addr1 FROM claim_header c1,claim_line_item c2 where c2.charge_line_item_id=? and c2.claim_header_id=c1.claim_header_id
SELECT m.Created_by as MessageDate,CAST(m.Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),m.Message_Text,m.denial_id from denial_Capture d,message m where d.human_id =? and d.Charge_Line_Item_Id=? and m.charge_pp_Line_Id=?;
SELECT notes,created_by,CAST(Created_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)),Denial_Action from denial_action where Charge_Line_Item_id=?
SELECT Long_Common_Name,Loinc_Num FROM loinc where (Long_Common_Name like ? and Loinc_Num like ?);
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,d.DOOS,d.Batch_Name, W.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing W left join Denial_Capture d on (W.obj_system_id=d.Denial_Id) left join Process_User P on (w.current_process=p.process_name) WHERE W.Current_Owner=? and P.user_name=? and W.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)and w.obj_Type='DENIAL_EXCEPTION' GROUP BY w.WF_Object_Id ORDER BY W.Batch_Name,W.DOOS
SELECT W.WF_Object_Id,W.Obj_Type,W.Obj_Sub_Type,W.Current_Process,d.DOOS,d.Batch_Name, W.Sub_Batch_Range,W.Doc_Type,W.Doc_Sub_Type,W.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,W.Parent_Obj_Type,W.Obj_System_Id FROM wf_object_billing W left join Denial_Capture d on (W.obj_system_id=d.Denial_Id) left join Process_User P on (w.current_process=p.process_name) WHERE W.Current_Owner=? and P.user_name=? and W.Facility_Name=? and W.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)and w.obj_Type='DENIAL_EXCEPTION' GROUP BY w.WF_Object_Id ORDER BY W.Batch_Name,W.DOOS
SELECT f.facility_fax,f.facility_Telephone from facility_library f,wf_object_billing w where f.facility_name=w.facility_name and w.obj_system_Id=?
SELECT cast(created_date_and_time as char(100)) FROM file_management_index where human_id=? and doc_type in (:DocType) order by created_date_and_time desc limit 1;
select b.Object_Process_History_ID, b.Wf_Object_ID, b.Process_Name, cast(b.Process_Start_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(b.Process_End_Date_And_Time as char(100)), b.Obj_Type, b.Obj_Sub_Type, b.Comments, b.User_Name, b.DOOS, b.Batch_Name, b.Doc_Name, b.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Comp, b.Wf_Obj_Amount, b.Sub_Batch_Range, b.Doc_Type, b.Doc_Sub_Type, b.Version, b.Completed_List, b.Duplicate_Demos_Enc_PPLine, b.Duplicate_Amount, b.Batch_Name_in_Billing, b.Print_Name_in_Billing, b.Report_Verified from object_process_history_billing b where b.process_name in ('DEMO_CAPTURE','DEMO_QC') and b.doos=? and b.batch_name=? and b.obj_type=? and b.wf_object_id=? ;
select b.Object_Process_History_ID, b.Wf_Object_ID, b.Process_Name, cast(b.Process_Start_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(b.Process_End_Date_And_Time as char(100)), b.Obj_Type, b.Obj_Sub_Type, b.Comments, b.User_Name, b.DOOS, b.Batch_Name, b.Doc_Name, b.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Comp, b.Wf_Obj_Amount, b.Sub_Batch_Range, b.Doc_Type, b.Doc_Sub_Type, b.Version, b.Completed_List, b.Duplicate_Demos_Enc_PPLine, b.Duplicate_Amount, b.Batch_Name_in_Billing, b.Print_Name_in_Billing, b.Report_Verified,b.Is_Marked_in_History_Table from object_process_history_billing_temp b where b.process_name in ('DEMO_CAPTURE','DEMO_QC') and b.doos=? and b.batch_name=? and b.obj_type=? and b.wf_object_id=? and b.Is_Marked_in_History_Table='N';
select b.Object_Process_History_ID, b.Wf_Object_ID, b.Process_Name, cast(b.Process_Start_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(b.Process_End_Date_And_Time as char(100)), b.Obj_Type, b.Obj_Sub_Type, b.Comments, b.User_Name, b.DOOS, b.Batch_Name, b.Doc_Name, b.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Comp, b.Wf_Obj_Amount, b.Sub_Batch_Range, b.Doc_Type, b.Doc_Sub_Type, b.Version, b.Completed_List, b.Duplicate_Demos_Enc_PPLine, b.Duplicate_Amount, b.Batch_Name_in_Billing, b.Print_Name_in_Billing, b.Report_Verified from object_process_history_billing b where b.process_name in ('CODING','CODING_QC') and b.doos=? and b.batch_name=? and b.obj_type=? and b.wf_object_id=? ;
select b.Object_Process_History_ID, b.Wf_Object_ID, b.Process_Name, cast(b.Process_Start_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(b.Process_End_Date_And_Time as char(100)), b.Obj_Type, b.Obj_Sub_Type, b.Comments, b.User_Name, b.DOOS, b.Batch_Name, b.Doc_Name, b.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Comp, b.Wf_Obj_Amount, b.Sub_Batch_Range, b.Doc_Type, b.Doc_Sub_Type, b.Version, b.Completed_List, b.Duplicate_Demos_Enc_PPLine, b.Duplicate_Amount, b.Batch_Name_in_Billing, b.Print_Name_in_Billing, b.Report_Verified,b.Is_Marked_in_History_Table from object_process_history_billing_temp b where b.process_name in ('CODING','CODING_QC') and b.doos=? and b.batch_name=? and b.obj_type=? and b.wf_object_id=? and b.Is_Marked_in_History_Table='N';
SELECT b.Insurance_Plan_Name,b.insurance_plan_id,a.Policy_Holder_ID,concat(c.physician_prefix,' ',c.physician_last_name,' ',c.physician_middle_name,' ',c.physician_first_name,' ',c.physician_suffix),c.physician_library_id FROM pat_insured_plan a,insurance_plan b,physician_library c where a.human_id=? and a.insurance_plan_id=b.insurance_plan_id and a.active='yes' and a.insurance_type in ('primary') and a.pcp_id=c.physician_library_id ;
SELECT r.is_active,r.base_rate_Multiply_factor,r.created_by, Cast(r.created_date_and_time as char(100)),r.Rules_ID FROM Rules r where r.provider_id=? and r.Is_Active=? and r.From_Date=? and r.Fee_Schedule_Type=? and r.To_Date=? and r.Hosp_or_Clinic=? and r.County=? and r.Carrier_ID=?;
SELECT r.provider_id,r.Is_Active,r.From_Date,r.Fee_Schedule_Type,r.To_Date,r.Hosp_or_Clinic,r.County,r.base_rate_Multiply_factor,r.created_by, Cast(r.created_date_and_time as char(100)),r.Rules_ID,r.Carrier_ID FROM Rules r where r.provider_id=? and r.carrier_id=? and r.Fee_Schedule_Type=?;
SELECT r.provider_id,r.Is_Active,r.From_Date,r.Fee_Schedule_Type,r.To_Date,r.Hosp_or_Clinic,r.County,r.base_rate_Multiply_factor,r.created_by, Cast(r.created_date_and_time as char(100)),r.Rules_ID,r.Carrier_ID FROM rules r where r.provider_id=? and r.Carrier_id=? and r.Is_Active=? and r.Fee_Schedule_Type=?
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,h.first_name,h.Last_Name,h.MI,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth,h.Sex,h.human_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join human h on h.human_id=r.PID_External_Patient_ID left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select Count(*) from error_log e;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,h.first_name,h.Last_Name,h.MI, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth ,h.Sex,h.human_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join human h on h.human_id=r.PID_External_Patient_ID left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where r.PID_Patient_Last_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_First_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_middle_Name like ? and c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ? , ?;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,h.first_name,h.Last_Name,h.MI, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth ,h.Sex,h.human_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join human h on h.human_id=r.PID_External_Patient_ID left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where r.PID_Patient_Last_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_First_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_middle_Name like ? group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on c.result_master_id=r.result_master_id where r.PID_Patient_Last_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_First_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_middle_Name like ? and c.orc_ordering_provider_id in (:NPI);
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on c.result_master_id=r.result_master_id where r.PID_Patient_Last_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_First_Name like ? and r.PID_Patient_middle_Name like ?;
select count(*) from orders_submit o left join human h on h.human_id=o.human_id left join orders r on r.order_id=o.order_submit_id left join physician_library p on p.physician_library_id=o.physician_id left join lab l on l.lab_id=o.lab_id left join lab_location q on q.lab_location_id=o.lab_location_id where o.order_submit_id like ? group by r.order_submit_id;
