select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth,h.sex,h.ssn,group_concat(r.lab_procedure,";") ,concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name,l.lab_name,q.location_name,cast(o.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as Orderdate from orders_submit o left join human h on h.human_id=o.human_id left join orders r on r.order_id=o.order_submit_id left join physician_library p on p.physician_library_id=o.physician_id left join lab l on l.lab_id=o.lab_id left join lab_location q on q.lab_location_id=o.lab_location_id where o.order_submit_id like ? group by r.order_submit_id limit ?,?;
select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth,h.sex,h.ssn,group_concat(r.lab_procedure,";") ,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP,ifnull(l.lab_name,''),ifnull(q.location_name,''),cast(o.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as Orderdate from orders_submit o left join human h on h.human_id=o.human_id left join orders r on r.order_id=o.order_submit_id left join physician_library p on p.physician_library_id=o.physician_id left join lab l on l.lab_id=o.lab_id left join lab_location q on q.lab_location_id=o.lab_location_id where o.order_submit_id in (:OrderList) group by r.order_submit_id ;
SELECT os.order_submit_id FROM result_master rm left join orders_submit os on(rm.PID_External_Patient_ID=os.human_id) inner join wf_object wf on(os.order_submit_id=wf.Obj_System_Id) where rm.result_master_id like ? and wf.current_process='RESULT_PROCESS';
SELECT os.order_submit_id FROM result_master rm left join orders_submit os on(rm.PID_External_Patient_ID=os.human_id) where rm.result_master_id like ?;
SELECT count(*) FROM result_master rm left join orders_submit os on(rm.PID_External_Patient_ID=os.human_id) inner join wf_object wf on(os.order_submit_id=wf.Obj_System_Id) where rm.result_master_id like ? and wf.current_process='RESULT_PROCESS';
select count(*) from orders_submit o left join wf_object w on w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and obj_type="DIAGNOSTIC ORDER" where o.human_id =? and o.lab_id=? and current_process='RESULT_PROCESS' ;
select count(*) from orders_submit o left join wf_object w on w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and obj_type="DIAGNOSTIC ORDER" where o.human_id =? and o.lab_id=?;
select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth,h.sex,h.ssn,group_concat(r.lab_procedure,";") ,concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name,l.lab_name,q.location_name,cast(o.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as Orderdate,o.order_submit_id from orders_submit o left join human h on h.human_id=o.human_id left join orders r on r.order_submit_id=o.order_submit_id left join physician_library p on p.physician_library_id=o.physician_id left join lab l on l.lab_id=o.lab_id left join lab_location q on q.lab_location_id=o.lab_location_id left join wf_object w on w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and obj_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' where o.human_id = ? and o.lab_id=? and current_process='RESULT_PROCESS' group by r.order_submit_id limit ?,?;
select h.Human_Id, concat(h.last_name,', ',h.first_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name, cast(h.birth_date as char(100))as Date_Of_Birth,h.sex,h.ssn,group_concat(r.lab_procedure,";") ,concat('Dr. ',p.physician_first_name,' ',p.physician_last_name) as PCP_Name,l.lab_name,q.location_name,cast(o.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as Orderdate,o.order_submit_id from orders_submit o left join human h on h.human_id=o.human_id left join orders r on r.order_submit_id=o.order_submit_id left join physician_library p on p.physician_library_id=o.physician_id left join lab l on l.lab_id=o.lab_id left join lab_location q on q.lab_location_id=o.lab_location_id left join wf_object w on w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and obj_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' where o.human_id = ? and o.lab_id=? group by r.order_submit_id limit ?,?;
SELECT w.wf_object_id,w.doos,w.batch_name,w.Doc_Type,w.Doc_Sub_Type, w.Demos_Enc_PPLine_Rcvd,w.Obj_Type, w.Batch_total_Rcvd,w.Sub_Batch_Range,w.Facility_Name, b.Num_Images_Rcvd FROM wf_object_billing w join batch b on(w.batch_name=b.Batch_Name and w.DOOS=b.DOOS) where w.current_Process = ? group by wf_object_id order by w.Obj_System_Id
select r.Scn_ID,r.User_Name,r.Permission from role_exception_scn_tab r left join scn_tab s on (s.scn_id=r.scn_id) where r.User_Name=?
SELECT w.wf_object_id,w.obj_type,w.obj_sub_type,w.current_process,w.doos,w.Batch_Name,w.doc_type,w.doc_sub_type, concat(p.physician_first_name,',',p.physician_last_name) as DrName,w.current_owner,s.specialty, i.insurance_plan_name,w.demos_enc_ppline_rcvd,w.parent_obj_type,w.Obj_System_Id,h.human_id,concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_Name) as name,c.procedure_code as CPT, c.charge_amount,c.charge_line_item_id,cast(w.current_arrival_Time as char(100)) ,d.denial_category FROM denial_capture d left join wf_object_billing w on (d.denial_capture_id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on(d.human_id=h.human_id) left join charge_line_item c on(d.charge_line_item_id=c.charge_line_item_id) left join insurance_plan i on (d.insurance_Plan_Id =i.insurance_Plan_Id)left join physician_library p on (p.physician_library_id=c.rendering_provider_id) left join physician_specialty s on(p.physician_library_id=s.Physician_id)left join process_user u on(w.current_process=u.process_name) left join workset_proc_alloc A on (W.DOOS=A.DOOS and W.Batch_name=A.Batch_Name and w.current_process=a.process_name and w.current_owner=a.allocated_to) where A.Allocated_To=? and w.current_owner=? and u.user_name=? and w.obj_Sub_type in (:ObjTypeList)
select ?,count(*) from orders_submit s,wf_object w where s.order_submit_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='diagnostic order' and s.lab_id=? and w.current_process='result_process' and s.order_code_type<>'' and s.Created_date_and_time between ? and ? and s.physician_id=?
select ?,count(*) from orders_submit s,wf_object w where s.order_submit_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='diagnostic order' and s.lab_id=? and w.current_process='Billing_Wait' and s.order_code_type<>'' and s.Created_date_and_time between ? and ? and s.physician_id=?
select ?,count(*) from orders_submit s,wf_object w where s.order_submit_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='diagnostic order' and s.lab_id=? and w.current_process='Result_Review' and s.order_code_type<>'' and s.Created_date_and_time between ? and ? and s.physician_id=?
select ?,count(*) from orders_submit s,wf_object w where s.order_submit_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='diagnostic order' and s.lab_id=? and w.current_process='MA_Results' and s.order_code_type<>'' and s.Created_date_and_time between ? and ? and s.physician_id=?
select ?,count(*) from result_master r left join result_orc o on o.Result_master_id=r.Result_master_id where r.order_id=0 and r.lab_id=? and str_to_date(r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,'%Y%m%d') between ? and ? and o.ORC_Ordering_Provider_last_name=?
SELECT if(e.lab_id=?,'LabCorp','Quest'),concat(e.Reason_Code,' - ',e.Reason_Description),count(*) FROM error_log e left join result_master r on e.Result_master_id=r.Result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id= c.result_master_id where e.lab_id=? and str_to_date(r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,'%Y%m%d') between ? and ? and c.ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name=? group by e.lab_id,e.Reason_code,e.Reason_Description
select c.Encounter_ID,w.Obj_Type,w.Current_Process,cl.Charge_Amount, cl.charge_line_item_id, cast(cl.From_DOS as char(100)), cl.Procedure_Code, cl.Modifier1,cl.Units, c.Charge_Header_ID, concat(p.Physician_First_Name,',',p.Physician_Middle_Name,',',p.Physician_Last_Name), concat(h.last_name,',',h.first_name),h.Human_ID from human h left join charge_header c on (h.human_id=c.human_id) LEFT JOIN charge_line_item cl on (c.Charge_Header_ID =cl.Charge_Header_ID) LEFT JOIN physician_library p on (cl.Rendering_Provider_ID =p.Physician_Library_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object_billing w on (cl.charge_line_item_id =w.Obj_System_Id) where w.obj_type="CHARGE_LINE_ITEM" and c.Encounter_ID like ? and concat(p.Physician_First_Name,',',p.Physician_Middle_Name,',',p.Physician_Last_Name)like ? and cl.Procedure_Code like ? and cast(cl.From_DOS as char(100)) like ?
select distinct concat(pl.Physician_Prefix ,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix) as PCPName, p.Policy_Holder_ID,p.Insurance_Plan_ID,p.PCP_ID from pat_insured_plan p , physician_library pl where p.PCP_ID= pl.Physician_Library_ID and p.Pat_Insured_Plan_ID=?
select o.Process_Start_Date_And_Time from Object_Process_History_Billing_Temp o where o.Wf_Object_ID=? and o.DOOS=? and o.Batch_Name=? and o.Process_Name=? and Is_Marked_in_History_Table='N' group by o.Process_Start_Date_And_Time
SELECT User_Name,Default_Facility from User
select u.Scn_ID,u.Permission,u.User_Name from user_scn_tab u left join scn_tab s on (s.scn_id=u.scn_id) where u.User_name=? and Permission='U'
SELECT error_log_id FROM error_log e where result_master_id=?;
SELECT c.value,(select d.status_value from care_plan d where d.human_id=? and d.encounter_id=? and d.care_plan_lookup_id= c.care_plan_lookup_id), (select d.status from care_plan d where d.human_id=? and d.encounter_id=? and d.care_plan_lookup_id= c.care_plan_lookup_id) FROM `care_plan_lookup` c where measure_rule_master_id<>0
SELECT Acurus_Result_Code,Acurus_Result_Description,value,cast(Captured_date_and_time as char(100)) as Captureddate FROM `patient_results` where Human_Id=? and Captured_date_and_time=(select Max(Captured_date_and_time) FROM `patient_results` where Human_Id=?) and Acurus_Result_Code in ('83036','83719','83718','82947','82950','86706','82565');
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM wf_object w, encounter e , human h , physician_library p where w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=?
select distinct concat(pl.physician_prefix,' ',pl.physician_last_name,' ',pl.physician_middle_name,' ',pl.physician_first_name,' ',pl.physician_suffix) as PCPName from pat_insured_plan p , physician_library pl where p.PCP_ID=pl.physician_library_id and p.pat_insured_plan_id=?
SELECT (select concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')) as RefToPhyName from physician_library p where A.pcp_id=p.physician_library_id and a.pcp_id=?), b.insurance_plan_id, b.Insurance_Plan_Name,a.Policy_Holder_ID,a.PCP_ID
FROM pat_insured_plan a,insurance_plan b
where a.human_id=? and a.insurance_plan_id=b.insurance_plan_id and a.active='yes' and a.insurance_type in ('primary') order by a.insurance_type
SELECT distinct p.Policy_Holder_Id FROM `pat_insured_plan` p where insurance_plan_id=? and p.human_id=?
select p.pp_line_item_id,v.Method_of_Payment,p.amount,v.Payment_Note from pp_line_item p,visit_payment v where p.encounter_id=v.encounter_id and p.human_id=v.human_id and p.amount=v.patient_payment and p.encounter_id=? and p.human_id=? and p.charge_line_item_id=?
select p.pp_line_item_id,v.Method_of_Payment,p.amount,v.Payment_Note from pp_line_item p,visit_payment v where p.human_id=v.human_id and p.amount=v.patient_payment and p.human_id=? and p.charge_line_item_id=?
SELECT human_id,cast(appointment_date as char(100)) as Date,Duration_minutes,encounter_id FROM `encounter` where facility_name=? and appointment_provider_id=? and appointment_date like ? order by appointment_date;
SELECT human_id,cast(appointment_date as char(100)) as Date,Duration_minutes,encounter_id FROM `encounter` where facility_name=? and appointment_provider_id=? and appointment_date between ? and ? order by appointment_date;
SELECT cast(appointment_date as char(100)) as Appointment_date_time,e.facility_name,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),e.human_id,e.visit_type,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,h.sex, h.human_type,wf.current_process,e.encounter_id,e.Appointment_Provider_ID,e.Duration_Minutes FROM encounter e left join physician_library p on(e.appointment_provider_id=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join human h on(e.human_id=h.human_id) left join wf_object wf on(e.encounter_id=wf.Obj_System_Id) where e.willing_for_prior_appointment='Y' and wf.current_process='SCHEDULED';
select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Is_paper_order='N' and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m union select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object_arc w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Is_paper_order='N' and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m
select o.Human_ID from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order' union select o.Human_ID from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object_arc w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order'
select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='LAB' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Is_paper_order='N' and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m union select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object_arc w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='LAB' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Is_paper_order='N' and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m
select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='LAB' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m union select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object_arc w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='LAB' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m
select o.Human_ID from orders_submit o,file_management_index f,lab l where o.Order_submit_Id=f.Order_Id and l.lab_id=o.lab_id and l.lab_type='image' and o.Physician_Id=? and o.human_id=f.human_id and o.created_date_and_time between ? and ? group by o.Order_submit_Id
select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m union select hi from (select o.Human_ID hi from orders_submit o,lab l,wf_object_arc w where o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and w.obj_system_id=o.order_submit_id and Lab_Type='IMAGE' and o.Physician_ID=? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? and w.current_process !='Deleted_Order' and w.obj_type='Diagnostic Order') as m;
SELECT a.Carrier1,COUNT(distinct b.Claim_Header_ID),a.Payer FROM Claim_Header a,Claim_Line_Item b,WF_Object_Billing w where a.Claim_Header_ID=b.Claim_Header_ID and a.Claim_Status=? and w.Obj_Type='CHARGE_LINE_ITEM' and b.Charge_Line_Item_ID=w.Obj_System_Id and w.Current_Process in ('BILL_TO_PRIMARY','TRANSFER_TO_SECONDARY','TRANSFER_TO_TERTIARY','REBILLED') group by a.Carrier1 order by a.Carrier1;
SELECT a.Claim_Header_ID, a.Charge_Header_ID, a.Claim_Type, a.Claim_Status, a.Payer, a.Insurance_Plan_ID, a.Carrier_ID, a.File_Name, a.Human_ID, a.Carrier1, a.Carrier2, a.Carrier3, a.Insurance_Type, a.Ins_ID_No, a.Patient_Name, cast(a.Patient_DOB as char(100)), a.Patient_Sex, a.Patient_Address, a.Patient_City, a.Patient_State, a.Patient_Zip_Code, a.Patient_Telephone, a.Patient_Relationship_To_Insured, a.Patient_Status, a.Patient_Status_Emp, a.Patient_Cond_Rel_To, a.Patient_Cond_Place, a.Insured_Name, a.Insured_Address, a.Insured_City, a.Insured_State, a.Insured_Zip, a.Insured_Telephone, a.Other_Ins_Name, a.Other_Ins_Policy_No, cast(a.Other_Ins_DOB as char(100)), a.Other_Ins_Sex, a.Other_Emp_Name, a.Other_Plan_Name, a.Ins_Policy_No, cast(a.Ins_DOB as char(100)), a.Ins_Sex, a.Ins_Emp_Name, a.Ins_Plan_Name, a.Reserved_10, a.Other_Health_Plan, a.Pat_Sign, cast(a.Pat_Sign_Date as char(100)), a.Ins_Sign, cast(a.Current_Illness as char(100)), cast(a.Other_Date as char(100)), cast(a.Unable_From as char(100)), cast(a.Unable_To as char(100)), a.Ref_Phy_Name, a.Ref_17_a, a.Referring_Phy_ID, a.Ref_Phy_NPI, cast(a.Hosp_From as char(100)), cast(a.Hosp_To as char(100)), a.Reserved_19, a.Outside_Lab, a.Lab_Charge_Amount, a.Diagnosis, a.Resubmission_Code, a.Orig_Ref_No, a.Prior_Auth_No, a.Fed_Tax_No, a.SSNEIN, a.Pat_Acc_No, a.Accept_Ass, a.Total_Charge, a.Amount_Paid, a.Balance_Due, a.Phy_Sign, cast(a.Phy_Date as char(100)), a.Facility_Name, a.Facility_Addr1, a.Facility_City, a.Facility_State, a.Facility_Zip, a.Facility_Telephone, a.Facility_NPI, a.Facility_Other_ID, a.Bill_ID, a.Bill_Name, a.Bill_Addr1, a.Bill_City, a.Bill_State, a.Bill_Zip, a.Bill_Phone, a.Bill_NPI, a.Bill_Other_ID, cast(a.Printed_Date as char(100)), cast(a.Exported_Date as char(100)), a.Created_By, cast(a.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), a.Modified_By, cast(a.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), a.Version, a.Encounter_ID, a.Claim_Orig_Ref_No, a.Resubmission_Text, a.Claim_Codes, a.Other_Claim_ID, a.Ref_Prov_Type, a.Current_Illness_Qualifier, a.Other_Date_Qualifier, a.Additional_Claim_Info, a.ICD_Type FROM claim_header a,claim_line_item b where a.Claim_Header_ID=b.Claim_Header_ID and a.carrier1=? and a.Claim_Status in ('OPEN','NOT CONSIDERED') group by a.Claim_Header_ID;
SELECT a.Claim_Header_ID, a.Charge_Header_ID, a.Claim_Type, a.Claim_Status, a.Payer, a.Insurance_Plan_ID, a.Carrier_ID, a.File_Name, a.Human_ID, a.Carrier1, a.Carrier2, a.Carrier3, a.Insurance_Type, a.Ins_ID_No, a.Patient_Name, cast(a.Patient_DOB as char(100)), a.Patient_Sex, a.Patient_Address, a.Patient_City, a.Patient_State, a.Patient_Zip_Code, a.Patient_Telephone, a.Patient_Relationship_To_Insured, a.Patient_Status, a.Patient_Status_Emp, a.Patient_Cond_Rel_To, a.Patient_Cond_Place, a.Insured_Name, a.Insured_Address, a.Insured_City, a.Insured_State, a.Insured_Zip, a.Insured_Telephone, a.Other_Ins_Name, a.Other_Ins_Policy_No, cast(a.Other_Ins_DOB as char(100)), a.Other_Ins_Sex, a.Other_Emp_Name, a.Other_Plan_Name, a.Ins_Policy_No, cast(a.Ins_DOB as char(100)), a.Ins_Sex, a.Ins_Emp_Name, a.Ins_Plan_Name, a.Reserved_10, a.Other_Health_Plan, a.Pat_Sign, cast(a.Pat_Sign_Date as char(100)), a.Ins_Sign, cast(a.Current_Illness as char(100)), cast(a.Other_Date as char(100)), cast(a.Unable_From as char(100)), cast(a.Unable_To as char(100)), a.Ref_Phy_Name, a.Ref_17_a, a.Referring_Phy_ID, a.Ref_Phy_NPI, cast(a.Hosp_From as char(100)), cast(a.Hosp_To as char(100)), a.Reserved_19, a.Outside_Lab, a.Lab_Charge_Amount, a.Diagnosis, a.Resubmission_Code, a.Orig_Ref_No, a.Prior_Auth_No, a.Fed_Tax_No, a.SSNEIN, a.Pat_Acc_No, a.Accept_Ass, a.Total_Charge, a.Amount_Paid, a.Balance_Due, a.Phy_Sign, cast(a.Phy_Date as char(100)), a.Facility_Name, a.Facility_Addr1, a.Facility_City, a.Facility_State, a.Facility_Zip, a.Facility_Telephone, a.Facility_NPI, a.Facility_Other_ID, a.Bill_ID, a.Bill_Name, a.Bill_Addr1, a.Bill_City, a.Bill_State, a.Bill_Zip, a.Bill_Phone, a.Bill_NPI, a.Bill_Other_ID, cast(a.Printed_Date as char(100)), cast(a.Exported_Date as char(100)), a.Created_By, cast(a.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), a.Modified_By, cast(a.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)), a.Version, a.Encounter_ID, a.Claim_Orig_Ref_No, a.Resubmission_Text, a.Claim_Codes, a.Other_Claim_ID, a.Ref_Prov_Type, a.Current_Illness_Qualifier, a.Other_Date_Qualifier, a.Additional_Claim_Info, a.ICD_Type FROM claim_header a,claim_line_item b where a.Claim_Header_ID=b.Claim_Header_ID and a.carrier1=? and a.Claim_Status in ('NOT CONSIDERED') group by a.Claim_Header_ID;
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Message_Description like ? and p.Notes like ? and p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select cast(MIN(From_DOS) as char(100)) as From_DOS,cast(MAX(To_DOS) as char(100)) as To_DOS,cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,c.Appt_Facility_Name,cl.Pat_Insured_Plan_ID,c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID,c.Batch_ID,cl.Charge_Line_Item_ID from charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header c on (cl.Charge_Header_ID =c.Charge_Header_ID) where c.Encounter_ID =? and c.Human_id=? group by c.Charge_Header_ID order by c.Batch_ID, c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID
select cast(MIN(From_DOS) as char(100)) as From_DOS,cast(MAX(To_DOS) as char(100)) as To_DOS,cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,c.Appt_Facility_Name,cl.Pat_Insured_Plan_ID,c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID,c.Batch_ID from charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header c on (cl.Charge_Header_ID =c.Charge_Header_ID) where c.human_id=? group by c.Charge_Header_ID order by c.Batch_ID, c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID
select Cast(cl.From_DOS as char(100)),cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,cl.Procedure_Code,concat(cl.Modifier1,cl.Modifier2,cl.Modifier3,cl.Modifier4),cl.Units,cl.Diagnosis_Pointer,cl.Charge_Amount,cl.pat_Insured_Plan_ID,c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID,cl.Charge_Line_Item_ID,c.Batch_ID from charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header c on (cl.Charge_Header_ID =c.Charge_Header_ID) where c.human_id =? order by c.Batch_ID, c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Message_Description like ? and p.Notes like ? and p.Encounter_ID=? and p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select Cast(cl.From_DOS as char(100)),cl.Rendering_Provider_ID,cl.Procedure_Code,concat(cl.Modifier1,cl.Modifier2,cl.Modifier3,cl.Modifier4),cl.Units,cl.Diagnosis_Pointer,cl.Charge_Amount,cl.pat_Insured_Plan_ID,c.Encounter_ID,c.Charge_Header_ID,cl.Charge_Line_Item_ID from charge_line_item cl LEFT JOIN charge_header c on (cl.Charge_Header_ID =c.Charge_Header_ID) where c.Charge_Header_ID=?
SELECT a.Batch_Name, sum(a.Amount) FROM .account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? and a.Encounter_ID =? and a.Batch_ID= ? and a.Charge_Line_Item_ID IN(:ChargeLineid)group by a.Batch_ID
SELECT c.Place_of_Service, sum(c.charge_amount) FROM `charge_line_item` c where c.charge_header_id=? group by c.charge_header_id
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Message_Description like ? and p.Notes like ? and p.Header_ID=? and p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Message_Description like ? and p.Notes like ? and p.Human_ID=? and p.Line_ID=? and p.Header_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select w.WF_Object_Id, w.Obj_System_Id, w.Obj_Type, w.Obj_Sub_Type, w.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w.Current_Owner, w.Priority, w.Parent_Obj_Type, w.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w.Process_Allocation, w.Version, w.Doc_Type, w.Doc_Sub_Type, e.encounter_id,cast(e.Appointment_Date as CHAR(100)), cast(e.Date_of_service as CHAR(100)),u.Person_Name,(select u1.person_name from user u1 where u1.physician_library_id=e.Encounter_Provider_ID and u1.physician_library_id<>0),e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,e.Batch_Status from wf_object w inner join encounter e on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id inner join user u on u.physician_library_id=e.Appointment_Provider_ID where e.human_id= :HumanID and w.obj_type in(:ObjType) and w.Current_Process not like '%DELETE%' group by w.wf_object_id union all select w.WF_Object_Id, w.Obj_System_Id, w.Obj_Type, w.Obj_Sub_Type, w.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w.Current_Owner, w.Priority, w.Parent_Obj_Type, w.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w.Process_Allocation, w.Version, w.Doc_Type, w.Doc_Sub_Type, e.encounter_id,cast(e.Appointment_Date as CHAR(100)), cast(e.Date_of_service as CHAR(100)),u.Person_Name,(select u1.person_name from user u1 where u1.physician_library_id=e.Encounter_Provider_ID and u1.physician_library_id<>0),e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,e.Batch_Status from wf_object_arc w inner join encounter_arc e on e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id inner join user u on u.physician_library_id=e.Appointment_Provider_ID where e.human_id= :HumanID and w.obj_type in(:ObjType) and w.Current_Process not like '%DELETE%' group by w.wf_object_id;
select Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)), p.Source, p.Message_Description,p.Notes,p.Created_By,p.Modified_By, Cast(p.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Priority,p.Is_PopupEnable,p.Human_ID,p.Message_ID,p.Type,p.Assigned_To,p.Caller_Name,p.Relationship,Cast(p.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),p.Encounter_ID,p.Line_ID,p.Line_Type,p.Header_ID,p.Header_Type from patient_notes p where p.Message_Description like ? and p.Notes like ? and p.Human_ID=? order by Cast(p.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) desc;
select 'Call Log ID','DOOS','Batch Name','Doc Type','Doc Sub Type','Curr Process','Doctor #','Doctor Name','Patient Name','DOS','CPT Code','Page #','Acc #','Type of Call','DOB','SSN','Gender','Tax ID','Facility ID','Insurance ID','Plan Added In MM','Web Status','Time Checked','Call Ref #','Customer Rep','HMO Name','Group #','Eligibility Date','PCP','Claim Mailing Address','Subscriber','Co Pay','Primary Secondary','Reason For Client','Call Log Status','Amount','Insurance Name','Comments','Billed Charge','Rendering Provider Name','Rendering NPI','Requested By','Caller Name','Raised Date','WF Object ID'
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM wf_object w, encounter e , human h , physician_library p where w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,s.Scan_ID FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT O.Order_Submit_ID,cast(OS.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),ifnull(L.Lab_Name,' '),ifnull(LL.Location_Name,' '),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,OS.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_Submit_ID) left join orders O on (OS.Order_Submit_ID=O.Order_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT O.Immunization_Group_ID,group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,O.Reason_For_Referral,h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,O.To_Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,' '), ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,' '),ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,' ')),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? group by w.obj_system_id LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,h.suffix,w.Current_Owner FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) where w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi FROM `human` h , family_history f , family_history_disease fd, user_lookup u where h.human_id in (:HumanID) and f.human_id =h.human_id and f.RelationShip in ('Father','Mother','Brother','Son','Daughter','Sister') and f.Family_History_ID =fd.Family_History_ID and fd.Disease = u.Value and u.Description <> "";
select distinct hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select distinct hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
SELECT Sent_To,Subject,Cast(Activity_Date_And_Time as char(100)),From_Address,Message FROM activity_log where (Activity_Type='Send' or Activity_Type='Send Message' or Activity_Type like '%transmitted%') and Sent_To=?;
SELECT Sent_To,Subject,Cast(Activity_Date_And_Time as char(100)),From_Address,Message FROM activity_log where (Activity_Type='Send' or Activity_Type='Send Message' or Activity_Type like '%transmitted%') and From_Address=?;
select hi from (select (e.human_id)hi from document d,encounter e where d.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID and d.Document_Type='Progress note' and d.Physician_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by d.Human_ID)as m union select hi from (select (e.human_id)hi from document_arc d,encounter_arc e where d.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID and d.Document_Type='Progress note' and d.Physician_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by d.Human_ID)as m ;
SELECT distinct(h.human_id) FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id union SELECT distinct(h.human_id) FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id;
select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and h.is_mail_sent='y' group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and h.is_mail_sent='y' group by e.human_Id) as m;
select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
select distinct(human_id)hi from activity_log a where a.Activity_Type='view' and human_id in(:HumanID) ;
select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
select distinct(e.human_id) hi from Encounter e where e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Encounter_Provider_Id=? and e.human_Id in (Select a.human_id from human h inner join Activity_Log a on h.human_id=a.human_Id where (a.Activity_Type ='EMail' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='email') or (a.Activity_Type ='phone' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='phone')or (a.Activity_Type ='mail' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='mail')or (a.Activity_Type in('email','mail','phone') and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='') and a.activity_date_and_time between ? and ?) and e.Date_Of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_id having count(e.human_id)>=2 union select distinct(e.human_id) hi from Encounter_arc e where e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' and e.Encounter_Provider_Id=? and e.human_Id in (Select a.human_id from human h inner join Activity_Log a on h.human_id=a.human_Id where (a.Activity_Type ='EMail' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='email') or (a.Activity_Type ='phone' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='phone')or (a.Activity_Type ='mail' and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='mail')or (a.Activity_Type in('email','mail','phone') and h.preferred_confidential_correspodence_mode='') and a.activity_date_and_time between ? and ?) and e.Date_Of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_id having count(e.human_id)>=2 ;
select e.human_id from encounter e where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' group by e.Human_ID having count(e.human_id)>=2 union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and e.Visit_Type!='OTHER ENCOUNTER' group by e.Human_ID having count(e.human_id)>=2;
select distinct(e.human_Id)hi from encounter e,activity_log a where e.Encounter_ID=a.Encounter_ID and a.Activity_Type='Send Message' and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and a.activity_date_and_time between ? and ? group by a.human_Id union select distinct(e.human_Id)hi from encounter_arc e,activity_log a where e.Encounter_ID=a.Encounter_ID and a.Activity_Type='Send Message' and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and a.activity_date_and_time between ? and ? group by a.human_Id;
select hi from(SELECT distinct(h.human_id)hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from(SELECT distinct(h.human_id)hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
select e.human_id from encounter e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? ;
select e.human_id from encounter e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ?;
select e.human_id from encounter e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and ((e.encounter_id in(select encounter_id from document where document_type='clinical summary')) or(e.encounter_id in(select encounter_id from activity_log where activity_type='CCD Export')))and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.encounter_id union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e,referral_order r where e.Encounter_ID=r.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and ((e.encounter_id in(select encounter_id from document_arc where document_type='clinical summary')) or(e.encounter_id in(select encounter_id from activity_log where activity_type='CCD Export')))and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.encounter_id;
SELECT human_id FROM rcopia_prescription where electronic='Y' and formulary_id<>0 and created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by rcopia_id;
SELECT human_id FROM rcopia_prescription where created_by=? and Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by rcopia_id;
SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id union SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id;
select distinct p.human_id from patient_results p, encounter e, human h where p.human_id in(select human_id from patient_results where human_id in(select human_id from patient_results where (Loinc_Observation='height' and value!=''))and (Loinc_Observation='weight' and value!='')) and p.human_id = h.human_id and((p.Loinc_Observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' and p.value!='')or (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) <3)) and e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by p.human_id union select distinct p.human_id from patient_results p, encounter_arc e, human h where p.human_id in(select human_id from patient_results where human_id in(select human_id from patient_results where (Loinc_Observation='height' and value!=''))and (Loinc_Observation='weight' and value!='')) and p.human_id = h.human_id and((p.Loinc_Observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' and p.value!='')or (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) <3)) and e.human_id=p.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by p.human_id;
SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id union SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id;
SELECT distinct p.human_id FROM encounter e , patient_results p where p.human_id in (select human_id from patient_results where(Loinc_Observation='weight' and value!='' )) and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and p.human_id = e.human_id and (p.Loinc_Observation='Height' and p.value!='') group by p.human_Id union SELECT distinct p.human_id FROM encounter_arc e , patient_results p where p.human_id in (select human_id from patient_results where(Loinc_Observation='weight' and value!='' )) and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and p.human_id = e.human_id and (p.Loinc_Observation='Height' and p.value!='') group by p.human_Id;
SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >3 union SELECT distinct h.human_id FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >3;

Select distinct p.human_id from Patient_results p, human h where encounter_id in(SELECT e.encounter_id FROM encounter e , patient_results p where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and p.human_id = e.human_id and (p.Loinc_Observation='Height' and p.value!='')) and p.human_id = h.human_id and (Loinc_Observation='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia' and value!='') and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >? group by p.human_Id;

select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi ,EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) as age FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >?) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(h.human_id) hi ,EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) as age FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(NOW(),h.Birth_Date)))) >?) as m;
select distinct(e.human_Id) from encounter e ,document d where e.Encounter_ID=d.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and d.Document_Type not in('wellness note','clinical summary','progress note','consultation note' ,'Clinical Summary - Portal','Clinical Summary - Declined','') group by d.human_Id union select distinct(e.human_Id) from encounter_arc e ,document_arc d where e.Encounter_ID=d.Encounter_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? and d.Document_Type not in('wellness note','clinical summary','progress note','consultation note' ,'Clinical Summary - Portal','Clinical Summary - Declined','') group by d.human_Id;

Select o.Human_ID from result_master r, orders_submit o,lab l, result_obx ro where r.result_master_id=ro.result_master_id and (ro.obx_observation_value ='positive'or ro.obx_observation_value='negative' or ro.obx_observation_value REGEXP '^(-|\\+){0,1}([0-9]+\\.[0-9]*|[0-9]*\\:[0-9]+|[0-9]+)$' ) and o.Lab_ID=l.Lab_ID and r.matching_patient_id=o.human_id and Lab_Type='lab' and (r.order_id=o.order_submit_id) and o.Physician_id =? and o.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by ro.result_master_id

select e.human_id from encounter e left join activity_log a on e.human_id=a.human_id left join file_management_index f on e.human_id=f.human_Id where e.referring_physician!=''and e.encounter_provider_id=? and (a.activity_type='CCD Matched' or e.Visit_Type='New patient' or f.doc_sub_type='summary of care' ) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.Encounter_ID union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e left join activity_log a on e.human_id=a.human_id left join file_management_index f on e.human_id=f.human_Id where e.referring_physician!=''and e.encounter_provider_id=? and (a.activity_type='CCD Matched' or e.Visit_Type='New patient' or f.doc_sub_type='summary of care' ) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.Encounter_ID;
select e.human_id from encounter e left join activity_log a on e.human_id=a.human_id left join file_management_index f on e.human_id=f.human_Id where e.referring_physician!=''and e.encounter_provider_id=? and (a.activity_type='CCD Matched' or e.Visit_Type='New patient' or f.doc_sub_type='summary of care' ) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.Encounter_ID union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e left join activity_log a on e.human_id=a.human_id left join file_management_index f on e.human_id=f.human_Id where e.referring_physician!=''and e.encounter_provider_id=? and (a.activity_type='CCD Matched' or e.Visit_Type='New patient' or f.doc_sub_type='summary of care' ) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? group by e.Encounter_ID;

select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter e inner join document d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 3 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct(e.Human_Id) hi FROM encounter_arc e inner join document_arc d on (e.encounter_id=d.encounter_id and document_type='Clinical Summary' and date_Add(date_format(e.Date_of_Service,'%Y-%m-%d'), interval 3 day)<= date_format(d.Created_Date_And_Time,'%Y-%m-%d')) where Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and date_sub(?,interval 3 day)) as m;

select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m union select hi from (SELECT distinct (h.human_id) hi FROM human h ,encounter_arc e where h.human_id=e.human_id and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and e.Date_of_Service between ? and ? group by e.human_Id) as m;
select e.human_id from encounter e ,human h, activity_log ac where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and h.human_id =e.human_id and DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) not between 6 and 64 and e.human_id=ac.human_id and ac.activity_date_and_time between ? and ? and ac.activity_type in('email','mail','phone') group by e.human_id union select e.human_id from encounter_arc e ,human h, activity_log ac where e.Encounter_Provider_ID=? and h.human_id =e.human_id and DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) not between 6 and 64 and e.human_id=ac.human_id and ac.activity_date_and_time between ? and ? and ac.activity_type in('email','mail','phone') group by e.human_id
select hid from (select distinct(h.Human_ID) hid, DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as Agec from human h inner join (select human_id hi from encounter where Encounter_Provider_ID=? group by hi ) as b on (h.Human_id=b.hi) having Agec not between 6 and 64) as m union select hid from (select distinct(h.Human_ID) hid, DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y') - DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '%Y') - (DATE_FORMAT(?, '00-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(h.birth_date, '00-%m-%d')) as Agec from human h inner join (select human_id hi from encounter_arc where Encounter_Provider_ID=? group by hi ) as b on (h.Human_id=b.hi) having Agec not between 6 and 64) as m
SELECT O.Order_ID, O.Encounter_ID,O.Human_ID, O.Physician_ID, OS.Lab_Location_ID, OS.Lab_ID, O.Lab_Procedure, OS.Authorization_Required, CAST(OS.Test_Date AS char(100)), OS.Order_Notes, null,ifnull(OS.Stat,""),ifnull(OS.Fasting,""), CAST(OS.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Created_By, CAST(O.Created_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),O.Modified_By, CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS char(100)), O.Version, O.Lab_Procedure_Description, OS.Order_Type, null,OS.Facility_Name,OS.Height, OS.Weight,OS.Order_Code_Type,OS.Bill_Type,OS.Is_ABN_Signed,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Type,""),ifnull(OS.Culture_Location,""),OS.Move_To_MA,L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,ifnull(W.Current_Process,''),CAST(OS.Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time AS char(100)),OS.Temperature,OS.Order_Submit_ID,ifnull(OS.Specimen_Unit,""),ifnull(OS.Quantity,0),OS.Version FROM orders O LEFT JOIN orders_submit OS ON O.Order_Submit_ID=OS.Order_Submit_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (OS.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (OS.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) LEFT JOIN wf_object W ON (O.Order_Submit_ID=W.Obj_System_ID and OS.Order_Type=W.Obj_Type) WHERE O.Encounter_ID=? AND OS.Order_Type=? and W.Current_Process!='DELETED_ORDER' ORDER BY CAST(O.Modified_Date_And_Time AS CHAR(100)) DESC
SELECT Block_Category FROM `physician_pov` where purpose_of_visit=? and Legal_Org=? group by Block_Category
SELECT Auth_No FROM `Authorization` where Referred_From_Provider_ID=? and (? between From_Date and To_Date) and Human_ID=? ;
SELECT a.Authorization_no,b.procedure_code,b.Units_Approved,ifnull(count(distinct authorization_encounter_id),0) as usedQuantity, concat(a.icd1,',',a.icd2,',',a.icd3,',',a.icd4,',',a.icd5,',',a.icd6,',',a.icd7,',',a.icd8,',', a.icd9,',',a.icd10,',',a.icd11,',',a.icd12) , cast(DATE_FORMAT(valid_from_date,'%d-%b-%Y') as char(20)),cast(DATE_FORMAT(valid_to_date,'%d-%b-%Y') as char(20)), Referred_from_provider,Referred_to_provider,Referred_to_Facility, a.payer_name,a.Insurance_Plan_Name,a.pcp_name,a.authorization_notes,POS,Authorization_Category,a.authorization_id,b.Authorization_procedure_id,a.human_id, (b.Units_Approved - ifnull(count(distinct authorization_encounter_id),0)) as Calculated from authorization as a join authorization_procedure as b on a.authorization_id=b.authorization_id left join authorization_encounter as c on c.Authorization_procedure_id=b.Authorization_procedure_id where a.human_id=? and valid_from_date <= ? and valid_to_date>= ? group by procedure_code,Authorization_no order by calculated asc;
SELECT a.Authorization_no,b.procedure_code,b.Units_Approved,ifnull(count(distinct authorization_encounter_id),0) as usedQuantity, concat(a.icd1,',',a.icd2,',',a.icd3,',',a.icd4,',',a.icd5,',',a.icd6,',',a.icd7,',',a.icd8,',', a.icd9,',',a.icd10,',',a.icd11,',',a.icd12) , cast(DATE_FORMAT(valid_from_date,'%d-%b-%Y') as char(20)),cast(DATE_FORMAT(valid_to_date,'%d-%b-%Y') as char(20)), Referred_from_provider,Referred_to_provider,Referred_to_Facility, a.payer_name,a.Insurance_Plan_Name,a.pcp_name,a.authorization_notes,POS,Authorization_Category,a.authorization_id,b.Authorization_procedure_id,a.human_id from authorization as a join authorization_procedure as b on a.authorization_id=b.authorization_id left join authorization_encounter as c on c.Authorization_procedure_id=b.Authorization_procedure_id where b.Authorization_Procedure_ID in (:ProcID) group by procedure_code,Authorization_no;
select Ap.From_Procedure_Code_Description,Ap.From_Procedure_Code,Ap.To_Procedure_Code,Ap.To_Procedure_Code_Description from authorization_procedure Ap where Ap.Authorization_ID=?;
SELECT cast(E.Appointment_Date as char(100)),
(select concat(ifnull(k.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(k.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(k.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(k.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(k.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP from physician_library K where e.appointment_provider_id=k.physician_library_id and e.encounter_id =?), f.facility_name from wf_object_billing w,Encounter E,authorization b,Authorization_Encounter A,Human H,Facility_Library F where b.authorization_id=a.authorization_id and w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id and A.Human_ID=H.Human_ID and f.facility_name=b.referred_to_facility and A.Authorization_Id =? and e.encounter_id=? order by H.Human_ID,H.Birth_Date,A.Authorization_id
SELECT Facility_Name from facility_library f where f.facility_type=? order by Facility_Name
SELECT Start_Time,End_Time FROM `facility_library` where Facility_Name=?;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 18 and 85 union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 18 and 85;
select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code) union select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding_arc where encounter_id in (:EncIdarcs) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code);
select encounter_ID,human_id,icd,Assessment_ID from assessment where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and icd in(:ICD) union select encounter_ID,human_id,icd,Assessment_ID from assessment_arc where encounter_id in (:EncIdarcs) and icd in(:ICD)
SELECT encounter_ID,human_id,Value,Loinc_Identifier,Patient_Results_ID,cast(Captured_date_and_time as char(100)) FROM `patient_results` where encounter_Id in (:EncIds) and loinc_observation ='BP-Sitting Sys/Dia';
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) from encounter e where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_Id in (:HumIds) and e.Date_of_service between ? and ? union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) from encounter_arc e where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_Id in (:HumIdArcs) and e.Date_of_service between ? and ?
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) >=18 union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) >=18;
select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding m where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code) union select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding_arc m where encounter_id in (:EncIdArcs) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code);
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 0 and 20 union select e.encounter_id, e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 0 and 20;
select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_code) union select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding_arc where encounter_id in (:EncIdArcs) and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_code);
select encounter_ID,human_id,icd,Assessment_ID from assessment where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and icd in(:ICD) union select encounter_ID,human_id,icd,Assessment_ID from assessment_arc where encounter_id in (:EncIdArcs) and icd in(:ICD)
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) >=65 union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) >=65;
select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and is_delete="N" and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_code) union select encounter_id,human_id,Procedure_Code from e_m_coding_arc where encounter_id in (:EncIdArcs) and is_delete="N" and Procedure_code in (:Procedure_code);
select encounter_id,human_id,procedure_code,cast(Given_Date as char(100)) from immunization where human_id in (:HumIds) and CVX_CODE=33 and Procedure_code ='90732';
SELECT human_id,Procedure_code,cast(Vis_Given_Date as char(100)) FROM `immunization_history` where human_id in (:HumIds) and Procedure_code='90732';
SELECT encounter_id,human_id FROM `encounter` where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and Encounter_Provider_Signed_Date<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' union SELECT encounter_id,human_id FROM `encounter_arc` where encounter_id in(:EncIdArcs) and Encounter_Provider_Signed_Date<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00';
select a.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.ICD,e.Procedure_code from Assessment a join e_m_coding e on a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where a.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and a.Icd in (:ICD) and e.procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code) union select a.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.ICD,e.Procedure_code from Assessment_arc a join e_m_coding_arc e on a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where a.encounter_id in (:EncIdarcs) and a.Icd in (:ICD) and e.procedure_code in (:Procedure_Code);

SELECT p.encounter_ID,p.human_id,p.Value,p.Loinc_Identifier,p.Patient_Results_ID,cast(p.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)) FROM `patient_results` p where p.encounter_Id in (:EncIds) and p.loinc_observation='BMI' and p.Value<>'';

SELECT p.encounter_ID,p.human_id,p.Value FROM `patient_results` p where p.encounter_Id in (:EncIds) and p.loinc_observation='BMI' and p.value>=25;

And ?;

select * from (select e.encounter_id as eid,e.human_id as hid,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)),cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)),TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) AS age from encounter e,human h where e.date_of_service between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_id=h.human_id)as hi where age between 5 and 17;

AS age from encounter e,human h where e.date_of_service between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_id=h.human_id)as hi where age between 5 and 17 ;

select e.encounter_id as eid,e.human_id as hid,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)), cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)),TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) as age from encounter e inner join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 3 and 17 union select e.encounter_id as eid,e.human_id as hid,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)),cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)),TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) as age from encounter e inner join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id where e.encounter_provider_id=? AS age from encounter e,human h where e.date_of_service between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.human_id=h.human_id)as hi where age between 18 and 85;

select human_id,NDC_ID from rcopia_prescription where human_id in (:EncIds) and NDC_ID in (:NDC)
select NDC_ID,Generic_Name,strength,Dose,Route,Dose_Other,Patient_Notes,'Active', cast(Start_Date as char(100)) as cdt1,Brand_Name,cast(Stop_Date as char(100)) as stopdate,Quantity, Quantity_unit,First_DataBank_Med_ID,icd_code,ICD_Code_Description, refills,action,dose_unit,dose_timing,code,str from (select m.*,r.code,r.str,timestampdiff(day,m.start_date,m.stop_date)as dt from rcopia_medication m,rxnconso r where m.human_id=? and r.str=m.Generic_Name and r.sab='rxnorm') as hi where dt=1 group by Generic_Name;
select o.order_id,o.encounter_id,o.human_id,o.physician_id,o.lab_procedure,o.lab_procedure_description, cast(o.created_date_and_time as char(100)) as creatdate,os.order_submit_id,os.encounter_id,os.human_id, os.physician_id,os.Test_date,(select if(e.date_of_service='0001-01-01', (select cast(date_of_service as char(100))as p from encounter where encounter_id=?),cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)))) as encounterdate from encounter e, wf_object wf,orders_submit os,orders o where (wf.obj_system_id=os.order_submit_id) and (o.order_submit_id=os.order_submit_id)and e.human_id=o.human_id and o.encounter_id=? and wf.current_process='order_generate' group by order_id
select r.referral_order_id,r.encounter_id,r.human_id,r.from_physician_id,cast(r.referral_date as char(100))as referraldate, r.To_Physician_Name,r.To_Facility_Name,r.To_Facility_Street_Address,r.To_Facility_City,r.To_Facility_State, cast(r.Valid_Till as char(100))as validtilldate,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100))as DateofService,r.to_facility_zip,r.Reason_For_Referral from referral_order r,encounter e where r.encounter_id=? and r.encounter_id=e.encounter_id;
select c.encounter_id,c.human_id,c.physician_id,c.Care_name,c.Care_name_value,c.status,c.care_plan_notes, c.plan_date,c.status_value from care_plan c where c.care_name like '%Cognitive Functioning%' and c.care_name_value='Disoriented' and c.encounter_id=?
select c.encounter_id,c.human_id,c.physician_id,c.Care_name,c.Care_name_value,c.status,c.care_plan_notes, c.plan_date,c.status_value,c.snomed_code from care_plan c where c.care_name like '%Cognitive Functioning%' and c.snomed_code!='' and c.encounter_id=? and status='Yes'

SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? AND a.Claim_Type<> 'PATIENT' AND a.Charge_Line_ITem_ID = ? AND a.Carrier_ID= 41 ORDER BY a.Human_ID
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.human_id in (:HumIds) and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? And ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 3 and 11 union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.human_id in (:HumIdArcs) and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 3 and 11;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100))from encounter e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.human_id in (:HumIds) and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 12 and 17 union select e.encounter_id,e.human_id, cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) from encounter_arc e inner join human h on e.Human_Id=h.human_id where e.human_id in (:HumIdArcs) and e.encounter_provider_id=? and e.date_of_service between ? and ? And TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,h.birth_date,?) between 12 and 17;
SELECT sum(a.Amount) FROM account_transaction a WHERE a.Human_ID = ? AND a.Line_Type= 'UNAPPLIED' AND a.Charge_Line_ITem_ID = ? ORDER BY a.Human_ID
select Batch_Name from Batch;
select a.assessment_ID,a.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.physician_id,al.snomed_code, al.snomed_code_description,a.primary_diagnosis from assessment a,all_icd al where a.encounter_id=? and a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.icd=al.all_icd union select a.assessment_ID,a.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.physician_id,al.snomed_code, al.snomed_code_description,a.primary_diagnosis from assessment_arc a,all_icd al where a.encounter_id=? and a.primary_diagnosis='y' and a.icd=al.all_icd;
select "SNOMED" as Type,code,code_description,"" as Value,"" as Units,"" as Ref_Range,"" as ValueText from case_reporting_lookup where code_source="Assessment" and status="ACTIVE" and code in (select icd from assessment where encounter_id=?) union select "LOINC" as Type,c.code, c.code_description,p.value as Value,p.units as Units,p.reference_range as Ref_Range,p.abnormal_flags as ValueText from patient_results p,case_reporting_lookup c where p.encounter_id=? and c.code=p.loinc_identifier and c.code_source='Lab Orders' and c.status='Active'
select s.field_name,s.Value,s.Default_Value from static_lookup s,human h where s.Value in (h.Race,h.Ethnicity) and s.field_name in ('RACE','ETHNICITY','GRANULARITY') and h.human_id=?;
select e.facility_name,f.facility_address1,f.facility_city,f.facility_state,f.facility_zip,f.facility_telephone from facility_library f,encounter e where f.facility_name=e.facility_name and e.encounter_id=? union select e.facility_name,f.facility_address1,f.facility_city,f.facility_state,f.facility_zip,f.facility_telephone from facility_library f,encounter_arc e where f.facility_name=e.facility_name and e.encounter_id=?;
select e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,e.encounter_Provider_id,p.physician_Address1, p.physician_City,p.physician_State,p.physician_Telephone,p.Physician_Zip,p.physician_prefix, p.physician_First_Name,p.physician_Last_Name,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100))as dateofservice,p.Physician_SSN_Number from encounter e,physician_library p where e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and e.encounter_id=? union select e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,e.encounter_Provider_id,p.physician_Address1, p.physician_City,p.physician_State,p.physician_Telephone,p.Physician_Zip,p.physician_prefix, p.physician_First_Name,p.physician_Last_Name,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100))as dateofservice,p.Physician_SSN_Number from encounter_arc e,physician_library p where e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and e.encounter_id=? ;
SELECT s.Description FROM static_lookup s where s.field_name='MODIFIER' AND s.VALUE=?;
SELECT m.Modifier_Code_Description FROM Modifier_library m where Modifier_Code=?;
select e.Encounter_ID,e.Human_ID,e.Message_ID,p.Notes from encounter e inner join patient_notes p on e.Message_ID=p.Message_ID WHERE e.Encounter_ID=?;
SELECT Facility_Name from facility_library f where f.Short_Name=? order by Facility_Name
SELECT count(distinct scan_index_conversion_id) FROM scan_index_conversion where workset_id=? and doc_type='Encounters' and Doc_Sub_type='Encounter Forms'
SELECT insurance_plan_id FROM `pat_insured_plan` where pat_insured_plan_id=? and insurance_type="primary"
SELECT cast(E.Appointment_Date as char(100)),
(select concat(ifnull(k.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(k.Physician_First_Name,''),' ', ifnull(k.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(k.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ', ifnull(k.Physician_Suffix,'')) as PCP from physician_library K where e.appointment_provider_id=k.physician_library_id and e.encounter_id =?), f.facility_name from wf_object_billing w,Encounter E,authorization b,Authorization_Encounter A,Human H,Facility_Library F where b.authorization_id=a.authorization_id and w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id and A.Human_ID=H.Human_ID and f.facility_name=b.referred_to_facility and A.Authorization_Id =? and e.encounter_id=? and cast(E.Appointment_Date as char(100))>=? order by H.Human_ID,H.Birth_Date,A.Authorization_id
SELECT distinct year FROM `raf_hcc_code_and_factors` order by year desc
SELECT p.Procedure_Code_Description FROM procedure_code_library p where Procedure_Code=?;
SELECT i.Short_Description FROM `all_icd` i where All_ICD=?;
SELECT m.Short_Description FROM Modifier_library m where Modifier_Code=?;
SELECT e.Facility_Name,cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as Arrivaldate,O.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,",",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';'),concat(p.Physician_Prefix, "",p.Physician_First_Name,"",p.Physician_Middle_Name,"",p.Physician_Last_Name,"",p.Physician_Suffix),O.in_house_procedure_ID FROM `in_house_procedure` O,Physician_Library p, Human h,encounter e where O.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_id=O.encounter_id and O.physician_id=p.Physician_Library_ID and o.human_id LIKE ? and O.Physician_ID LIKE ? And e.facility_name like ? and O.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID ;
SELECT e.Facility_Name,cast(O.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as Arrivaldate,O.Human_ID, concat(h.Last_Name,",",h.First_Name," ",h.MI),cast(h.Birth_Date as CHAR(100)) as BirthDate,O.Physician_ID, group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description) separator ';'),concat(p.Physician_Prefix, "",p.Physician_First_Name,"",p.Physician_Middle_Name,"",p.Physician_Last_Name,"",p.Physician_Suffix),O.in_house_procedure_ID FROM `in_house_procedure` O,Physician_Library p, Human h,encounter e where O.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_id=O.encounter_id and O.physician_id=p.Physician_Library_ID and o.human_id LIKE ? and O.Physician_ID LIKE ? And e.facility_name like ? and O.Created_Date_And_Time between ? and ? group by O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT i.Insurance_Plan_Name,i.External_Plan_Number FROM `insurance_plan` i where Insurance_Plan_ID=?;
SELECT distinct To_Process,Close_Type from workflow where Doc_Type=? and Doc_Sub_Type=? and From_Process=? and Obj_Type=?;
select v.Patient_Results_ID,v.Loinc_Observation, v.Value, v.Units from patient_results v inner join dynamic_screen s on (v.Loinc_Observation=s.control_Name) where v.encounter_id=? and v.human_id=? and Results_Type='Vitals' group by v.Loinc_Observation order by s.sort_order;
select max(Sort_Order)+1 AS SortOrder from user_lookup where Field_Name=? and User_Name=? group by Field_Name;
SELECT r.Allergy_Name,r.Reaction,r.NDC_ID,r.Status,cast(r.OnsetDate as char(100)) as cdt,r.First_DataBank_Med_ID,r.rcopia_id,r.Rxnorm_ID FROM `rcopia_allergy` r where r.human_id=? and r.Deleted='N' and r.Rcopia_ID not in (?) group by r.Allergy_Name;
SELECT r.Allergy_Name,r.Reaction,r.NDC_ID,r.Status,cast(r.OnsetDate as char(100)) as cdt,r.First_DataBank_Med_ID,r.rcopia_id,r.Rxnorm_ID FROM `rcopia_allergy` r where r.human_id=? and r.Deleted='N' group by r.Allergy_Name;
SELECT m.NDC_ID,m.Generic_Name,m.strength,m.Dose,m.Route,m.Dose_Other,m.Patient_Notes,'Active',cast(m.Start_Date as char(100)) as cdt1,m.Brand_Name,cast(m.Stop_Date as char(100)) as stopdate,m.Quantity,m.Quantity_unit,m.First_DataBank_Med_ID,m.icd_code,m.ICD_Code_Description,m.refills,m.action,m.dose_unit,m.dose_timing,m.rcopia_ID FROM rcopia_medication m where m.Human_ID =? group by m.generic_name;
SELECT m.NDC_ID,m.Generic_Name,m.strength,m.Dose,m.Route,m.Dose_Other,m.Patient_Notes,'Active',cast(m.Start_Date as char(100)) as cdt1,m.Brand_Name,cast(m.Stop_Date as char(100)) as stopdate,m.Quantity,m.Quantity_unit,m.First_DataBank_Med_ID,m.icd_code,m.ICD_Code_Description,m.refills,m.action,m.dose_unit,m.dose_timing,m.rcopia_ID FROM rcopia_medication m where m.Human_ID =? and m.rcopia_id not in (?) group by m.generic_name;
select h.Human_ID from Human h where h.First_Name =? and h.Last_Name=? and h.Birth_Date=? and h.Sex like ?;
select cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)),h.human_id,h.Patient_Account_External,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), w.Current_Process,r.Lab_ID,concat( pl.Physician_Prefix,' ', pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix),l.Lab_Name,r.Result_Master_ID,w.Obj_Type,pl.Physician_Library_ID,w.Is_abnormal from Result_Master r left join Wf_Object w on r.Result_Master_Id=w.obj_system_id left join human h on h.Human_ID=r.Matching_Patient_ID left join result_orc rc on rc.Result_Master_Id=r.Result_Master_Id left join physician_library pl on pl.Physician_NPI=rc.ORC_Ordering_Provider_ID left join lab l on l.Lab_ID=r.Lab_ID left join process_user u on w.current_process=u.process_name where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.obj_type=? and w.current_owner=? group by w.obj_system_id;
select cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)),h.human_id,h.Patient_Account_External,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), w.Current_Process,r.Lab_ID,concat( pl.Physician_Prefix,' ', pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix),l.Lab_Name,r.Result_Master_ID,w.Obj_Type,pl.Physician_Library_ID,w.Is_abnormal from Result_Master r left join Wf_Object w on r.Result_Master_Id=w.obj_system_id left join human h on h.Human_ID=r.Matching_Patient_ID left join result_orc rc on rc.Result_Master_Id=r.Result_Master_Id left join physician_library pl on pl.Physician_NPI=rc.ORC_Ordering_Provider_ID left join lab l on l.Lab_ID=r.Lab_ID left join process_user u on w.current_process=u.process_name where w.obj_type=? and w.current_owner=? group by w.obj_system_id;
SELECT r.result_master_id myid,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as Created_Date_And_Time , (select OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time from result_obr where result_master_id=myid limit 1), (select group_concat(OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",o.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text) from result_obr o where o.result_master_id=myid),r.Is_Electronic_Mode FROM `result_master` r where r.Matching_Patient_ID =? and r.Result_Master_ID=? order by result_Received_Date desc;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and (r.Matching_Patient_ID=0 or Order_ID=0) and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,r.Matching_Patient_ID,c.ORC_Specimen_ID,e.Reason_Code,c.orc_ordering_provider_id from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and (r.Matching_Patient_ID=0 or Order_ID=0) and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and r.Order_Id=0 and r.Matching_Patient_ID<>0 and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,r.Matching_Patient_ID,c.ORC_Specimen_ID,e.Reason_Code,c.orc_ordering_provider_id from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and r.Order_Id=0 and r.Matching_Patient_ID<>0 and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and r.Matching_Patient_ID=0 and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc;
