select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,r.Matching_Patient_ID,c.ORC_Specimen_ID,e.Reason_Code,c.orc_ordering_provider_id from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where c.orc_ordering_provider_id=? and r.Matching_Patient_ID=0 and Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,r.Matching_Patient_ID,c.ORC_Specimen_ID,e.Reason_Code,c.orc_ordering_provider_id from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select count(*) from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 and Reason_Code in('ACUR_LAB_05','ACUR_LAB_06') group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc;
select r.PID_External_Patient_ID,r.PID_Patient_Last_Name,r.PID_Patient_First_Name,r.PID_Patient_Middle_Name,r.PID_Patient_Date_Of_Birth,r.PID_Patient_Gender,r.PID_Patient_SSN,group_concat(x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Identifier,"-",x.OBR_Observation_Battery_Text,";"),ORC_Ordering_Provider_Last_Name, ORC_Ordering_Provider_First_Initial,e.reason_code,e.reason_description,r.result_master_id,r.Order_ID,r.lab_id,r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message,r.Matching_Patient_ID,c.ORC_Specimen_ID,e.Reason_Code,c.orc_ordering_provider_id from error_log e left join result_master r on e.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_obr x on x.result_master_id=r.result_master_id left join result_orc c on r.result_master_id=c.result_master_id where Is_Deleted='N' and e.result_master_id<>0 and Reason_Code in('ACUR_LAB_05','ACUR_LAB_06') group by x.result_master_id order by r.MSH_Date_And_Time_Of_Message desc limit ?,?;
select distinct(human_id),encounter_id from encounter where human_id not in (0)
select distinct(encounter_id),encounter_provider_id from encounter where human_id=?
select distinct os.lab_id,os.Order_submit_id from orders_submit os,orders o,wf_object wf where os.order_submit_id=o.order_submit_id and wf.obj_system_id=os.order_submit_id and wf.obj_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' and wf.current_process<>'DELETED_ORDER' and os.encounter_id =? and os.order_type=? and os.lab_id in(:LabID) ORDER BY CAST(if(o.Modified_Date_And_Time<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00',o.Modified_Date_And_Time,o.Created_date_and_time) AS CHAR(100)) DESC;
select os.lab_id,os.Order_submit_id from orders_submit os,orders o,wf_object wf where os.order_submit_id=o.order_submit_id and wf.obj_system_id=os.order_submit_id and wf.obj_type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' and wf.current_process<>'DELETED_ORDER' and os.encounter_id=? and os.human_id=? and os.physician_id=? and os.lab_id in(:LabID) ORDER BY CAST(if(o.Modified_Date_And_Time<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00',o.Modified_Date_And_Time,o.Created_date_and_time) AS CHAR(100)) DESC;
SELECT Cast(date_format(last_updated_date_time,'%m/%d/%Y %T') as char(100)) FROM `rcopia_update_info` where Command=?;
select h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient,h.ACO_Patient_Discussed,h.ACO_Patient_Discussed_By,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Suffix from human h where h.human_id=?;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,h.Patient_Status FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT p.insurance_plan_id,p.policy_holder_id,p.human_id,i.insurance_plan_name,i.external_plan_number FROM pat_insured_plan p join insurance_plan i on(p.insurance_plan_id=i.insurance_plan_id) where p.human_id=? and p.Insurance_Type='PRIMARY'
SELECT l.Lookup_Id,l.Field_Name,l.Table_Name,cast(l.Last_Modified_Date as char(100)) FROM `last_modified_local_lookup` l where l.Field_Name=?
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,h.Patient_Status FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))
SELECT u.user_name,cast(u.Last_logged_time as char(100)),u.macaddress,u.version,u.current_session_ID FROM `user_session` u where u.user_Name=?
SELECT u.user_name,cast(u.Last_logged_time as char(100)),u.macaddress,u.version,u.current_session_ID FROM `user_session` u where u.current_session_id=?
Select count(*) from ( SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pature, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan s on (w.obj_system_id=s.Scan_ID ) left join scan_index_conversion si on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name=? and w.Obj_Type =? and p.process_type='assigned'
union all
SELECT s.Scanned_File_Name, s.No_of_Pages, cast(s.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d, s.Facility_Name, s.Scan_Type, w.Obj_System_Id,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,si.human_id FROM wf_object w left join scan_index_conversion si on (si.Scan_Index_Conversion_ID=w.Obj_System_Id) left join Scan s on (s.Scan_ID= si.Scan_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join process_master p on (w.current_process=p.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type=? and p.process_type='assigned' ) as c;
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join process_master u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.Obj_Type =? and u.process_type='assigned') as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))) as c
SELECT count(distinct a.message_id) from ((select p.message_id FROM patient_notes p left join wf_object w on (p.message_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='TASK') where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process='OPEN_TASK') union all (select p.message_id FROM patient_notes p left join wf_object w on (p.message_id=w.obj_system_id and w.obj_type='TASK') where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and p.created_by = ? and w.current_process='OPEN_TASK')) as a;
SELECT count(*) FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name=? and w.Obj_Type ='TASK'
Select count(*) from ( SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id, h.last_name, h.first_name, h.mi, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)), h.Patient_Account_External , e.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0, if(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > ?, cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))), cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))) , a.Created_By, cast(a.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) , if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Signed_ID), if(a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID), ' ')) , e.encounter_id, e.Encounter_Provider_ID, w.Obj_Type, a.Addendum_Notes_ID, w.Current_Owner FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.Parent_Obj_System_Id = e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) left join addendum_Notes a on (w.Obj_System_Id = a.Addendum_Notes_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = p.Physician_Library_ID) where w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) ) as c
SELECT count(*) FROM wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.Obj_Type ='ADDENDUM' ;
Select count(*) from (SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id, h.last_name, h.first_name, h.mi, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)), h.Patient_Account_External , e.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0, if(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > ?, cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))), cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))) , a.Created_By, cast(a.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) , if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Signed_ID), if(a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID), ' ')) , e.encounter_id, e.Encounter_Provider_ID, w.Obj_Type, a.Addendum_Notes_ID, w.Current_Owner FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.Parent_Obj_System_Id = e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) left join addendum_Notes a on (w.Obj_System_Id = a.Addendum_Notes_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = p.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process = u.process_name) where u.user_name = ? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) ) as c
SELECT count(*) FROM wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process = u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name = ? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name = ? and w.Obj_Type ='ADDENDUM';
Select count(*) from (SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID) as c ;
SELECT count(*) FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.Obj_Type ='DICTATION_RESULT' ;
Select count(*) from (SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.facility_name=:FacName and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID) as c;
SELECT count(*) FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and wf.current_owner =:CurOwner and wf.facility_name=:FacName and wf.Obj_Type='DICTATION_RESULT' ;
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id ) as c
Select count(*) from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER';
Select count(*) from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type in ('DIAGNOSTIC ORDER','DME ORDER');
Select count(*) from (SELECT cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join orders O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT cast(O.Test_Date as char(100)),group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Lab_ID,O.Lab_Location_ID,O.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type from wf_object w left join orders O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Orders_Internal_Submit_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (O.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (O.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c;
Select count(*) from(SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id) as c
select count(*) from WF_Object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.Obj_Type ='E-PRESCRIBE';
Select count(*) from WF_Object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type ='E-PRESCRIBE';
Select count(*) from (SELECT w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join process_master u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner = ? and w.facility_name=? and w.Obj_Type =? and u.process_type='assigned'
union all
SELECT w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join process_master u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type=? and u.process_type='assigned' ) as c
select count(*) from (select cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as char(100)),h.human_id,h.Patient_Account_External,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), w.Current_Process,r.Lab_ID,concat( pl.Physician_Prefix,' ', pl.Physician_First_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ', pl.Physician_Suffix),l.Lab_Name,r.Result_Master_ID,w.Obj_Type,pl.Physician_Library_ID from Result_Master r left join Wf_Object w on r.Result_Master_Id=w.obj_system_id left join human h on h.Human_ID=r.Matching_Patient_ID left join result_orc rc on rc.Result_Master_Id=r.Result_Master_Id left join physician_library pl on pl.Physician_NPI=rc.ORC_Ordering_Provider_ID left join lab l on l.Lab_ID=r.Lab_ID left join process_user u on w.current_process=u.process_name where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.obj_type=? and w.current_owner=? group by w.obj_system_id) as c;
Select n.non_drug_allergy_history_id, n.human_id, n.non_drug_allergy_history_info, n.Is_present, n.description, n.created_by, cast(n.created_date_and_time as char(100)), n.modified_by, cast(n.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), n.version, n.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from non_drug_allergy_history n, encounter e where n.human_id=? and n.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
Select s.social_history_id, s.human_id, s.social_info, s.Is_present, s.description, s.value, s.recodes, s.Is_mandatory, s.created_by, cast(s.created_date_and_time as char(100)), s.modified_by, cast(s.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), s.version, s.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from social_history s, encounter e where s.human_id=? and s.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
Select h.hospitalization_id, h.human_id, h.from_date, h.to_date, h.reason_for_hospitalization, h.created_by, cast(h.created_date_and_time as char(100)), h.modified_by, cast(h.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), h.version, h.hospitalization_notes, h.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from hospitalization h, encounter e where h.human_id=? and h.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
Select s.surgical_history_id, s.human_id, s.surgery_name, s.date_of_surgery, s.Description, s.Is_Present, s.created_by, cast(s.created_date_and_time as char(100)), s.modified_by, cast(s.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), s.version, s.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from surgical_history s, encounter e where s.human_id=? and s.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
Select p.past_medcial_History_id, p.human_id, p.past_medical_info, p.from_date, p.to_date, p.Is_present, p.AHA_Question_ICD, p.Is_mandatory, p.notes, p.created_by, cast(p.created_date_and_time as char(100)), p.modified_by, cast(p.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), p.version, p.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from past_medical_history p, encounter e where p.human_id=? and p.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
Select f.family_history_id, f.human_id, f.relationship, f.age, f.status, f.cause_of_death, f.created_by, cast(f.created_date_and_time as char(100)), f.modified_by, cast(f.modified_date_and_time as char(100)), f.version, f.encounter_id, e.encounter_id as enc_id,cast(e.date_of_service as char(100)) from family_history f, encounter e where f.human_id=? and f.human_id=e.human_id order by e.date_of_service desc;
SELECT n.Message_ID,N.Human_Id,N.Message_Description,w.Current_Owner,N.Assigned_To,N.Modified_By ,cast(N.Modified_Date_And_Time as char(100)) as d,n.Facility_Name,cast(N.Message_Date_And_Time as char(100)),n.Version,ifnull(h.last_name,''),ifnull(h.first_name,''),ifnull(h.mi,''), cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,h.Patient_Account_External,w.Obj_Type FROM wf_object w left join patient_notes n on (n.Message_Id=w.obj_system_id) left join human h on (n.Human_id=h.human_id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList));
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Immunization_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Immunization_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join immunization O on (w.Obj_System_ID=O.Immunization_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList))group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id, h.last_name, h.first_name, h.mi, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)), h.Patient_Account_External , e.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0, if(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100)), cast(a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))), cast(a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time as char(100))) , a.Created_By, cast(a.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)) , if(a.Provider_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Signed_ID), if(a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID > 0 && a.Provider_Review_Signed_Date_And_Time > '0001-01-01 00:00:00', (select concat(Physician_Prefix,' ',Physician_First_Name,' ',Physician_Middle_Name,' ',Physician_Last_Name,' ',Physician_Suffix) from physician_library where Physician_Library_ID = a.Provider_Review_Signed_ID), ' ')) , e.encounter_id, e.Encounter_Provider_ID, w.Obj_Type, a.Addendum_Notes_ID, w.Current_Owner FROM wf_object w left join encounter e on (w.Parent_Obj_System_Id = e.encounter_id) left join human h on (e.Human_ID = h.Human_ID) left join addendum_Notes a on (w.Obj_System_Id = a.Addendum_Notes_ID) left join physician_library p on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = p.Physician_Library_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process = u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name = ? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList));
SELECT e.Exception_ID,e.Encounter_ID,e.File_Name,wf.Obj_System_Id,wf.Current_Process,wf.Facility_Name,wf.Obj_Type,wf.current_owner,e.Data,e.Header,e.Sub_Header FROM dictation_exception e,wf_object wf left join process_user u on (wf.current_process=u.process_name) where e.Exception_ID=wf.obj_system_id and e.encounter_id=0 and u.user_name=:UserName and wf.Current_Process='DICTATION_EXCEPTION' and wf.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and (wf.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by e.Exception_ID ;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Procedure_Code,'-',O.Procedure_Code_Description)separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.Physician_ID,O.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join in_house_procedure O on (w.obj_system_id=O.In_House_Procedure_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
SELECT h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), O.Encounter_ID,O.From_Physician_ID,w.Facility_Name,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,O.Referral_Order_Group_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type,O.Reason_For_Referral,O.To_Physician_Name,O.To_Facility_Name,cast(O.created_date_and_time as char(100)) from wf_object w left join referral_order O on (w.obj_system_id=O.Referral_Order_Group_ID) left join human H on O.Human_ID=H.Human_ID left join physician_library p on O.From_Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID left join encounter e on O.Encounter_ID=e.Encounter_ID left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id
select cast(p.Prescription_Date as char(100)) as Prescription_Date,h.Medical_Record_Number,(h.Human_Id) as Patient_AC,h.Patient_Account_External, h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Date_Of_Birth,p.Prescription_Id,w.obj_type,w.current_owner from WF_Object w left join prescription p on (w.obj_system_id=p.Prescription_Id) LEFT JOIN human h on (p.human_id=h.human_Id) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by Prescription_Id;
SELECT group_concat(concat(O.Lab_Procedure,'-',O.Lab_Procedure_Description) separator ';'),h.Medical_Record_Number, h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi,concat(p.Physician_Prefix,' ',p.Physician_First_Name,' ',p.Physician_Middle_Name,' ', p.Physician_Last_Name,' ',p.Physician_Suffix),L.Lab_Name,LL.Location_Name,h.Patient_Account_External,cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)), OS.Encounter_ID,OS.Physician_ID,OS.Lab_ID,OS.Lab_Location_ID,OS.Facility_Name,w.Obj_System_ID,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type, OS.Order_submit_id, cast(OS.created_date_and_time as char(100)),O.CMG_Encounter_ID,c.is_narrative_interpretation from wf_object w left join orders_submit OS on (w.obj_system_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join orders O on (O.Order_submit_id=OS.Order_submit_id) left join human H on H.Human_ID=OS.Human_ID left join physician_library p on OS.Physician_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID LEFT JOIN lab L ON (Os.Lab_ID=L.Lab_ID) LEFT JOIN lab_location LL ON (Os.Lab_Location_ID=LL.Lab_Location_ID) left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) left join scan_index_conversion c on (c.Order_ID = os.Order_submit_id) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and (w.Obj_Type in (:ObjList)) group by w.obj_system_id;
(SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS, concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,'')),e.Visit_Type FROM encounter e left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) where e.human_id= ? and e.date_of_service<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc) union all (SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS,concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,'')),e.Visit_Type FROM encounter_arc e left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) where e.human_id= ? and e.date_of_service<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc) order by DOS desc;
SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS,concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Suffix,'')) FROM human h left join encounter_arc e on (h.Human_ID = e.Human_ID and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y') left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = u.Physician_Library_ID) where h.human_id= ? and e.date_of_service<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc;
SELECT File_Management_Index_ID,cast(Created_Date_And_Time as char(100)),File_Path FROM `file_management_index` where Source='SUMMARY OF CARE' and Human_ID=?;
SELECT count(*) from wf_object w where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and w.current_owner = ? and w.Obj_Type in ('DIAGNOSTIC ORDER','INTERNAL ORDER','IMMUNIZATION ORDER','REFERRAL ORDER','DIAGNOSTIC_RESULT','DME ORDER') and w.current_process in (SELECT process_name FROM process_user where user_name = ?) ;
Select count(*) from wf_object w left join process_user u on (w.current_process=u.process_name) where w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem=1 and u.user_name=? and w.current_owner =? and w.facility_name= ? and w.Obj_Type in ('DIAGNOSTIC ORDER','INTERNAL ORDER','IMMUNIZATION ORDER','REFERRAL ORDER','DME ORDER');
SELECT concat(all_icd,'~',icd_description,'~',SUBSTRING_INDEX(ICD_Synonyms, '|', 1)) FROM `all_icd` where Is_Active='Y' and all_icd like ? and Version_Year=?;
SELECT concat(all_icd,'~',icd_description,'~',SUBSTRING_INDEX(ICD_Synonyms, '|', 1)) FROM `all_icd` where Is_Active='Y' and (icd_description like ? or icd_synonyms like ? ) and Version_Year=?;
SELECT concat(all_icd,'~',icd_description,'~',ICD_Synonyms) FROM `all_icd` where Leaf_Node= 'Y' and Is_Active='Y' and (icd_description like ? or icd_synonyms like ? ) and Version_Year=? and date_format(from_date,'%Y-%m-%d')<= ? and date_format(to_date,'%Y-%m-%d')>=? order by all_icd;
SELECT concat(all_icd,'~',icd_description,'~',SUBSTRING_INDEX(ICD_Synonyms, '|', 1)) FROM `all_icd` where Leaf_Node= 'Y' and Is_Active='Y' and all_icd like ? and Version_Year=? and date_format(from_date,'%Y-%m-%d')<= ? and date_format(to_date,'%Y-%m-%d')>=?;
SELECT concat(Procedure_Code,'~',Procedure_Code_Description) FROM `procedure_code_library` where Procedure_Code_Description like ? and Procedure_Type=?;
SELECT concat(Procedure_Code,'~',Procedure_Code_Description,'~',Procedure_charge ,'~',sort_order) FROM `procedure_code_library` where Procedure_Code like ? and Is_Active='Y' and date_format(from_date,'%Y-%m-%d')<= ? and date_format(to_date,'%Y-%m-%d')>=?;
SELECT P.Physician_Library_ID,P.Physician_Prefix,P.Physician_First_Name, P.Physician_Middle_Name,P.Physician_Last_Name,P.Physician_Suffix, S.Specialty, ifnull(f.Facility_City,p.Physician_City),ifnull(f.Facility_State,p.Physician_State), ifnull(f.Facility_Zip,p.Physician_Zip), P.Physician_NPI,S.physician_specialty_id, M.Facility_Name,P.Physician_Fax,ifnull(f.facility_Address1,p.Physician_Address1),P.Physician_Telephone FROM `physician_library` P left JOIN map_facility_physician M ON (P.Physician_Library_ID=M.Physician_ID) left join physician_specialty s on (p.Physician_Library_ID=s.Physician_ID) left join facility_library as f on f.facility_name=m.facility_name WHERE P.Category in('PROVIDER','NON USER(Physician)','NON CAPELLA USER(Physician)') and (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? OR P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ? or M.Facility_Name like ?);
SELECT P.Physician_Library_ID,P.Physician_Prefix,P.Physician_First_Name, P.Physician_Middle_Name,P.Physician_Last_Name,P.Physician_Suffix, '',f.Facility_City,f.Facility_State, f.Facility_Zip,P.Physician_NPI,'',M.Facility_Name, P.Physician_Fax,ifnull(f.facility_Address1,''),P.Physician_Telephone, p.Physician_EMail,p.Company,p.Category FROM `physician_library` P left JOIN map_facility_physician M ON (P.Physician_Library_ID=M.Physician_ID) left join facility_library as f on f.facility_name=m.facility_name WHERE P.Category in('PROVIDER','NON USER(Physician)','ORGANIZATION','USER','NON CAPELLA USER','NON CAPELLA USER(Physician)') and (P.Physician_Last_Name LIKE ? OR P.Physician_First_Name LIKE ? or M.Facility_Name like ? or P.Company like ?) ;
CALL COPY_PREVIOUS_ENCOUNTER(:HUMANID, :PREVIOUSENCOUNTER, :CURRENTENCOUNTER, :CURRENTPHYSICIAN, :ROLE, :CURRENTUSER, :CURRENTDOS);
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM addendum_notes a,wf_object w,encounter e,human h,physician_library p where a.addendum_notes_id=w.obj_system_id and a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id and a.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and w.obj_type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=?;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM addendum_notes a,wf_object w,encounter e,human h,physician_library p where a.addendum_notes_id=w.obj_system_id and a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id and a.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and w.obj_type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM addendum_notes_arc a,wf_object_arc w,encounter_arc e,human h,physician_library p where a.addendum_notes_id=w.obj_system_id and a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id and a.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and w.obj_type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=?;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM addendum_notes_arc a,wf_object_arc w,encounter_arc e,human h,physician_library p where a.addendum_notes_id=w.obj_system_id and a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id and a.human_id=h.human_id and e.encounter_provider_id=p.physician_library_id and w.obj_type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM wf_object_arc w, encounter_arc e , human h , physician_library p where w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=?
SELECT cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as d,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.mi, e.encounter_id,e.Encounter_Provider_ID,e.Visit_Type, concat(ifnull(p.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(p.Physician_Suffix,'')), e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as b,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as a, h.Patient_Account_External, h.Suffix, e.Exam_Room,e.Facility_Name,w.Current_Owner,w.Current_Process,w.Obj_Type,w.Obj_Sub_Type FROM wf_object_arc w, encounter_arc e , human h , physician_library p where w.obj_system_id=e.encounter_id and e.Human_ID=h.Human_ID and e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID and w.Obj_Type=? and w.Facility_Name=? and w.Current_Process=? LIMIT ?,?;
SELECT p.carrier_id,p.Insurance_Plan_ID FROM `insurance_plan` p where p.Insurance_Plan_ID in (:InsurancePlanID);
SELECT p.carrier_id,p.Insurance_Plan_ID,ip.human_id FROM `insurance_plan` p, (SELECT ip.insurance_plan_id,ip.human_id FROM `pat_insured_plan` ip where ip.human_id in (:HumanID)) as ip where p.Insurance_Plan_ID in (ip.insurance_plan_id);
select main.*, if(c.Encounter_ID = main.encounter_id,"Y","N") as Payment_Paid from (SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name,p. Physician_Middle_Name,p.Physician_Last_Name,p.Physician_Suffix, a.Facility_Name ,p.Encounter_Mode, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type,w.Obj_Type,a.Is_batch_created,a.Order_Submit_ID, concat(ifnull(ev.insurance_plan_name,''),' (',ifnull(ev.insurance_type,''),') - ',ifnull(ev.eligibility_status,'')), ev.Eligibility_Check_Mode as mode,a.visit_type, h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from encounter a left join wf_object w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type = 'ENCOUNTER' and a.human_id<>0) left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join eligibility_verification ev on (ev.eligibility_verification_id =(select ev1.eligibility_verification_id from eligibility_verification ev1 where ev1.human_id=a.Human_ID and (ev1.insurance_type='primary') order by ev1.created_date_and_time desc limit 1)) where (cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) between :fromdate and :todate) and a.Appointment_Provider_ID in(:PhyList) and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED' and h.Human_ID is not NULL) as main left join checks c on main.Encounter_ID = c.Encounter_ID group by main.encounter_id union all select main.*, if(c.Encounter_ID = main.encounter_id,"Y","N") as Payment_Paid from (SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Appointment_Provider_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix,p.Physician_First_Name,p. Physician_Middle_Name,p.Physician_Last_Name,p.Physician_Suffix, a.Facility_Name ,p.Encounter_Mode, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type,w.Obj_Type,a.Is_batch_created,a.Order_Submit_ID, concat(ifnull(ev.insurance_plan_name,''),' (',ifnull(ev.insurance_type,''),') - ',ifnull(ev.eligibility_status,'')), ev.Eligibility_Check_Mode as mode,a.visit_type,h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from encounter_arc a left join wf_object_arc w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type = 'ENCOUNTER' and a.human_id<>0) left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join physician_library p on (a.Appointment_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join eligibility_verification ev on (ev.eligibility_verification_id =(select ev1.eligibility_verification_id from eligibility_verification ev1 where ev1.human_id=a.Human_ID and (ev1.insurance_type='primary') order by ev1.created_date_and_time desc limit 1)) where (cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) between :fromdate and :todate) and a.Appointment_Provider_ID in(:PhyList) and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED' and h.Human_ID is not NULL) as main left join checks_arc c on main.Encounter_ID = c.Encounter_ID group by main.encounter_id;
select main.*, if(c.Encounter_ID = main.encounter_id,"Y","N") as Payment_Paid from (SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix, m.machine_name, p.Physician_First_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name, p.Physician_suffix, a.Facility_Name ,p.Encounter_Mode, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type,w.Obj_Type,a.Is_batch_created,a.Order_Submit_ID, concat(ifnull(ev.insurance_plan_name,''),' (',ifnull(ev.insurance_type,''),') - ',ifnull(ev.eligibility_status,'')), ev.Eligibility_Check_Mode as mode ,a.visit_type, h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from encounter a left join wf_object w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type = 'ENCOUNTER' and a.human_id<>0) left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join Machine_Technician_Library m on (a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID=m.Machine_Technician_Library_id) left join physician_library p on (m.Physician_Library_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join eligibility_verification ev on (ev.eligibility_verification_id =(select ev1.eligibility_verification_id from eligibility_verification ev1 where ev1.human_id=a.Human_ID and (ev1.insurance_type='primary') order by ev1.created_date_and_time desc limit 1)) where (cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) between :fromdate and :todate) and a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID in(:PhyList) and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED' and h.Human_ID is not NULL) as main left join checks c on main.Encounter_ID = c.Encounter_ID group by main.encounter_id union all select main.*, if(c.Encounter_ID = main.encounter_id,"Y","N") as Payment_Paid from (SELECT a.Encounter_ID,a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID,a.Human_ID,cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date, a.Duration_Minutes,w.Current_Process,h.Last_Name,h.First_Name,h.MI,h.Prefix,h.Suffix,p.Physician_Prefix, m.machine_name, p.Physician_First_Name, p.Physician_Last_Name, p.Physician_suffix, a.Facility_Name ,p.Encounter_Mode, cast(h.Birth_Date as char(100)) as Birth_Date,h.Human_Type,w.Obj_Type,a.Is_batch_created,a.Order_Submit_ID,concat(ifnull(ev.insurance_plan_name,''),' (',ifnull(ev.insurance_type,''),') - ',ifnull(ev.eligibility_status,'')), ev.Eligibility_Check_Mode as mode , a.visit_type, h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient from encounter_arc a left join wf_object_arc w on (a.Encounter_ID = w.Obj_System_Id and w.Obj_Type = 'ENCOUNTER' and a.human_id<>0) left join human h on (a.human_id=h.human_id) left join Machine_Technician_Library m on (a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID=m.Machine_Technician_Library_id) left join physician_library p on (m.Physician_Library_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) left join eligibility_verification ev on (ev.eligibility_verification_id =(select ev1.eligibility_verification_id from eligibility_verification ev1 where ev1.human_id=a.Human_ID and ( ev1.insurance_type='primary') order by ev1.created_date_and_time desc limit 1)) where (cast(a.Appointment_Date as char(100)) between :fromdate and :todate) and a.Machine_Technician_Library_ID in(:PhyList) and w.Facility_Name in (:FacList) and w.Current_Process<>'CANCELLED' and h.Human_ID is not NULL) as main left join checks_arc c on main.Encounter_ID = c.Encounter_ID group by main.encounter_id;
SELECT w.WF_Object_Id, w.Obj_System_Id, w.Obj_Type, w.Obj_Sub_Type, w.Facility_Name, w.Current_Process, cast(w.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w.Current_Owner, w.Priority, w.Parent_Obj_Type, w.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w.Process_Allocation, w.Version, w.Doc_Type, w.Doc_Sub_Type,w.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem FROM wf_object w where w.Obj_System_ID = ? and w.Obj_Type=? union all SELECT w_arc.WF_Object_Id, w_arc.Obj_System_Id, w_arc.Obj_Type, w_arc.Obj_Sub_Type, w_arc.Facility_Name, w_arc.Current_Process, cast(w_arc.Current_Arrival_Time as CHAR(100)), w_arc.Current_Owner, w_arc.Priority, w_arc.Parent_Obj_Type, w_arc.Parent_Obj_System_Id, w_arc.Process_Allocation, w_arc.Version, w_arc.Doc_Type, w_arc.Doc_Sub_Type,w_arc.Is_Default_MyQ_LineItem FROM wf_object_arc w_arc where w_arc.Obj_System_ID = ? and w_arc.Obj_Type=?;
SELECT h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.MI,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)) as birthdate,h.sex,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.ssn, e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS, concat(pl.Physician_Prefix,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Suffix), ifnull(e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,''),cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as DOA,h.Suffix,h.Home_Phone_No, u.user_name,h.Is_Sent_To_Rcopia,h.Patient_Status,h.Human_Type,h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient,h.Photo_Path,h.Past_Due FROM human h left join encounter e on (h.Human_ID = e.Human_ID and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y') left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = u.Physician_Library_ID)
where h.human_id= ? group by e.encounter_id union all SELECT h.human_id,h.last_name,h.first_name,h.MI,cast(h.birth_date as char(100)) as birthdate,h.sex,h.Medical_Record_Number,h.ssn, e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS, concat(pl.Physician_Prefix,' ',pl.Physician_First_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Middle_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Last_Name,' ',pl.Physician_Suffix), ifnull(e.Assigned_Med_Asst_User_Name,''),cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as DOA,h.Suffix,h.Home_Phone_No, u.user_name,h.Is_Sent_To_Rcopia,h.Patient_Status,h.Human_Type,h.ACO_Is_Eligible_Patient,h.Photo_Path,h.Past_Due FROM human h left join encounter_arc e on (h.Human_ID = e.Human_ID and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y') left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) left join user u on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = u.Physician_Library_ID)
where h.human_id= ? group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc;
SELECT concat(all_icd,' ~ ',icd_description) FROM `all_icd` where version_year='ICD_10'
SELECT concat(procedure_code,' ~ ',procedure_code_description) FROM `procedure_code_library`;
SELECT patient_results_id, captured_date_and_time,IF(ROWCOUNT>1,if((SUBSTRING_INDEX(VALUE,',',2) like '%hyper%' or SUBSTRING_INDEX(VALUE,',',2) like '%normal%'),VALUE , concat(SUBSTRING_INDEX(VALUE,',',1),', ')),CONCAT(VALUE,', ')), Loinc_Observation,Acurus_Result_Code FROM (Select patient_results_id, cast(date_format(captured_date_and_time,'%d-%b-%Y %T ') as char(25)) AS captured_date_and_time, group_concat(value) AS VALUE ,Loinc_Observation,Acurus_Result_Code,COUNT(*) AS ROWCOUNT from (select * from patient_results a where a.Encounter_ID = :EncounterID and (a.Loinc_Observation in('BP-Sitting Sys/Dia','BP-Sitting$ Sys/Dia' ,'BP-Standing Sys/Dia', 'BP-Standing$ Sys/Dia','BP-Lying Sys/Dia','BP-Lying$ Sys/Dia') or a.Loinc_Observation in('BP-Sitting Sys/Dia Status','BP-Sitting$ Sys/Dia Status' ,'BP-Standing Sys/Dia Status', 'BP-Standing$ Sys/Dia Status','BP-Lying Sys/Dia Status','BP-Lying$ Sys/Dia Status')) and Results_Type='Vitals' and value!='' order by a.Captured_date_and_time desc, a.Loinc_Observation asc limit 2) as a group by encounter_id) AS A
select SUM(cnt) from (Select count(*) cnt from assessment where human_id=? and icd in(:IcdCode) union Select count(*) cnt from assessment_arc where human_id=? and icd in(:IcdCode))a
select count(*) from (select * from human where EMail=? union select * from human where representative_email=?)aa
select concat(encounter_id,'|',date_of_service) from ( select * from encounter where human_id=? and DATE(date_of_service) between ? and ? and Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' group by encounter_id union select * from encounter_arc where human_id=? and DATE(date_of_service) between ? and ? and Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' group by encounter_id ) as d order by d.date_of_service desc
select distinct a.encounter_id,a.human_id,p.icd,procedure_code,pr.loinc_identifier from encounter a inner join human b on a.human_id = b.human_id left join problem_list p on a.human_id=p.human_id left join assessment d on a.Encounter_id=d.Encounter_ID left join e_m_coding c on a.Encounter_id=c.Encounter_id left join patient_results pr on a.Encounter_id=pr.Encounter_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,Birth_date, date(?)) between 18 and 75 and a.encounter_Provider_id =? and(d.ICD in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD'))
or (p.icd in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) and p.is_active='y' )) and c.Procedure_Code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT')) and c.is_delete='n';
select distinct max(e.encounter_id) as Encounter_Id,e.human_id,pr.loinc_identifier from encounter e left join patient_results pr on e.encounter_id=pr.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and loinc_observation in ('HBA1C','Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total', 'Hemoglobin F/Hemoglobin.total', 'Hemoglobin A/Hemoglobin.total', 'Hemoglobin S/Hemoglobin.total', 'Hemoglobin C/Hemoglobin.total', 'Hemoglobin A2/Hemoglobin.total') and `value`>9 group by e.human_id;
select e.encounter_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id where e.encounter_Provider_id =? and date(e.date_of_service) between ? and ? and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=18;
select distinct(em.human_id) from e_m_coding em where em.is_delete='N' and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS')) and encounter_id in (:EncIds);
select e.Encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id =em.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in (:EncIdsExc) and em.is_delete='N';
select e.Encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id =em.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) and em.is_delete='N';
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.human_id =em.human_id where e.reason_not_performed_medication_reviewed in('Procedure contraindicated','Medical contraindication ','Treatment not tolerated','Procedure not indicated') and e.human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id from encounter e, rcopia_medication m where e.encounter_provider_signed_date<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' and (e.Is_Medication_Reviewed ='Y') and e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and m.status='active' and e.human_id=m.human_id group by e.human_id;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code,ifnull(a.icd,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment as a on e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in (:EncIdEx) group by e.encounter_id;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code,ifnull(a.icd,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment as a on e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) group by e.encounter_id;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id join e_m_coding em on em.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where date(e.Date_of_service) between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id = ? and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=18 and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS'));
select encounter_id,human_id from treatment_plan where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and Addendum_Plan<>'N' and (Followup_Plan_Snomed like '%183932001%' or Followup_Plan_Snomed like '%397745006%' or Followup_Plan_Snomed like '%407563006%'or Followup_Plan_Snomed like '%428119001%' or Followup_Plan_Snomed like '%304549008%') group by human_id;
select distinct p.encounter_id,p.human_id,' ' as icd,' ' as cpt,cast(p.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(e.Date_Of_Service as char(100)) ,p.value,p.Loinc_identifier from patient_results p left join encounter e on p.encounter_id= e.encounter_id where Loinc_Observation='BMI' and value between '18.5' and '24.9' and p.encounter_id in (:EncIds) union select distinct p.encounter_id,p.human_id,a.icd,em.procedure_code,cast(p.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(e.Date_Of_Service as char(100)),p.value,p.Loinc_identifier from patient_results p left join encounter e on p.encounter_id=e.encounter_id left join e_m_coding em on p.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment a on p.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where p.human_id in (:HumanIds) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and Loinc_Observation='BMI' and value >=25 and ((em.is_delete='N' and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT'))) or a.icd in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='ICD') or p.snomed_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='SNOMED' ))
union
select distinct p.encounter_id,p.human_id,a.icd,em.procedure_code,cast(p.Captured_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(e.Date_Of_Service as char(100)),p.value,p.Loinc_identifier from patient_results p left join encounter e on p.encounter_id= e.encounter_id left join e_m_coding em on p.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment a on p.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where p.human_id in (:HumanIds) and e.date_of_service between ? and ? and p.Loinc_Observation='BMI' and p.value <18.5 and ((em.is_delete='N' and em.procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='HCPCS')) or a.icd in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='ICD') or p.snomed_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='SNOMED') );
select distinct e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and e.encounter_Provider_id = ? and (datediff(date(?), h.birth_date)/365.25)>=66 and em.Is_Delete='N' and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPT') ;
select distinct A.Encounter_id,A.human_id,ih.procedure_code from encounter A left join immunization_history ih on A.human_id=ih.human_id where A.human_id in (:HumanIds) and (ih.procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPT') ) group by A.human_id;
select e.human_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=18 and e.encounter_Provider_id = ?;
select encounter_id,human_id,procedure_code from e_m_coding where is_delete='N' and Procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPT') and human_id in (:EncIds) group by human_id having count( encounter_id)>=1;
select human_id from e_m_coding where is_delete='N' and Procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPT') and human_id in (:EncIds) group by human_id having count( encounter_id)>=1;
select em.encounter_id,em.human_id,em.procedure_code from e_m_coding em left join social_history sh on sh.human_id=em.human_id where em.Is_delete='N' and sh.human_id in (:EncIds) and sh.Is_Present='Y' and sh.Social_info like '%Tobacco Use and Exposure%' and sh.recodes<>''
select a.encounter_id ,a.human_id,a.icd,"" as procedure_code from assessment a where human_id in (:EncIds) and a.ICD in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='ICD') union select a.encounter_id ,a.human_id,a.icd,"" as procedure_code from problem_list a where human_id in (:EncIds) and a.ICD in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='ICD') union select sh.encounter_id ,sh.human_id,"","" as procedure_code from social_history sh where (sh.human_id in (:EncIds) and sh.social_info='Tobacco Use and Exposure' and sh.Snomed_Reason_Not_Performed<>'')
select a.encounter_id,a.human_id,cast(a.created_date_and_time as char(100)), cast(a.modified_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(r.stop_date as char(100)),r.rxnorm_id from social_history a left join care_plan cp on a.encounter_id=cp.encounter_id left join rcopia_medication r on A.human_id=r.human_id left join e_m_coding em on A.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where a.human_id in (:EncIds) and ((a.Is_Present='N' and a.Social_info like '%Tobacco Use and Exposure%' and a.recodes<>'') or (a.Is_Present='Y' and a.Social_info like '%Tobacco Use and Exposure%' and a.recodes<>'' and ((cp.care_name_value like '%Tobacco%' and cp.Snomed_Code!='') and em.procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPTPQRI.GetDenominatorCMS122.HBA1c') or (r.deleted='N' and r.rxnorm_id in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='RxNorm') )))) group by human_id;
select a.encounter_id,a.human_id,cast(a.created_date_and_time as char(100)), cast(a.modified_date_and_time as char(100)),cast(r.stop_date as char(100)),r.rxnorm_id from social_history a where a.human_id in (:EncIds) and ((a.Is_Present='N' and a.Social_info like '%Tobacco Use and Exposure%' and a.recodes<>'') or (a.Is_Present='Y' and a.Social_info like '%Tobacco Use and Exposure%' and a.recodes<>'')) group by human_id;
select e.Encounter_ID from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and (datediff(date(Date_of_service),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=18 and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)<85 and e.Encounter_Provider_id = ?;
select distinct(Encounter_id),human_id from e_m_coding em where em.Is_delete='N' and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS')) and encounter_id in (:EncIds);
select distinct(pl.human_id) from problem_list pl where STR_TO_DATE(date_diagnosed, '%d-%b-%Y') <=? and pl.human_id in (:EncIds) and ( (pl.icd in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) and pl.is_active ='Y')) union select distinct(pl.human_id) from assessment pl where pl.encounter_id in (:EncIds_Ass) and (pl.ICD in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) )
;
select distinct(em.Encounter_id),em.human_id,a.ICd,em.procedure_code,pr.Loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join problem_list a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pr on pr.human_id=em.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6' union select distinct(em.Encounter_id),em.human_id,a.ICd,em.procedure_code,pr.Loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join assessment a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pr on pr.human_id=em.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6';
select distinct(em.Encounter_id),em.human_id,a.ICd,em.procedure_code,pr.Loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join problem_list a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pr on pr.human_id=em.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6' and em.human_id not in (:EncIdEx) union select distinct(em.Encounter_id),em.human_id,a.ICd,em.procedure_code,pr.Loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join assessment a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pr on pr.human_id=em.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6' and em.human_id not in (:EncIdEx)
;
select distinct(em.Encounter_id) ,em.human_id,a.icd,em.encounter_id from e_m_coding em
left join problem_list pl on em.human_id=pl.human_id left join assessment a on em.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and (em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS')) or( a.icd in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) or (pl.is_active='Y' and pl.icd in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD'))) ) );
select em.encounter_id,em.human_id,a.ICD,em.procedure_code,pl.loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join problem_list a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pl on em.human_id=pl.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pl.loinc_identifier= '8480-6' union select em.encounter_id,em.human_id,a.ICD,em.procedure_code,pl.loinc_identifier from e_m_coding em left join assessment a on em.human_id=a.human_id left join patient_results pl on em.human_id=pl.human_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and pl.loinc_identifier= '8480-6' ;
select encounter_id,human_id,Loinc_identifier from (select encounter_id,human_id,Loinc_identifier from patient_results pr where pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6' and encounter_id in (:EncIds) and (SUBSTRING_INDEX(pr.`value`,'/',1)<140 and SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pr.`value`,'/',2),'/',-1)<90) group by captured_date_and_time,human_id order by captured_date_and_time desc ) as a group by human_id;
select a.encounter_id from encounter a inner join human b on a.human_id = b.human_id where TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,Birth_date, date(?)) >0.6 and a.date_of_service between (date_format(date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(? ,'%Y-01-01'),interval 1 year),'%Y-10-01')) and (date_format(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),'%Y-03-31')) and a.encounter_provider_id = ?
;
select c.encounter_id from e_m_coding c where c.is_delete='N' and (c.Procedure_Code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT'))) and c.encounter_id in (:EncIds);
select e.Encounter_Id,e.Human_Id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where em.is_delete='N' and e.encounter_id not in (:EncIds) and e.human_id in (:EncIdslist);
select e.Encounter_Id,e.Human_Id ,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where em.is_delete='N' and e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) ;
select a.encounter_id from encounter a left join assessment b on A.Encounter_id=b.Encounter_ID left join immunization e on a.Encounter_Id=e.Encounter_Id where a.encounter_id in(:EncIds) and (b.ICD in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) or e.snomed_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('SNOMED') ));
select encounter_id,human_id,'',procedure_code,'' from e_m_coding where encounter_id in (:EncIds) and is_delete='N' union all select encounter_id,human_id,icd,'','' from assessment where encounter_id in (:EncIds) UNION ALL select encounter_id,human_id,'','',snomed_code from immunization where encounter_id in (:EncIds);
select distinct(B.Encounter_Id),B.Human_Id,B.procedure_code,ifnull(CVX_Code,'') from immunization_history B
where( B.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type ='CPT'
) or CVX_Code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type = 'CVX')) and (if(Administered_Date<>'',str_to_date(Administered_Date,'%Y-%b-%d'),'0001-01-01') between date_format(date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 1 year),'%Y-08-01') and date_format(date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 1 year),'%Y-12-31') or if(Administered_Date<>'',str_to_date(Administered_Date,'%Y-%b-%d'),'0001-01-01') between date_format(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),'%Y-01-01') and date_format(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),'%Y-03-31')) and human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.human_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and (datediff(date(e.date_of_service),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=51 and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)<74 and h.sex="FEMALE" and e.encounter_provider_id =? and em.procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS'));
select e.encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in (:EncIdExc);
select distinct em.encounter_id ,em.human_id from assessment em where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and em.ICD in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD'))
union
select distinct em.encounter_id ,em.human_id from e_m_coding em where em.human_id in (:EncIds) and (em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS')) and em.Is_Delete='N') group by em.procedure_code,em.human_id having count(em.procedure_code)>=2;
select distinct em.encounter_id,em.human_id,c.ICD,em.procedure_code from e_m_coding em left join assessment c on em.encounter_id=c.encounter_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds);
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier from patient_results pr where pr.loinc_observation like "%CDPLast Mammogram%" and if(length(`value`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d')) between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 15 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id from encounter e inner join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join e_m_coding B on e.Encounter_Id=B.Encounter_Id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and e.encounter_Provider_id = ? and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=18 and Procedure_Code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS')) ;
select c.encounter_id,c.human_id,B.ICD,pr.Loinc_identifier,em.procedure_code,cast(B.created_date_and_time as char(50)) from assessment B left join encounter c on B.ENcounter_id = c.Encounter_Id left join patient_results pr on pr.encounter_id=c.encounter_id left join e_m_coding as em on em.Encounter_Id=c.Encounter_Id where ICD in ('H35.039','I10','I11.0','I11.9','I12.0','I12.9','I13.0','I13.10','I13.11','I13.2','I15.0','I16.0','I16.1','I16.9','I67.4') and date(c.date_of_service) between '0001-01-01' and ? and c.human_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_identifier='8480-6';
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id, pr.Loinc_identifier,ifnull(B.procedure_code,'') from encounter e left join patient_results pr on e.encounter_id=pr.encounter_id left join e_m_coding B on e.Encounter_Id=B.Encounter_Id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and pr.Loinc_Observation like "%bp%" and pr.snomed_code<>'';
select em.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.ICD,'' as loinc,em.procedure_code,cast(a.created_date_and_time as char(50)) from assessment a left join e_m_coding em on a.human_id=em.human_id where a.human_id in (:humIds) union select em.encounter_id,a.human_id,a.ICD,'' as loinc,em.procedure_code,cast(a.created_date_and_time as char(50)) from problem_list a left join e_m_coding em on a.human_id=em.human_id where a.human_id in (:humIds) union select pr.encounter_id,pr.human_id,'',pr.Loinc_identifier as loinc,'','' from patient_results pr where human_id in (:humIds)
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code, ifnull(pr.Loinc_identifier,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id Left join patient_results pr on pr.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in(:EncouExp) and e.human_id not in(:HumId) ;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code, ifnull(pr.Loinc_identifier,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id Left join patient_results pr on pr.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in(:EncouExp);
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code, ifnull(pr.Loinc_identifier,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id Left join patient_results pr on pr.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in(:HumId) ;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id,em.procedure_code,ifnull(pr.Loinc_identifier,'') from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id Left join patient_results pr on pr.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) ;
select B.encounter_id,B.human_id,'' from patient_results B where loinc_observation like "%bp%" and `Value` = 'Normal' and B.encounter_id in (:EncIds) union select distinct B.encounter_id,B.human_id,'' from patient_results B left join care_plan cp on B.encounter_id=cp.encounter_id left join encounter e on B.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where B.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and (loinc_observation like "%bp%" and value='Elevated' and cp.care_name_value ='BP Sys/Dia' and cp.care_plan_notes!='' and cp.status= 'Elevated' and ((e.due_on between date_add(date(e.date_of_service) , interval 1 day) and DATE_add(date_add(date(e.date_of_service),interval 1 day), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)) or (e.Return_In_Months>='2' and e.Return_In_Months<='6') or (e.Return_In_Weeks>='8' and e.Return_In_Weeks<='24') or (e.Return_In_Days>='60' and e.Return_In_Days<='180'))) union select distinct B.encounter_id,B.human_id,'' from patient_results B left join care_plan cp on B.encounter_id=cp.encounter_id left join encounter e on B.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and (loinc_observation like "%bp%" and value='first hypertensive' and cp.care_name_value ='BP Sys/Dia' and cp.care_plan_notes!='' and status='first hypertensive' and (e.due_on between date_add(date(e.date_of_service) , interval 1 day) and DATE_add(date_add(date(e.date_of_service),interval 1 day), INTERVAL 4 week) or e.Return_In_Weeks<='4' or e.Return_In_Days<='28')) union select distinct B.encounter_id,B.human_id ,cp.snomed_code from patient_results B left join care_plan cp on B.encounter_id=cp.encounter_id left join encounter e on B.encounter_id=e.encounter_id left join orders o on e.encounter_id=o.encounter_id where B.encounter_id in (:EncIds) and
(loinc_observation like "%bp%" and value='Second Hypertensive' and cp.care_name_value ='BP Sys/Dia' and cp.care_plan_notes!='' and cp.status = 'Second Hypertensive' and
(cp.snomed_code like "%134403003%" or cp.snomed_code like "%183516009%" or cp.snomed_code like "%183561008%" or cp.snomed_code like "%18385600%" or cp.snomed_code like "%306206005%" or cp.snomed_code like "%306253008%" or cp.snomed_code like "%308470006%") and (e.Return_In_Weeks<='4' or e.Return_In_Days<='28') and o.Lab_Procedure in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT')));
select distinct a.human_id from pat_insured_plan as a join insurance_plan as b on a.insurance_plan_id=a.insurance_plan_id where a.human_id in(:human_id) and a.insurance_type='primary' and b.carrier_id in(select carrier_id from carrier where carrier_name='Medicare');
select distinct human_id from pat_insured_plan where insurance_plan_id=86 and human_id in(:human_id) ;
select distinct human_id from pat_insured_plan where insurance_plan_id=2758 and human_id in(:human_id) ;
select h.human_id as `Patient_Account_Num`,concat(h.Last_name,',',h.First_name,' ',h.MI) as Patient_Name,cast(h.birth_date as char(50)) as DOB,h.sex as Gender,cast(e.date_of_service as char(50)) as DOS,e.encounter_id from encounter e inner join human h on h.human_id=e.human_id where e.date_of_service between ? and ? and e.encounter_provider_id=?;
select concat(w.obj_system_id,'^',e.human_id) from wf_object w, encounter e where current_process="BILLING_WAIT" and obj_type in ("DOCUMENTATION") and obj_system_id not in (select encounter_id from registry_log where registry_type="Case Reporting") and e.encounter_id=w.obj_system_id;
select distinct(encounter_id) from assessment where encounter_id in (:EncIDs) and icd in (select code from case_reporting_lookup where code_source="Assessment" and status="ACTIVE");
select distinct(encounter_id) from orders o,procedure_loinc_map p where o.encounter_id in (:EncIDs) and o.lab_procedure=p.procedure_code and p.loinc_num in (select code from case_reporting_lookup where code_source="Lab Orders" and status="ACTIVE");
select distinct(encounter_id) from patient_results where encounter_id in (:EncIDs) and loinc_identifier in (select code from case_reporting_lookup where code_source="Lab Orders" and status="ACTIVE");
SELECT lb.lab_name,l.Location_Name,Lab_NPI , l.Street_Address1, l.Street_Address2, l.City, l.State, l.ZipCode,l.Phone_No,rs.Lab_Procedure_Description, l.Lab_NPI,s.Specimen_Type,cast(r.Created_Date_And_Time as char(100))as capturedate FROM result_master m , result_obr b, orders_submit s,lab_location l,orders rs,result_obx r,lab lb
