where r.result_master_id=m.result_master_id and b.result_master_id=m.result_master_id and lb.lab_id=l.lab_id and m.order_id=s.order_submit_id and l.lab_location_id=s.lab_location_id and s.order_submit_id=rs.order_submit_id and m.matching_patient_id=? group by l.lab_location_id;
select a.ord from(SELECT concat(os.order_submit_id,' | ', if(os.Test_Date<>'',Date_Format(os.Test_Date,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),' | ', p.physician_prefix,' ', p.physician_First_Name,' ',p.physician_Middle_Name,' ',p.physician_Last_Name,' | [', group_concat(concat(o.lab_procedure,' - ',o.lab_procedure_description) SEPARATOR ' ; ' ),']','^',p.physician_prefix,' ', p.physician_First_Name,' ',p.physician_Last_Name,' ', p.Physician_suffix, '@',p.physician_npi, '@', os.Facility_Name,'@',p.physician_Address1,'@',p.physician_telephone,'@',p.physician_Fax,'@',os.order_submit_id) as ord,os.order_submit_id FROM orders_submit OS , wf_object W,orders o,Physician_library p WHERE W.obj_system_id=OS.Order_Submit_Id and o.order_submit_id=os.order_submit_id and os.physician_id=p.physician_library_id and os.lab_id=? and W.Current_Process='ORDER_GENERATE' And W.Obj_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' AND OS.Facility_Name<>? AND OS.Is_Paper_Order='N' AND OS.Human_Id=? and OS.Order_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' group by os.order_submit_id union SELECT concat(os.order_submit_id,' | ', if(os.Test_Date<>'',Date_Format(os.Test_Date,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),' | ', ' | [', group_concat(concat(o.lab_procedure,' - ',o.lab_procedure_description) SEPARATOR ' ; ' ),']','^','@','','@','','@','','@','','@','','@',os.order_submit_id) as ord,os.order_submit_id FROM orders_submit OS , wf_object W,orders o WHERE W.obj_system_id=OS.Order_Submit_Id and o.order_submit_id=os.order_submit_id and os.lab_id=? and W.Current_Process='ORDER_GENERATE' And W.Obj_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' AND OS.Is_Paper_Order='N' and os.Physician_id='0' AND OS.Human_Id=? and OS.Order_Type='DIAGNOSTIC ORDER' group by os.order_submit_id) a order by a.order_submit_id desc
SELECT group_concat(concat(o.lab_procedure,' - ',o.lab_procedure_description) SEPARATOR ' ; ' ) FROM orders o WHERE Order_Submit_ID= ? group by o.Order_Submit_ID;
CALL CA_REGULATORY_RULE(:input_mode,:enc_id);
SELECT e.Encounter_ID,e.human_id,e.encounter_provider_id,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on(e.Encounter_ID=w.Obj_System_Id) left join physician_library p on(e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where convert_tz(e.Appointment_Date,'Gmt','Us/Pacific') like ? and e.facility_name=? and e.Appointment_Provider_ID in (:ProviderId) and e.Reschedule_Reason_Code='' and e.Cancelation_Reason_Code='' and w.current_process='SCHEDULED' and w.obj_type='ENCOUNTER';
SELECT e.Encounter_ID,e.human_id,e.encounter_provider_id,e.facility_name,cast(e.Appointment_Date as char(100)) as Appointment_Date FROM encounter e left join wf_object w on(e.Encounter_ID=w.Obj_System_Id) left join physician_library p on(e.Encounter_Provider_ID=p.Physician_Library_ID) where convert_tz(e.Appointment_Date,'Gmt','Us/Pacific') like ? and e.Appointment_Provider_ID=? and e.facility_name in (:FacilityName) and e.Reschedule_Reason_Code='' and e.Cancelation_Reason_Code='' and w.current_process='SCHEDULED' and w.obj_type='ENCOUNTER';
SELECT ro.OBX_Abnormal_Flag, ro.Result_Master_ID,ro.OBX_Loinc_Identifier,ro.OBX_Loinc_Observation_Text,ro.OBX_Reference_Range,ro.OBX_Units,ro.OBX_Observation_Value,cast(ro.OBX_Date_And_Time_Of_Observation as char(100)) as observation_Date,arm.Acurus_Result_Code,arm.Acurus_Result_Description FROM result_master rm left join result_obx ro on(rm.result_master_id=ro.result_master_id) left join acurus_results_mapping arm on(arm.Lab_Result_Code=ro.OBX_Observation_Identifier) where rm.matching_patient_id=? and arm.Lab_Id=rm.Lab_Id and (ro.OBX_Loinc_Identifier in (?) or ro.OBX_Observation_Text in (?));
SELECT ro.OBX_Abnormal_Flag, ro.Result_Master_ID,ro.OBX_Loinc_Identifier,ro.OBX_Loinc_Observation_Text,ro.OBX_Reference_Range,ro.OBX_Units,ro.OBX_Observation_Value,cast(ro.OBX_Date_And_Time_Of_Observation as char(100)) as observation_Date, arm.Acurus_Result_Code,arm.Acurus_Result_Description,robr.OBR_Specimen_Collection_Date_And_Time FROM result_master rm left join result_obx ro on(rm.result_master_id=ro.result_master_id) left join acurus_results_mapping arm on(arm.Lab_Result_Code=ro.OBX_Observation_Identifier) left join result_obr robr on(robr.Result_OBR_ID=ro.OBX_Observation_Identifier) where rm.matching_patient_id=? and arm.Lab_Id=rm.Lab_Id and (ro.OBX_Loinc_Identifier in (?) or ro.OBX_Observation_Text in (?));
select carriername,planname,InsType,ifnull(Date_Format(EvDate,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),ResDate,Evmode,EStatus,ErrMsg,PId,humanid,planid,carrierid,EVid, group_concat(FilePath SEPARATOR '|') as FilePath, ifnull(Date_Format(todate,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),TRN02TraceNumber1,NAIC_ID,sort_order,Address,city,state,zip,Eligibility_Check_Mode from
(select carrier_name as carriername ,b.insurance_plan_name as planname ,a.insurance_type as InsType, ifnull(if(Requested_For_From_Date='0001-01-01','',Requested_For_From_Date),'') as EvDate ,'View' as ResDate, 'M' as Evmode,ifnull(eligibility_status,'') as EStatus, ifnull(Response_Message,'') as ErrMsg,a.policy_holder_id as PId, a.human_id as humanid, a.insurance_plan_id as planid ,b.carrier_id as carrierid,ifnull(d.eligibility_verification_id,0) as EVid,ifnull(d.FilePath,'') as FilePath, ifnull(if(Requested_For_To_Date='0001-01-01','', Requested_For_To_Date),'') as todate, ifnull(TRN02TraceNumber1,'') as TRN02TraceNumber1,a.sort_order as sort_order,d.created_date_and_time,b.Payer_Rec_Code as NAIC_ID,b.payer_Addrress1 as Address, b.payer_city as city,b.payer_state as state,b.payer_zip as zip,d.Eligibility_Check_Mode as Eligibility_Check_Mode
from pat_insured_plan as a join insurance_plan as b on a.insurance_plan_id = b.insurance_plan_id join carrier as c on b.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join
( SELECT f.*,REPLACE(FilePath,',','') as FilePath FROM ( select insurance_plan_id,max(created_date_and_time) as created_date_and_time,group_concat(Response_File_Location SEPARATOR '|') as FilePath from eligibility_verification as g where human_id= ? group by insurance_plan_id ,g.created_date_and_time ) Z INNER JOIN eligibility_verification f USING (insurance_plan_id,created_date_and_time) ) as d on d.human_id= a.human_id and d.insurance_plan_id=b.insurance_plan_id
where a.human_id=? and a.Active='YES' and a.Insurance_Type in ('PRIMARY','SECONDARY','TERTIARY') order by d.created_date_and_time desc ) as g group by planid order by instype,sort_order
select carriername,planname,InsType,ifnull(Date_Format(EvDate,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),ResDate,Evmode,EStatus,ErrMsg,PId,humanid,planid,carrierid,EVid, group_concat(FilePath SEPARATOR '|') as FilePath, ifnull(Date_Format(todate,'%d-%b-%Y'),''),TRN02TraceNumber1,NAIC_ID,sort_order,Address,city,state,zip,Eligibility_Check_Mode from
(select carrier_name as carriername ,b.insurance_plan_name as planname ,a.insurance_type as InsType, ifnull(if(Requested_For_From_Date='0001-01-01','',Requested_For_From_Date),'') as EvDate ,'View' as ResDate, 'M' as Evmode,ifnull(eligibility_status,'') as EStatus, ifnull(Response_Message,'') as ErrMsg,a.policy_holder_id as PId, a.human_id as humanid, a.insurance_plan_id as planid ,b.carrier_id as carrierid,ifnull(d.eligibility_verification_id,0) as EVid,ifnull(d.FilePath,'') as FilePath, ifnull(if(Requested_For_To_Date='0001-01-01','', Requested_For_To_Date),'') as todate, ifnull(TRN02TraceNumber1,'') as TRN02TraceNumber1,a.sort_order as sort_order,d.created_date_and_time,b.Payer_Rec_Code as NAIC_ID,b.payer_Addrress1 as Address, b.payer_city as city,b.payer_state as state,b.payer_zip as zip,d.Eligibility_Check_Mode as Eligibility_Check_Mode
from pat_insured_plan as a join insurance_plan as b on a.insurance_plan_id = b.insurance_plan_id join carrier as c on b.carrier_id=c.carrier_id left join
( SELECT f.*,REPLACE(FilePath,',','') as FilePath FROM ( select insurance_plan_id,max(created_date_and_time) as created_date_and_time,group_concat(Response_File_Location SEPARATOR '|') as FilePath from eligibility_verification as g where human_id= ? group by insurance_plan_id ,g.created_date_and_time ) Z INNER JOIN eligibility_verification f USING (insurance_plan_id,created_date_and_time) ) as d on d.human_id= a.human_id and d.insurance_plan_id=b.insurance_plan_id
where a.human_id=? and a.Active='YES' order by d.created_date_and_time desc ) as g group by planid order by sort_order
select * from (select insurance_plan_id,group_concat(Response_File_Location order by created_date_and_time desc SEPARATOR'|') as FilePath from eligibility_verification where human_id=? and insurance_plan_id=? and Response_File_Location<>'' and policy_holder_id=? order by created_date_and_time desc) as a group by insurance_plan_id
(SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS, concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Suffix,'')) FROM encounter e left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) where e.human_id= ? and e.date_of_service<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' and date(date_of_service) >= date(NOW())- INTERVAL ? MONTH group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc) union all (SELECT e.Encounter_ID,cast(e.Date_of_Service as char(100)) as DOS,concat(ifnull(pl.Physician_Prefix,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_First_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Middle_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Last_Name,''),' ',ifnull(pl.Physician_Suffix,'')) FROM encounter_arc e left join physician_library pl on (e.Encounter_Provider_ID = pl.Physician_Library_ID) where e.human_id= ? and e.date_of_service<>'0001-01-01 00:00:00' and e.Is_Phone_Encounter<>'Y' and date(date_of_service) >= date(NOW()) - INTERVAL ? MONTH group by e.encounter_id order by DOS desc) order by DOS desc;
select e.human_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id where date(Date_of_service) between ? and ? and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=50 and (datediff(date(?),h.birth_date)/365.25)<76 and e.encounter_provider_id =? and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT','HCPCS'));
select distinct b.encounter_id ,b.human_id from assessment b where b.ICD in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where Standard_concept in ('Malignant Neoplasm of Colon','Total Colectomy') and nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('ICD')) and b.human_id in (:EncIds) union
select distinct encounter_id,human_id from care_plan where care_name_value in ('Hospice Care', 'Palliative Care','Frailty Device') and status='Yes' and snomed_Code!='' and human_id in (:EncIds);
select distinct b.encounter_id ,b.human_id,ifnull(s.description,'') from hospitalization b left join static_lookup as s on s.value=b.Reason_for_hospitalization where s.field_name='REASON FOR HOSPITALIZATION' and if(length(`from_date`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`from_date`,'%d-%b-%Y'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`from_date`,'%d-%b-%Y')) between (DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01')) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and if(length(`to_date`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`to_date`,'%d-%b-%Y'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`to_date`,'%d-%b-%Y')) between (DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01')) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds)
select distinct em.encounter_id,em.human_id,c.ICD,em.procedure_code,cp.snomed_code from e_m_coding em left join assessment c on em.encounter_id=c.encounter_id left join care_plan cp on em.encounter_id=cp.encounter_id where em.human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code,a.icd from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment as a on a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds);
select e.encounter_id ,e.human_id,em.procedure_code,a.icd from encounter e join e_m_coding em on e.encounter_id=em.encounter_id left join assessment as a on a.encounter_id=e.encounter_id where e.human_id in (:EncIds) and e.human_id not in (:EncIdExc);
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier,'' from patient_results pr where pr.loinc_observation like "%CT colonography%" and if(length(`value`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d')) between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 60 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds)
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier,'' from patient_results pr where pr.loinc_observation like "%FIT-DNA%" and if(length(`value`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d')) between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 36 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds)
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier,'' from patient_results pr where pr.loinc_observation like "%Fecal Occult Blood Test%" and if(length(pr.value)=8,date_format(str_to_date(pr.value,'%Y-%b-%d'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(pr.value,'%Y-%b-%d')) between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 12 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds)
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier,s.value from patient_results pr , static_lookup s where (pr.Value=s.Description and s.field_name='fobtsnomed') and ( pr.loinc_observation like "%Fecal Occult Blood Test%" and human_id in (:EncIds) )
select distinct em.encounter_id,em.human_id,'','' from encounter as b left join e_m_coding em on em.human_id=b.human_id where date_of_service between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 60 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT') AND Standard_Concept = 'Flexible Sigmoidoscopy') and em.human_id in (:EncIds)
select distinct em.encounter_id,em.human_id,'','' from encounter as b left join e_m_coding em on em.human_id=b.human_id where date_of_service between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 120 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and em.procedure_code in (SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and PQRI_Type in ('CPT') AND Standard_Concept = 'Colonoscopy') and em.human_id in (:EncIds)
select encounter_id,human_id,loinc_identifier,'' from patient_results pr where pr.loinc_observation like "%CDPLast Colonoscopy%" and if(length(`value`)=8,date_format(str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d'),'%Y-%m-01'),str_to_date(`value`,'%Y-%b-%d')) between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 120 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and human_id in (:EncIds)
select e.human_id from encounter e left join human h on e.human_id=h.human_id left join e_m_coding em on e.human_id=em.human_id where date_of_service between (DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01')) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and (datediff(date(e.date_of_service),h.birth_date)/365.25)>=66 and em.procedure_code in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and standard_Concept in ('Frailty Encounter')) and h.human_id in (:EncIds);;
select e.encounter_id,e.human_id from encounter e left join rcopia_Medication r on e.encounter_id=r.encounter_id where date_of_service between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 24 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and r.rxnorm_id in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and standard_Concept ='Dementia Medications') and r.deleted='N' and e.human_id in (:EncIds);;
select e.encounter_id ,e.human_id from encounter e left join assessment a on e.encounter_id=a.encounter_id where date_of_service between date_sub(DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-01-01'),interval 24 month) and DATE_FORMAT(?,'%Y-12-31') and a.icd in(SELECT PQRI_Value FROM cqm_data where nqf_number =? and PQRI_calculation_Method=? and standard_Concept ='advanced illness diagnosis') and r.deleted='N' and h.human_id in (:EncIds);;
